title: Social Media Manager
description:
Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time



Job Description:

As a Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for developing and executing a social media strategy that aligns with our brand’s objectives and engages our target audience. You will create and manage content across various platforms, track performance metrics, and work closely with the marketing team to drive awareness and engagement.



Key Responsibilities:

Develop and implement social media strategies across platforms 
, Instagram,
, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.) to enhance brand visibility and engagement.

Create, curate, and manage engaging content (text, image, video) that aligns with brand guidelines.

Monitor, analyze, and report on social media performance and adjust strategies accordingly.

Respond to audience interactions and foster a positive community online.

Stay updated with the latest social media trends, tools, and best practices.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support campaigns, events, and product launches.

Manage social media calendar and ensure timely content publication.



Requirements:

Proven experience as a Social Media Manager or similar role.

Strong knowledge of social media platforms and tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Buffer, Sprout Social).

Excellent communication skills and a creative mindset.

Ability to analyze data and adjust strategies to improve engagement.

Experience with paid social media campaigns and ad management is a plus.

Familiarity with graphic design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Creative Suite) is a plus.

Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team.



Preferred Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.

2+ years of experience in social media management or digital marketing.



What We Offer:

Opportunity to work in a fast-paced, creative environment.

Flexible working hours and remote work options.



If you’re ready to bring your creativity and social media expertise to our team, we’d love to hear from you!



How to Apply:

Please respond with your resume, along with a portfolio or examples of your work.

title: Remote Meta Ads Specialist
description:
Z Media Companies, LLC is a fast-growing marketing startup providing targeted lead generation, branding, and strategic support for American beauty industry clients. 

We are hiring a remote Meta Ads Specialist to plan, execute, and optimize high-performing ad campaigns. Our ideal candidate combines data-driven strategy with creative thinking to generate consistent, high-quality leads and bookings. This role is perfect for someone who understands how to turn visual content into profitable campaigns and is eager to stay ahead of Meta platform updates (Andromeda, AI automation, etc.).



What you’ll do:

 - Create, manage, and optimize Meta Ads campaigns 
 & Instagram)

 - Develop and test ad creatives, copy, and campaign structures

 - Generate qualified leads and bookings through proven strategies

 - Analyze campaign performance and continuously improve CPL, CTR, and ROAS

 - Stay up-to-date with Meta updates, ad trends, and algorithm changes

 - Collaborate with creative and strategy teams to execute campaigns effectively



What we are looking for (Qualifications):

 - Proven work experience as a Meta Ads Specialist, Media Buyer, or similar role

 - Strong understanding of lead generation for service-based businesses

 - Experience managing end-to-end campaigns (strategy, launch, optimization)

 - Ability to analyze data and make performance-driven decisions

 - Familiarity with CRM integrations

 - Knowledge of Meta Ads Manager

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills

 - Ability to manage multiple campaigns and meet deadlines



Nice to Have:

 - Experience running Google Ads 

 - Familiarity with tools like Zapier, GoHighLevel, or similar CRMs

 - Understanding of local ad strategies and scaling campaigns



To apply, please submit your resume and a portfolio of your work.

title: Warm Lead Caller / Setter – Fast Response Role | US Hours + Weekends | Base + Commission
description:
In this role, speed matters.



When a lead comes in, timing d
 everything — and your job is to make sure no opportunity is missed.



At Acquisition Ascension, we’re hiring a Warm Lead Caller / Appointment Setter to handle inbound, interested leads. These are people who have already taken action — your role is to respond quickly, qualify them, and make sure they get to the call.



This isn’t about volume.

It’s about responsibility, follow-through, and consistency.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Call new leads immediately after they come in

Qualify and book leads who haven’t scheduled yet

Confirm booked calls and ensure they’re prepared

Call leads again ~1 hour before their appointment to lock in attendance

Keep CRM notes clean and updated

Stay available during US time zones + weekends



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commission structure

Warm, high-intent leads — no cold outreach

Clear scripts, workflows, and expectations

A role where consistency directly impacts results



You’re a Strong Fit If You:

Speak fluent English and sound confident on calls

Have experience in appointment setting, inbound calling, or sales

Are fast to respond — you don’t let leads sit

Are comfortable working US hours and weekends

Stay organized and follow through on every lead

Understand that missed follow-ups = missed revenue



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom (1–2 minutes) answering:



Your experience with inbound or warm lead calling

Your availability for US hours + weekend coverage

How quickly you typically act on new leads



We’re hiring one setter for this role.

If you’re someone who moves fast, stays consistent, and takes ownership — apply now.



— Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Senior SEO Content Writer - Must DO Application Requirements
description:
Role Overview



We are hiring a Senior SEO Content Writer to take full ownership of content that drives organic traffic, rankings, and conversions.



This is not a generic writing role. You will be responsible for understanding search intent, building content structure, and producing content that performs.



You must be able to think strategically, execute independently, and consistently produce content aligned with both SEO and brand voice.



A strong understanding of EEAT (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) is required.



Key Responsibilities

Plan and execute SEO content strategy based on business goals

Conduct keyword research, SERP analysis, and search intent mapping

Build detailed content outlines and briefs before writing

Write high-quality, long-form content (blogs, landing pages, guides)

Edit and refine content to improve clarity, structure, and performance

Optimize existing content for rankings, CTR, and conversions

Implement strong on-page SEO (headings, internal linking, structure)

Apply EEAT principles through depth, accuracy, and credible sourcing

Use AI tools effectively by creating, refining, and improving prompts

Track content performance and iterate based on data

Writing, Editing, and Brand Voice

Must be able to quickly understand and adapt to different brand voices

Strong ability to maintain tone, consistency, and positioning across content

Excellent editing skills — able to improve clarity, flow, and readability

High attention to detail in grammar, sentence structure, and formatting

Mastery of prepositions, punctuation, and written English is required

Able to turn rough inputs into clear, structured, on-brand content

Industry Exposure



You should be comfortable writing across multiple industries. Please show experience in areas such as:



SaaS

Agencies / marketing services

Local businesses

E-commerce

B2B services

Any technical or specialized industries



You must be able to research and produce authoritative content in unfamiliar domains.



Requirements

4–6+ years of experience in SEO content writing

Proven track record of ranking content on Google

Strong understanding of search intent, on-page SEO, and content structure

Clear understanding and application of EEAT in content

Strong ability to create, modify, and refine AI prompts for content generation

Excellent command of English, including grammar, punctuation, and sentence construction

Experience with tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Surfer, Clearscope, or similar

Strong research and analytical thinking

KPIs

Organic traffic growth

Keyword rankings (Top 3 / Top 10)

Content-driven conversions

Quality and consistency of output

Performance improvements on updated content

Application Requirements



To be considered, you must include the following:



3–5 SEO articles you have written that are currently ranking. Include target keywords and performance details if available

A short breakdown of one article:

Search intent

Why it performed (or didn’t)

What you would improve



A structured content outline for:

"SEO agency for small business" (Warren Digital)



Your outline must include:



Primary and secondary search intent

Target audience and stage of awareness

Logical heading structure (H1–H3)

Key sections required to compete with top-ranking pages

How you would differentiate the content

Where and how you would include conversion elements (CTAs, trust signals)

EEAT signals you would incorporate (case studies, proof, authority, etc.)

A Loom video (5–10 minutes) where you:

Analyze a top-ranking article for a keyword

Explain why it ranks

Break down structure, intent, and SEO elements

Identify EEAT signals

Explain how you would outperform it

List the industries you have written for

title: Property Operations Coordinator
description:
Remote Property Operations Coordinator (AU Short-Term Rentals)

Philippines-based | Full-time | AEST-aligned



Join One of Australia’s Largest Short-Term Rental Businesses



This is a rare long-term opportunity to work directly with one of Australia’s most established short-term rental operators — supporting a growing portfolio of up to 800 properties across NSW.



Staff Connect Australia is building a high-performing offshore team, and we’re looking for a proactive, detail-driven Property Operations Coordinator to become one of our foundational hires. If you’re sharp, confident on calls, and love problem-solving in a fast-paced environment, this role has serious growth potential.



You’ll be right at the heart of daily operations — handling bookings, guest and owner communications, issue resolution, and admin support — with exposure to every part of Australian short-term rental management.



What You’ll Be Doing



This is a hands-on, dynamic role. Your responsibilities will include:

- Guest & Owner Support

- Handle inbound and outbound calls with guests and property owners via Aircall

- Respond to enquiries and issues via Airbnb, 
, direct bookings

- Resolve problems efficiently and follow through to completion





Operations & Coordination

- Monitor bookings, availability, and calendars using Homhero, RMS, and other systems

- Coordinate cleaning schedules and ensure properties are guest-ready

- Assign and follow up maintenance tasks with trades or contractors

- Track cleans, maintenance, guest issues, and owner communications



Admin, Reporting & Growth

- Manage booking calendars, pricing, and blackout dates

- Assist with onboarding new properties and system setup

- Support compliance documentation (smoke alarms, council registration, etc.)

- Prepare weekly/monthly reports using spreadsheets or dashboards

- Help draft and improve SOPs, internal docs, and guest manuals

- Identify workflow gaps and suggest smarter processes or automations



As the business grows, your role will grow with it — including pricing, owner reporting, SOP ownership, and broader operational oversight.



Who We’re Looking For



You’re someone who:

- Is confident on the phone and professional with both guests and property owners

- Thrives in fast-paced, customer-facing environments

- Is organised, proactive, and solutions-focused

- Can juggle multiple tools and tasks without being micromanaged

- Takes ownership and actually cares about doing things properly



Skills & Experience



Required:

- Excellent spoken & written English

- Stable internet connection

- Confident handling phone calls

- Experience (or fast learning ability) with Aircall, Homhero

- Familiarity with Airbnb, 
, and direct booking sites

- Strong organisational & multitasking skills

- Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)



Preferred (but not mandatory)



- 2+ years in short-term rentals, property management, or admin support

- Experience working with Australian clients

- Exposure to cleaning teams or remote contractors



We’re open to candidates with less experience if you show initiative, strong communication skills, and the right mindset.



Tools You’ll Use

Core Systems:

- Homhero, RMS, Breezeway, Orana

- Comms & Support:

- Aircall, Slack, Zoom, MS Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp

- Automation & Docs:

- ChatGPT, Zapier, Google Docs, Canva, Microsoft Office, WordPress



Bonus Tools:

- PriceLabs or other pricing platforms





What You’ll Get:



- Full-time role – 40 hrs/week (AEST-aligned)

- Structured roster – 7-day operation with rotating shifts

- You’ll work one or both weekend days

- Always two consecutive days off each week

- Paid training & onboarding

- Direct mentorship from leadership

- Long-term career growth in a scaling business

- Exposure to end-to-end Australian STR operations



A role where initiative, ownership, and ideas are genuinely valued

title: RECRUITER (NON-IT) – REMOTE
description:
Overview



This position requires a recruiter who is comfortable conducting proactive outreach and cold contact with candidates via phone,
, and LinkedIn.



We are a boutique U.S.-based recruiting firm seeking an experienced Recruiter with a strong background particularly in professional and management roles (non-IT recruiting).



This role primarily supports our Construction Worldwide division, which focuses on recruiting construction management professionals and executive-level candidates. From time to time, recruiting may also include general corporate roles (G&A) such as accounting, HR, Sales or administrative professionals.



Remote full-time role with long-term potential for the right person, based on performance.



This role is ideal for a recruiter who is resourceful, proactive, and comfortable actively reaching out to candidates through multiple channels, including phone,
, and LinkedIn.

________________________________________



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Candidate Sourcing

Identify and engage qualified candidates for roles including:

• Construction Management

   (Project Managers, Project Engineers, Superintendents, 

   Estimators, Architects — no labor roles)

• Executive & Management positions

• Accounting & Finance

• Office & Administrative roles

• Human Resources

• Sales & Marketing

________________________________________



Candidate Research



• Identify and verify candidate contact information, including personal and work details

• Use online research and sourcing tools to locate potential candidates

• Maintain organized candidate records in our ATS/CRM system

• Document candidate interactions and recruiting activity

________________________________________



Candidate Outreach



• Conduct proactive outreach via: Phone, LinkedIn,

• Screen candidates to evaluate qualifications and interest

• Maintain clear notes and status updates within the ATS

Important:

This role requires a recruiter who is comfortable proactively contacting candidates both at their personal and professional contact points when appropriate.

________________________________________



Candidate Screening & Process Management



• Conduct initial candidate screening conversations

• Evaluate experience and overall fit for client roles

• Coordinate next steps in the recruiting process

• Assist with reference checks and candidate follow-up when needed

________________________________________



Future Scope



• Research potential companies and hiring managers

• Identify job opportunities for strong candidates

• Support recruiting efforts across additional divisions as needed

________________________________________



REQUIREMENTS



Experience

• Minimum of 5+ years of recruiting experience (agency recruiting preferred)

• Experience recruiting professional or management-level roles

• Experience using ATS/CRM systems (PCRecruiter preferred)

________________________________________



Skills



• Strong sourcing and candidate research abilities

• Advanced Boolean search skills

• Excellent spoken and written English 

• Strong phone presence and communication skills

• Ability to build rapport quickly with candidates

• Excellent organizational and documentation habits

• Ability to follow instructions carefully and consistently

• Self-motivated and able to work independently after training

________________________________________



Technical Skills



• LinkedIn and online sourcing platforms

• Google Docs

• MS Word / Excel

• MS Teams / Zoom or similar tools

• ATS / CRM systems

• Experience using contact finder tools



Preferred but not required:

• LinkedIn Recruiter access

________________________________________



Additional Requirements



• Excellent spoken and written English

• Typing speed 50+ WPM preferred

• Strong internet research skills

• Reliable high-speed internet connection

• Personal computer suitable for remote work



Highly valued:

• Experience recruiting construction management professionals

________________________________________



SCHEDULE



• Remote position

• Work hours aligned with U.S. Pacific Time (PST/PDT)

• Full-time

• 8+ hours per day

• Availability between 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PT

________________________________________

COMPENSATION



• Hourly pay: $3.50 – $7.00 per hour

  (approximately $600 – $1,200 per month, depending on hours and experience)



• Applicants should indicate their desired hourly rate

• Bonus opportunities may be available based on base compensation and performance

________________________________________



HOW TO APPLY



Please submit the following:

1. Resume including your LinkedIn profile

2. Roles you have recruited for in the past

        (industries, titles, locations, compensation ranges)

3. Sourcing methods and platforms you typically use

4. ATS/CRM systems you have worked with

5. Any sourcing tools you subscribe to

6. Your desired hourly rate (minimum and ideal)

7. Your availability (U.S. Pacific Time hours)

8. A short voice recording introducing yourself and sharing one recruiting success story

________________________________________

title: DATABASE RESEARCH SPECIALIST / CONTACT RESEARCHER (RECRUITING)
description:
DATABASE RESEARCH SPECIALIST / CONTACT RESEARCHER (RECRUITING)



Overview



We are a boutique U.S.-based recruiting firm seeking a highly detail-oriented Database Ninja / Contact Finder to help maintain and continuously improve the quality of our recruiting database.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys research, organization, and data accuracy, and who takes pride in keeping systems clean, structured, and duplicate-free.



This position may start part-time or full-time and may develop into a long-term role for the right person.

________________________________________



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



Your primary focus will be maintaining the quality and accuracy of our recruiting database.



Responsibilities include:



Database Management

• Identify and eliminate duplicate records

• Clean, organize, and maintain company and name records

• Ensure consistent formatting and data quality

• Maintain a highly organized and accurate database



Contact Research

• Research and verify candidate contact information including:

• personal phone numbers

• personal
 addresses

• work phone numbers

• work
 addresses



Online Research

• Use advanced search techniques to locate professionals online

• Utilize public sources and contact-finding tools to verify information

• Maintain clear notes and documentation in the ATS

________________________________________



REQUIREMENTS



Experience

• 5+ years of online research or database management experience

• Prior experience with recruiting databases or ATS/CRM systems

• Experience with contact-finding tools



Skills

• Exceptional attention to detail

• Strong online research and Boolean search skills

• Highly organized and process-driven

• Able to follow instructions precisely

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision



Technical Skills

• LinkedIn

• Contact-finder tools

• Google Docs

• MS Word / Excel

• MS Teams

• ATS / CRM systems (PCRecruiter preferred but not required)



Additional Requirements

• Fluent written and spoken English

• Typing speed 50+ WPM preferred

• Reliable internet connection

• Personal computer suitable for remote work

________________________________________



SCHEDULE

• Remote position

• U.S. time zone alignment preferred (PST/PDT)

• Work must occur between 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST

• Part-time or Full-time

• 4–8 hours per day

________________________________________



COMPENSATION

• $3.00 per hour (equivalent to $520 per month)

• Annual bonus based on company performance

• Long-term opportunity for strong performers

________________________________________



HOW TO APPLY

Please include:

1. Resume and/or LinkedIn profile

2. Brief description of your research or database experience

3. Tools you use to find contact information

4. ATS/CRM platforms you have used

5. Desired hourly rate (minimum and ideal)

6. Availability (hours per week and PST schedule)

________________________________________

title: Social Media Marketing Manager
description:
What you’ll do:

1.Run funnel pages: optimize bios, link pages, story highlights, and landing CTAs for conversion.  

2.Create and post daily short?form content (Reels, TikToks,
 short videos) tailored to each platform.  

3.Edit and repurpose clips into platform?native formats with strong hooks and captions.  

4.Manage DMs: triage messages, follow conversion scripts, escalate high?value leads, and maintain professional tone.  

5.Trend hunting: identify viral trends and adapt them to the creator’s brand while protecting account safety.  

6.A/B test hooks, captions, and posting times to improve reach and conversions.  

7. Report and iterate: deliver weekly performance summaries with clear recommendations and next steps.



Make sure to answer these questions as honestly as you can: 1. Do you have good Internet access? Do you have good wifi that doesn't cut out? Rate your Internet quality from 1-10

2. What computer will you use for this job tell me the make and model and what is the quality of it from 1-10 

3. Rate your English skills from 1-10 

4. Are you willing to manage the DM's of a models VIP page?

5. Are you able to work somewhere in between 8-12 hours a day everyday?

6. Are you able to watch a list of training videos and how do you deal with frustrating customers and subscribers?

7. Are you familiar with proxies? Are you able to get your own know how to use them? 

8. Are you able to learn new things quickly? 

9. Are you familiar and able to use 
, Snapchat and Reddit, Whatsapp?(But most importantly 
 and Reddit)

title: Property Operations Coordinator
description:
Remote Property Operations Coordinator (AU Short-Term Rentals)

Philippines-based | Full-time | AEST-aligned



Join One of Australia’s Largest Short-Term Rental Businesses



This is a rare long-term opportunity to work directly with one of Australia’s most established short-term rental operators — supporting a growing portfolio of up to 800 properties across NSW.



Staff Connect Australia is building a high-performing offshore team, and we’re looking for a proactive, detail-driven Property Operations Coordinator to become one of our foundational hires. If you’re sharp, confident on calls, and love problem-solving in a fast-paced environment, this role has serious growth potential.



You’ll be right at the heart of daily operations — handling bookings, guest and owner communications, issue resolution, and admin support — with exposure to every part of Australian short-term rental management.



What You’ll Be Doing



This is a hands-on, dynamic role. Your responsibilities will include:

- Guest & Owner Support

- Handle inbound and outbound calls with guests and property owners via Aircall

- Respond to enquiries and issues via Airbnb, 
, direct bookings

- Resolve problems efficiently and follow through to completion





Operations & Coordination

- Monitor bookings, availability, and calendars using Homhero, RMS, and other systems

- Coordinate cleaning schedules and ensure properties are guest-ready

- Assign and follow up maintenance tasks with trades or contractors

- Track cleans, maintenance, guest issues, and owner communications



Admin, Reporting & Growth

- Manage booking calendars, pricing, and blackout dates

- Assist with onboarding new properties and system setup

- Support compliance documentation (smoke alarms, council registration, etc.)

- Prepare weekly/monthly reports using spreadsheets or dashboards

- Help draft and improve SOPs, internal docs, and guest manuals

- Identify workflow gaps and suggest smarter processes or automations



As the business grows, your role will grow with it — including pricing, owner reporting, SOP ownership, and broader operational oversight.



Who We’re Looking For



You’re someone who:

- Is confident on the phone and professional with both guests and property owners

- Thrives in fast-paced, customer-facing environments

- Is organised, proactive, and solutions-focused

- Can juggle multiple tools and tasks without being micromanaged

- Takes ownership and actually cares about doing things properly



Skills & Experience



Required:

- Excellent spoken & written English

- Stable internet connection

- Confident handling phone calls

- Experience (or fast learning ability) with Aircall, Homhero

- Familiarity with Airbnb, 
, and direct booking sites

- Strong organisational & multitasking skills

- Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)



Preferred (but not mandatory)



- 2+ years in short-term rentals, property management, or admin support

- Experience working with Australian clients

- Exposure to cleaning teams or remote contractors



We’re open to candidates with less experience if you show initiative, strong communication skills, and the right mindset.



Tools You’ll Use

Core Systems:

- Homhero, RMS, Breezeway, Orana

- Comms & Support:

- Aircall, Slack, Zoom, MS Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp

- Automation & Docs:

- ChatGPT, Zapier, Google Docs, Canva, Microsoft Office, WordPress



Bonus Tools:

- PriceLabs or other pricing platforms





What You’ll Get:



- Full-time role – 40 hrs/week (AEST-aligned)

- Structured roster – 7-day operation with rotating shifts

- You’ll work one or both weekend days

- Always two consecutive days off each week

- Paid training & onboarding

- Direct mentorship from leadership

- Long-term career growth in a scaling business

- Exposure to end-to-end Australian STR operations



A role where initiative, ownership, and ideas are genuinely valued

title: Appointment Setter / Lead Generation Specialist (B2B)
description:
We are a boutique recruiting firm seeking an experienced B2B Appointment Setter / Lead Generation Specialist to help introduce companies to our recruitment services.



The primary focus will be supporting our construction recruiting division

Construction Worldwide. 



Your main objective is to connect with decision-makers, qualify interest, and schedule introductory meetings with the company president.



This is a remote role with long-term potential for the right person.



________________________________________



Responsibilities



• Call and
 companies from provided contact lists

• Identify the correct decision makers (owners, executives, HR leaders, etc.)

• Introduce our recruiting services and qualify potential hiring needs

• Schedule introductory meetings with the president

• Conduct LinkedIn outreach when appropriate

• Perform light research to identify additional contacts within companies

• Maintain organized notes on all outreach activities



________________________________________

Ideal Background



• 5+ years successful experience in one or more of the following:

• B2B appointment setting

• telesales / inside sales

• lead generation

• recruitment industry sales

• Experience selling professional services is a strong plus

• Experience within construction or recruiting industry is highly valued



________________________________________



Requirements



• Excellent spoken and written English

• Strong phone presence and communication skills

• Ability to follow instructions precisely and consistently

• Self-motivated and able to work independently after training

• Strong research and internet skills

• Comfortable with outreach via phone,
, and LinkedIn

• Advanced computer skills (CRM / cloud tools / Google Voice / Google Docs / Teams / Zoom etc.)

• Stable internet connection and own computer

• Access to contact finder tools (free or paid versions acceptable)



________________________________________



Schedule



• Full-time preferred

• 8 hours per day, must be consistently available during work hours

• Work must occur between 6:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST



________________________________________



Compensation



• Hourly pay: $3.50 – $7.00 per hour = $600 – $1,200 per month / DOE )

• Applicants should indicate their desired hourly rate

• Bonus opportunities may be available based on base compensation and results.



________________________________________



Application Instructions



Please include the following with your application:

• Resume and LinkedIn profile (send an invitation and a message to my profile at isabellas)

• Short summary of your B2B sales / appointment-setting experience

• Desired hourly rate

• Your availability within PST hours

• A voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you are a good fit

________________________________________

title: Customer Experience & Operations Associate (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote | Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: E-commerce Customer Support VA (Long-Term)
description:
We are a growing automotive e-commerce brand looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant for customer support.



Your role will be to handle daily customer messages and help keep operations running smoothly.



Tasks:



* Respond to customer messages (TikTok Shop, Shopify, eBay)

* Track orders and update customers on delivery status

* Handle basic refunds/replacements (training provided)

* Assist with order issues and address corrections



Requirements:



* Good written English

* Fast response time

* Organized and detail-oriented

* Able to follow instructions



This is a long-term position with room to grow.



To apply:



1. Start your application with the word “Trackhawk”. 

2. A customer says: “My order hasn’t arrived after 5 days.” What would you reply?

3. A customer says: “This product doesn’t work.” What would you reply?

PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

 setup, organization, and moderation

What We Are Looking For

)

 and online community management

 communities

s, and online engagement

 bots, simple scripts, automation tools) that can support workflow or community features



Work Setup

This role has the potential to transition into a longer-term position based on performance and team fit.



Compensation

title: IT & Systems Administrator
description:
Apply through the below link: 



About the Company

We are a California-based company operating in the environmental health and safety (EHS) industry. With over 35 years in business, we are a stable, established organization that values consistency, clear processes, and the people who keep things running well behind the scenes.





Schedule Note

This role follows California business hours (PST/PDT), which means your shift will be approximately 1:00 AM – 10:00 AM Philippine time (shifting to 2:00 AM – 11:00 AM during daylight saving). Weekends are always off. The schedule is fixed and predictable — no rotating shifts, no surprise overtime.

We're upfront about this because it's a real consideration. If you've worked a graveyard shift before and found it suits your lifestyle, this role offers the stability and long-term security that makes it worthwhile.





About the Role

We're looking for a careful, methodical tech generalist to own our digital operations day-to-day. This is a stable, long-term role with a clear scope — not a chaotic environment where priorities change hourly.

You'll manage the platforms our team relies on, build automations that actually last, document everything you learn, and troubleshoot issues with patience and precision. Most work is independent; you'll have a senior tech lead to collaborate with on bigger initiatives but won't need constant supervision.





What You'll Own

•    Systems & Platforms — Become the resident expert on our core tools: Microsoft 365 (Teams, SharePoint, Power Automate), WordPress, HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, FileMaker, and Dialpad. Handle configurations, updates, and improvements with attention to detail.

•    Automation — Identify repetitive processes and build reliable, well-documented automations that the team will actually use long-term.

•    Documentation — Write SOPs, troubleshooting guides, and process docs. Record training videos. Build the knowledge base that keeps operations consistent.

•    Tech Support & Troubleshooting — Diagnose real problems at the root level — not just surface symptoms — and guide teammates to lasting solutions via chat, call, or screen share.

•    Infrastructure & Systems Management — Maintain and monitor the underlying systems, networks, and environments that keep operations running reliably.

•    Security & Access — Manage user accounts, permissions, and passwords. Keep systems organized before issues arise.







What We're Looking For

•    You learn tools deeply — real expertise, not surface familiarity

•    Documentation comes naturally to you; it's how you ensure quality

•    You work well independently with a defined scope and clear direction

•    You're methodical: you'd rather fully understand a problem than rush a fix

•    You troubleshoot systematically — you trace problems to their root cause, not just the surface symptom

•    You have hands-on experience with tech infrastructure — networks, systems, user environments, or cloud-based setups

•    Stable, predictable work — even at odd hours — suits you better than daytime chaos



Why This Role Stands Out

•    Fixed schedule — same hours every day, no rotating shifts

•    Weekends always off — no exceptions

•    Long-term stability — permanent role, not project-based

•    160 hours/month — full-time, consistent workload

•    Deep ownership — you'll go deep on our systems, not bounce between tasks

•    Calm environment — established team, defined processes, no daily fire drills







Benefits

•    Paid leaves — we provide paid time off so you can rest and recharge without worrying about lost income

•    Paid California public holidays — you will be paid on all California public holidays

•    Stable, long-term engagement — this is not a project-based or contractual role; we're looking for someone to grow with us







Minimum Requirements

•    Bachelor's degree in any field (4-year course), preferably IT, Computer Science, or a related discipline

•    At least 2 years of experience in tech support, IT administration, or infrastructure management

•    Proven troubleshooting experience — hardware, software, network, or systems level

•    Solid Microsoft 365 experience (Teams, SharePoint, Power Automate)

•    Ability to work California business hours (graveyard shift, PH time)





Bonus Points

•    Experience with HubSpot, ActiveCampaign, WordPress, FileMaker, or Dialpad

•    Background in network administration, cloud infrastructure, or endpoint management

•    Experience with process documentation or SOP writing

•    Prior experience in a remote, US-based work setup







How to Apply

Submit a cover letter (300–500 words) addressing the following:

1.    Describe a tech infrastructure or systems problem you troubleshot — what was the issue, how did you diagnose it, and what was the outcome

2.    Walk us through a platform or system you managed and maintained — what tools were involved and how did you ensure it ran reliably

3.    Share an example where your documentation or SOPs made a real difference to a team or process

4.    Describe how you have handled security and access management — how do you manage user accounts, permissions, and passwords, and what does your workflow look like when onboarding or offboarding a user

5.    Walk us through how you approach tech infrastructure — how do you monitor, maintain, and flag issues before they become problems

6.    Why this role appeals to you, and confirm whether you are comfortable working California business hours (graveyard shift, PH time)



Attach your resume along with your cover letter. We review both, but we're more interested in how you think and work than in job titles.

title: HR & Talent Operations Manager
description:
**HR & Recruitment Coordinator (People-First, High-Impact Role)**



We’re looking for a sharp, people-first **HR & Recruitment Coordinator** who is technically savvy, highly organized, and ready to take ownership from day one.



This is not a placeholder role — we’re building something real, and we need someone who wants to grow with it.



## **WHAT THIS ROLE OWNS**



**Recruitment (50%)**

* Support and execute recruitment processes — sourcing, screening, and coordinating interviews

* Work closely with leadership to identify and attract **high-quality candidates**

* Maintain an organized and efficient candidate pipeline

* Ensure a strong candidate experience from first touchpoint to onboarding



**Client & Growth Support (25%)**



* Assist in identifying and organizing potential client or candidate opportunities

* Support outreach coordination and follow-ups (non-sales focused)

* Help maintain internal tracking systems and pipelines

* Ensure smooth coordination between recruitment efforts and business needs



**Operations & HR Support (25%)**



* Support onboarding processes to ensure new hires are set up for success

* Assist with offboarding and transitions when needed

* Maintain HR documentation, contracts, and internal systems (Notion)

* Help track team compliance and internal processes

* Support day-to-day operational needs as the company grows



**YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:**



* Have solid HR or recruitment experience and understand people, process, and accountability

* Are strong at sourcing and identifying the **right candidates, not just filling roles**

* Are highly proficient in **Notion** and enjoy organizing systems

* Have experience with **AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT)** and are eager to use them to work smarter

* Are technically savvy and quick to learn new tools

* Communicate proactively — you update before being asked

* Can handle sensitive situations with professionalism and discretion

* Thrive in a fast-moving, high-standard environment

* Genuinely care about people and team culture



**THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF YOU:**



* Need constant direction to move forward

* Struggle in fast-paced or evolving environments

* View HR as purely administrative

* Are looking for a short-term or side role



**TO APPLY**

Send your resume + a short 1–2 minute introduction.

We move fast — if you’re the right fit, you’ll know quickly.

title: Creator Outreach Specialist (Instagram DM — High Volume)
description:
Are you fast, organized, and great at finding the right people on Instagram — then starting real conversations with them?

We're hiring a full-time Creator Outreach Specialist to find and recruit UGC creators and micro-influencers for our DTC brand's affiliate program.

This is not a "send 10 messages a day" role.

You will be reaching out to 50+ creators per day with personalized DMs from our brand's Instagram account — and managing all replies until they're qualified and ready for onboarding.

If you're sharp at social media research, comfortable with high outreach volume, and can hold natural conversations in DMs — read on.

What You'll Be Doing



Research and identify creators on Instagram who match our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)

We will provide you with the exact ICP criteria — your job is to find creators who match it

Manually send personalized DMs from the brand's Instagram account (no bots, no automation tools)

Handle all replies: answer questions about the program, build interest, qualify fit

Log every contacted creator in Go High Level (CRM) with tags and status updates

Move creators through GHL pipeline stages as conversations progress:



Prospecting ? Contacted ? Replied ? Interested ? Ready to go





Run follow-up sequences on non-responders (1 follow-up DM after 3–5 days)

Keep a clean, up-to-date pipeline so our onboarding team knows exactly who is ready



Output Expectations (Very Important)

This role requires high daily output.

You should be comfortable delivering approximately:



50+ personalized creator outreach DMs per day

Managing 100+ active conversations in various stages at any time

Updating GHL pipeline statuses daily — no backlog, no missed contacts

Maintaining a 90%+ logging accuracy (every contact must be in GHL)



You must be:



Fast

Organized

Able to juggle high volume without dropping conversations



We are scaling — and speed matters.

Must-Have Skills



Strong Instagram research skills:



Finding creators by niche, hashtag, content style, engagement patterns

Quickly assessing follower quality (spotting fake followers, low engagement)

Understanding what "good content" looks like for product-based brands





Excellent English writing for DMs:



Natural, conversational tone — not robotic or salesy

Ability to personalize messages by referencing the creator's actual content

Comfortable handling objections and questions in a friendly way





CRM experience:



Familiar with pipeline-based CRMs (Go High Level preferred, but HubSpot, Pipedrive, or similar is fine)

Comfortable with tagging, status updates, and contact management





Self-management:



You track your own progress

You flag issues before they become problems

You don't need to be reminded to update the CRM







Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience with influencer or creator outreach

Familiarity with DTC/e-commerce brands and UGC

Previous work with Go High Level specifically

Understanding of affiliate programs or performance marketing

Experience working with Scandinavian or European brands



Who You Are



You're a people person who can start conversations with strangers naturally

You move fast but don't sacrifice quality for speed

You're detail-oriented — every contact is logged, every status is updated

You can work independently without daily check-ins

You're reliable, show up on time, and communicate proactively

You understand that this is a volume role — and you thrive in that environment



Important Note

You will NOT be handling contracts, product shipments, or any technical setup.

Your job ends when you move a qualified, interested creator to the "Ready to go" status in GHL.

From there, our onboarding team takes over.

Your entire focus is: find the right creators, start the conversation, qualify them, and hand them off ready.

Job Details



Hours: 30–40 hrs/week (negotiable)

title: Creator Onboarding & Affiliate Coordinator (CRM + Shopify)
description:
Are you detail-oriented, process-driven, and comfortable managing multiple tools to onboard creators into a brand's affiliate program?

We're hiring a Creator Onboarding Coordinator to manage the full post-qualification pipeline — from sending contracts to getting creators fully set up and active in our affiliate system.

This is not a creative role. This is an operations role.

You will be managing contracts, setting up affiliate profiles, coordinating product shipments, and confirming Meta Partnership Ads access — all while keeping the CRM pipeline clean and up to date.

If you're the type of person who loves checklists, follows up relentlessly, and never lets a ball drop — read on.

What You'll Be Doing



Monitor the Go High Level (GHL) pipeline for creators who reach "Ready to go" status

These creators have already been qualified by our outreach team — your job starts here

Manage contract delivery:



Contracts are auto-sent via GHL/PandaDoc when status changes

You follow up on unsigned contracts (48h reminder, then personal follow-up)

Answer any questions creators have about the contract terms

Confirm contract is signed and move GHL status forward





Set up creators in UpPromote (Shopify affiliate app):



Add creator to the affiliate program

Ensure unique affiliate/discount code is generated

Send creator their portal login and code





Coordinate product delivery:



Ship product to creator OR confirm they used their discount code to self-purchase

Track shipment and confirm receipt

Update GHL status at each step





Handle Meta Partnership Ads (whitelisting) setup:



Send the Partnership Ads request from our Meta Ads Manager

Guide the creator through accepting the request in their Instagram app

Confirm access is live in Ads Manager





Send content brief once the creator has received the product and whitelisting is confirmed

Move creator to "Active" status — handoff to our ad ops/creative team



Output Expectations (Very Important)

This role requires careful pipeline management, not speed.

You should be comfortable managing:



15–25 creators in active onboarding at any given time

Processing 5–10 new "Ready to go" creators per week

Daily pipeline review — no creator should sit in a status for more than 48h without action

100% follow-through — every creator who signs a contract must reach "Active" status



You must be:



Thorough

Organized

Relentless with follow-ups

Comfortable managing multiple tools simultaneously



If something is stuck, you flag it. You don't wait.

Must-Have Skills



CRM management:



Comfortable with pipeline-based CRMs (Go High Level preferred, but similar tools work)

Tagging, status updates, follow-up scheduling, contact notes





Shopify basics:



Navigating Shopify admin to manage affiliate app (UpPromote)

Processing or confirming orders

You don't need to be a Shopify developer — just comfortable in the admin panel





Contract/document management:



Experience with PandaDoc, DocuSign, or similar e-signature tools

Following up on unsigned documents without being pushy





Clear written communication:



Professional, friendly English for creator-facing messages

Ability to explain simple technical steps (e.g., "how to accept Partnership Ads in Instagram")





Process management:



You can manage a checklist of 5–6 steps per creator without missing any

You keep clean notes in the CRM

You escalate issues before they become blockers







Bonus (Nice to Have)



Experience with affiliate marketing platforms (UpPromote, Refersion, GoAffPro, etc.)

Familiarity with Meta Business Manager or Ads Manager

Understanding of influencer/creator onboarding workflows

Previous work in DTC or e-commerce operations

Experience with Go High Level specifically



Who You Are



You're a natural operator — you love systems and processes

You're the person who follows up when others forget

You can manage 5 different tools without getting confused about what goes where

You communicate clearly when something is blocked or needs attention

You're reliable, consistent, and take ownership of your pipeline

You understand that your job is to get creators from "interested" to "active" with zero drop-off



Job Details



Hours: 20–30 hrs/week (negotiable, may increase as volume grows)

Long-term position

Fully remote

Payment: Monthly salary (based on experience)



How to Apply (Important)

???? Apply only via OnlineJobs.ph

When applying, you MUST include:



A short description of any operations, onboarding, or CRM management work you've done before

Any experience with Shopify, affiliate platforms, or contract management tools

Your expected monthly salary

Your availability (hours/week + timezone)



???? Subject line:

title: Paid Media Specialist
description:
About the Role



As a Paid Media Specialist (Meta Ads), you will act as the execution engine behind our paid social channel across multiple high-volume, design-led brands.



This is a hands-on, platform-focused role where you will be responsible for building, launching, and maintaining Meta ad campaigns with a high level of precision and consistency. You will work closely with the Senior Marketing Manager and Head of Performance Marketing, translating fully briefed creative assets into clean, structured, and correctly configured campaigns.



This role is best suited for someone who thrives in execution-focused work, values accuracy, and is confident operating inside Meta Ads Manager on a daily basis.





Key Responsibilities

Campaign Building



Build campaigns, ad sets, and ads using fully briefed creative assets

Configure all campaign elements accurately, including objectives, audiences, placements, budgets, schedules, and tracking

Use AI tools to generate on-brand ad copy (headlines, descriptions, and CTAs)

Apply strict naming conventions consistently across all accounts and funnel stages (TOFU, MOFU, BOFU)

Publish campaigns and confirm successful launch with the Senior Marketing Manager

Identify and flag any asset specification issues, disapprovals, or delivery concerns immediately

Ensure all builds are accurate and require no rework

Budget Adjustments & Campaign Maintenance



Execute budget changes, reallocations, and optimizations as directed by the Head of Performance Marketing

Pause, activate, and duplicate campaigns, ad sets, or ads as instructed

Implement adjustments to placements, schedules, or audiences when required

Monitor campaign delivery and flag any irregularities such as spend drops, disapprovals, or account-level alerts

Platform Hygiene & Quality Assurance



Perform daily account health checks across all ad accounts

Maintain clean and structured campaign architecture (no duplication, misconfigurations, or orphaned assets)

Ensure pixel tracking and UTM parameters are correctly implemented on all campaigns

Enforce strict naming conventions across all builds

Provide regular updates or summaries to the Senior Marketing Manager via Slack 



Other Responsibilities



Complete additional tasks and platform-related requests as assigned

Maintain accuracy and attention to detail across all campaign builds and updates

Communicate proactively when issues, blockers, or uncertainties arise

Contribute to maintaining a structured, efficient, and high-performing ad account environment





About You



Minimum of 3 years’ hands-on experience using Meta Ads Manager on a daily basis

Strong experience managing multiple ad accounts or brands simultaneously

Deep understanding of campaign setup, including objectives, audiences, placements, and budget optimisation

Highly detail-oriented with a strong focus on accuracy, naming conventions, and tracking setup

Able to execute quickly while maintaining a high standard of work

Comfortable working as an execution-focused tea
mber, following clear direction

Strong communication skills with the ability to raise issues and ask clarifying questions when needed

Experience in e-commerce or home, renovation, or lifestyle brands is an advantage





Finer Details

Schedule: Part-time (1 day per week / 8 hours)

Start Date: TBD

title: Lead STR Operations VA
description:
Lead STR Operations VA



Senior-level only — not a beginner role



$6–$8/hr USD

Senior / Lead level

Remote — Philippines

3–4 days/week · 12-hr shifts

Biweekly pay · Long-term

ABOUT THIS ROLE



We manage 11 active short-term rental properties across Tennessee and Florida, with a 12th coming in Kentucky. We are hiring a senior-level STR Operations VA to become the lead operational support person across the entire portfolio.



This is not a basic guest messaging role, and it is not a role for someone who simply follows scripts. We need someone who is highly organized, calm under pressure, strong at problem solving, able to build and improve systems, detail-oriented enough to catch mistakes before owners or guests do, and flexible enough to work within owner preferences and property-specific exceptions.



This person will be my right-hand operator. Over time, the right person should be capable of helping train and onboard another VA, with operations eventually flowing through them.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



You may be a fit if you:



Have 3+ years of hands-on Airbnb / STR operations experience

Have worked in a lead VA, senior support, QA, trainer, or operations role

Have directly managed cleaners, maintenance, vendors, and guest escalations

Can identify what needs to be verified before acting — not after

Can solve problems quickly and communicate clearly under pressure

Are comfortable calling vendors, cleaners, or guests when needed

Want a long-term role with growth and leadership opportunity

Can recommend improvements without forcing your own style on a client

THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR

Beginners or entry-level VAs

Script-only Airbnb agents who do not understand context

People who need constant step-by-step direction

People who are reactive but not organized

People who think there is only one right way to run STRs

People who override owner preferences instead of learning how the client wants things done



We are looking for someone who can bring structure, judgment, and leadership — without a my way or the highway mindset.



WHAT THIS ROLE INCLUDES

Guest messaging and issue resolution across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct bookings

Verifying door codes match guest reservations and Schlage is correctly configured for every check-in

Camera monitoring at check-in and during stays — verifying guest count and flagging violations

Managing cleaner communication, day-before reminders, and photo review after each turnover

Coordinating maintenance, vendor follow-up, and urgent issues

Daily use of OwnerRez, Hospitable, Turno, Schlage, Slack, and OpenPhone

Supporting operational dashboards, trackers, and follow-up systems

Creating, updating, and improving SOPs over time

Acting as senior operations partner — eventually helping train and onboard future VAs

PLATFORMS AND TOOLS

Airbnb

VRBO

OwnerRez

Hospitable

Turno

Schlage

Slack

OpenPhone

WhatsApp

PriceLabs

Safely

Baselane

SCHEDULE AND COMPENSATION



Wed-Sat 11-7:30p

Sunday 8a-4:30p

Pay is $6–$8/hr USD based on experience. This is a long-term role with growth potential.



IMPORTANT NOTE ABOUT THIS CLIENT



This client is detail-heavy and particular. Some properties have unique rules, quirks, and exceptions. We need someone who can build structure, stay organized, make thoughtful recommendations, respect client preferences, and avoid assuming every property should be run exactly the same way. Strong opinions are welcome. Rigidity is not.



HOW TO APPLY



Begin your application with this exact phrase: I understand this is a senior STR operations role. Applications that do not include this phrase will not be reviewed.



Please answer all of the following:



1. Describe your STR / Airbnb experience



Years of experience · number of properties · your exact role · platforms used



2. Describe a time you inherited a messy or disorganized STR setup



What was wrong · what you fixed first · how you improved it



3. Describe a time you worked with an owner whose preferences differed from how you would personally run things



How you handled it · how you balanced best practices with client expectations



4. Describe a guest issue that required coordinating with a cleaner, maintenance person, or vendor



What happened · what you did · what the outcome was



5. What kind of long-term role are you looking for, and what does growth mean to you?



VOICE SAMPLE REQUIRED



Because this role requires calling vendors and speaking with guests, a 60–90 second voice sample is required. Please record yourself answering: "Describe a guest issue you handled that required calling a cleaner or maintenance person. What was the problem, how did you handle the call, and what was the outcome?" Requirements: clear professional English, calm and confident tone, no background noise. Upload as an audio file or share a private link (Google Drive, Loom, or similar). Applications without a voice sample will not be considered.

title: Operations Manager
description:
Zoft Clean, A US cleaning company is seeking a highly driven administrative professional to remotely manage their operations. The Operations Manager oversees the day-to-day operations of the cleaning business, ensuring all cleaning services are delivered to clients according to contract specifications, managing staff schedules, maintaining quality standards, resolving client concerns, and optimizing operational efficiency by controlling costs and ensuring proper resource allocation across all cleaning sites.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Staff Management:

• Recruit, hire, and train new cleaning staff.

• Assign cleaning tasks to staff based on skillsets and client requirements.

• Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to staff.

• Manage employee schedules, timekeeping and payroll

• Address employee concerns and disciplinary issues.

• Client Management:

• Build and maintain relationships with clients.

• Investigate i
, document complaints and address customers complaints promptly

• Ensure client contracts are adhered to and service standards are met.

• Carry out periodic Customer Satisfaction Survey to ensure customer’s expectations are being met and address any issues.

• Administrative Work

• Work with the Lead Cleaner to generate and submit a Cleaning Proposal

• Operational Oversight:

• Develop and implement cleaning procedures and quality control standards.

• Monitor cleaning performance at all assigned sites through regular inspections.

• Manage cleaning supply inventory and equipment maintenance.

• Optimize cleaning routes and schedules to maximize efficiency.

• Identify and address operational challenges and implement improvements.

• Contract Sourcing

• Source for new business by calling leads and sending cold e-mails.

• Bid on cleaning contracts on both government and private contract sourcing platforms

• Financial Management:

• Prepare and manage cleaning budgets.

• Track cleaning costs and identify areas for cost reduction.

• Analyze financial reports to assess operational performance.

• Compliance:

• Ensure adherence to all safety regulations and workplace standards.

• Maintain necessary documentation regarding cleaning activities and employee records.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:



• Minimum of 3 years’ experience in any managerial role

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Detail-oriented with a focus on quality control

• Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines

• Basic computer proficiency for data entry and reporting

• Knowledge of cleaning chemicals and equipment

• Experience in the commercial cleaning industry preferred

description:

title: Technical Integrator / Funnel Builder (ClickFunnels / GoHighLevel)

 automations based on user behavior (ActiveCampaign or similar)

title: Inside Sales Representative
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing Career Consulting Firm dedicated to helping professionals advance their careers through strategic coaching, resume optimization, and job search support.

We’re looking for a high-energy, consultative Inside Sales Representative who thrives on connecting with people, uncovering their career goals, and guiding them toward solutions that create real impact.

This is not just a transactional sales role—you’ll act as a trusted advisor, helping clients invest in their future. If you’re driven by results, confident in closing, and motivated by uncapped earning potential, this role is for you.

________________________________________

What You’ll Do (Key Responsibilities)

1. Lead Conversion & Sales Execution

• Engage inbound and outbound leads via phone,
, SMS, and virtual consultations 

• Conduct discovery calls to understand client career challenges, goals, and urgency 

• Present tailored consulting solutions and confidently close high-value service packages 

• Overcome objections using a consultative, value-based sales approach 

2. Relationship Building & Client Trust

• Build rapport quickly and establish credibility as a career partner 

• Follow up consistently to nurture leads through the sales funnel 

• Deliver a high-quality, professional experience that reflects our brand 

3. Pipeline & CRM Management

• Manage a high volume of leads and opportunities simultaneously 

• Track all interactions, notes, and deal stages in CRM systems 

• Maintain accurate forecasting and pipeline visibility 

4. Performance & KPI Ownership

• Consistently meet or exceed daily, weekly, and monthly sales targets 

• Track key metrics such as conversion rate, call volume, and revenue generated 

• Continuously refine your sales approach based on performance insights 

5. Continuous Improvement & Tools

• Leverage modern tools (CRM, automation, and AI platforms) to improve efficiency 

• Stay updated on industry trends in recruiting, job search strategies, and career coaching 

• Participate in training, roleplays, and team strategy sessions 

________________________________________

What We’re Looking For (Qualifications)

Core Skills

• Exceptional spoken and written English with a neutral or professional accent 

• Strong phone presence with confidence in leading conversations 

• Proven experience in closing sales (preferably high-ticket or service-based) 

Sales Mindset

• Consultative selling skills (needs discovery, objection handling, closing) 

• Goal-oriented with a track record of hitting or exceeding quotas 

• Resilient, persistent, and comfortable handling rejection 

Technical & Organizational

• Experience with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, or similar) 

• Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage a fast-moving pipeline 

• Familiarity with or willingness to learn AI tools and sales automation platforms 

Personality Traits

• Self-starter with high accountability 

• Coachable and open to feedback 

• Empathetic listener who can connect with clients on a personal level 

• Competitive, driven, and motivated by performance-based rewards 

________________________________________

Compensation & Growth

• Base Salary: ?25,000 PHP/month 

• Uncapped commission structure (high earning potential) 

• Performance bonuses and incentives 

• Top performers can earn ?80,000 – ?120,000+ PHP/month 

• Opportunity for full-time conversion after 2 months, including benefits and career advancement 

________________________________________

Why Join Us?

• Be part of a mission-driven company helping people transform their careers 

• Work in a fast-paced, high-growth sales environment 

• Access to modern sales tools, automation, and AI systems 

• Clear path for advancement into senior sales or leadership roles 

• Collaborative, supportive, and performance-focused team culture 

________________________________________

Who This Role is Perfect For

• Sales professionals who love closing and earning commission 

• Individuals passionate about helping others succeed professionally 

• Remote workers who thrive in a metrics-driven environment 

• Candidates looking for rapid growth and long-term opportunity 

________________________________________

Ready to Apply?

If you’re a confident closer who can turn conversations into conversions and wants to grow in a high-impact sales role, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
**VA POSITION — SPANISH-BILINGUAL OPERATIONS ASSOCIATE**

Apex Health Holdings LLC | Remote (Philippines) | Arizona Hours



We're hiring a Spanish-bilingual VA to support our Arizona healthcare operations. This is a full-time remote role built for someone who's done this before, works clean, and doesn't need hand-holding.



**SCHEDULE**

6:00 AM – 2:00 PM Arizona Time (MST, no daylight saving). That's 9:00 PM – 5:00 AM PHT. This is a fixed overnight shift — apply only if you can commit to it.



**WHAT YOU'LL DO**

- Spanish-language intake calls and family communication (bilingual, professional level)

- Outreach to agencies, DSP candidates, and referral contacts

- Credentialing support — collecting documents, tracking expirations, AHCCCS compliance

- Scheduling across multiple service lines (GoHighLevel CRM)

- Billing entry, authorization verification, and AR tracking

- Weekly ops reports and inbox management for the principal



**WHAT WE NEED**

- Professional Spanish AND English — both written and spoken. You will be screened.

- 2+ years VA experience with a US-based employer

- Healthcare, IDD, DSP staffing, or behavioral health background strongly preferred

- GoHighLevel CRM experience a plus

- Google Workspace, Excel, Zoom — standard



**PAY**

Base: $200–$400 USD/month depending on experience

Bonus: Performance bonus paid monthly based on KPI achievement — outreach volume, credentialing completion, billing timeliness, and report delivery. Top performers earning at 95%+ of KPIs qualify for the maximum bonus tier. Details provided at offer.



**SCREENING PROCESS**

Written translation test (English ? Spanish, healthcare context) ? Live Zoom mock intake call in Spanish ? CRM task demo ? Reference check



**TO APPLY**

Send your resume, a brief intro in both English and Spanish, and your OnlineJobs.ph or 
 profile link. Applications without a Spanish writing sample will not be reviewed.



---



Serious applicants only. This role has real KPIs, real expectations, and real upside if you perform.

title: Homeowners Insurance Quote Assistant VA (Detail-Oriented, Fast Learner)
description:
Job Overview



We are a growing U.S.-based insurance agency looking for a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support our Quote & Bind team.



Your primary role will be to assist in preparing and processing homeowners insurance quotes, ensuring all property details are accurate before quotes are finalized.



This is a critical role — accuracy and attention to detail are extremely important.



You will be working closely with our senior quoting specialist and helping us increase speed without sacrificing quality.



Responsibilities



• Review property details (square footage, year built, roof, foundation, etc.)

• Cross-check property data using tools like Zillow and property reports

• Assist with entering data into insurance carrier systems

• Verify quote accuracy before submission

• Flag missing or inconsistent information

• Help prepare quotes for final review and binding

• Maintain organized notes in our CRM

• Support the Quote & Bind team with daily workload



What This Role Is NOT



Not customer service

Not cold calling

Not basic admin work



This role is about:

Accuracy, speed, and attention to detail



Requirements



• Strong attention to detail (very important)

• Ability to follow processes and checklists

• Good written English

• Fast learner and coachable

• Organized and reliable

• Comfortable working with data and systems

• Stable internet and quiet workspace



Preferred (but not required)



• Experience in insurance, real estate, or mortgages

• Experience with data entry or quality control

• Experience using CRMs or web-based platforms



Work Schedule



Part-time to start

4–6 hours per day (U.S. business hours)



Opportunity to grow to full-time based on performance.



Compensation



Hourly pay based on experience

Opportunity for increased hours and long-term growth



What Success Looks Like



• Quotes are processed quickly and accurately

• Fewer errors and missed details

• Senior tea
mbers can work faster because of your support





How to Apply



To apply, please include the following directly in your reply (do not only attach a resume or send a link):



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with detail-oriented work

Your internet speed test

Your availability



Important:

Please write your answers directly in your application message. You may attach your resume if you’d like, but applications with only attachments or links and no written responses will not be considered.



To confirm you read this post, please start your application with the word “Accurate”
