title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
Job Description:

We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented video editor to help create high-quality, engaging videos. The ideal candidate should have experience working with raw footage from phone recordings and be able to enhance content through expert editing, seamless transitions, and creative additions.



What You'll Do:

1. Tailored Workflow & Enhanced Quality: Optimize raw footage with noise reduction, audio leveling, and effects to elevate overall content quality.

2. Precise Editing & Efficiency: Edit and enhance videos while ensuring quick turnaround times without compromising quality.

3. Professional Video Editing: Deliver precise and creative edits to match the project’s needs.

4. Post-Production: Provide comprehensive post-production services to ensure polished, professional results.

5. Color Correction: Apply color grading and correction to enhance the visual appeal of videos.

6. Sound Design: Add background music, improve audio quality, and create an immersive audio experience.

7. Creative Storytelling: Make decisions on where to insert B-rolls, animations, zoom transitions, and graphics to make videos more engaging.

8. Subtitles & Captions: Add subtitles for accessibility and engagement.

9. Organizing Clips & Footage: Structure videos from beginning to end with a seamless flow.

10. Transitions & Video Effects: Implement smooth transitions and effects for a professional touch.

11. Intro & Outro: Create engaging intros and outros to enhance brand identity.

12. Multiple Revisions: Open to feedback and revisions to achieve the desired final product.



Ideal Candidate:



- Experienced in editing phone-recorded content

- Creative and detail-oriented

- Understands sound design and background music selection

- Proficient in color grading and correction

- Skilled in using professional video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, etc.)

- Efficient and deadline-driven



If you're passionate about video editing and can transform raw footage into engaging, high-quality content, we'd love to hear from you!



To apply, please send:

1. Examples of past video editing work

2. Are you willing to sign an NDA before getting the materials to edit?

3. Your typical turnaround time for a 3-5 minute video

4. Are you willing to create a short sample? We will provide raw footage for the test.

title: Amazon Compliance Specialist
description:
Regulatory & Legal Compliance



Conduct in-depth research on FDA, EPA, FTC, and other relevant federal and state regulations.

Ensure compliance with international product safety standards (EU, UK, Canada, Asia-Pacific) when applicable.

Perform ongoing monitoring of regulatory updates and interpret implications for product categories.

Support intellectual property due diligence to prevent patent, copyright, or trademark infringement.



Risk Management & Product Compliance



Evaluate new and existing products for compliance risks and advise stakeholders on mitigation strategies.

Develop compliance testing protocols and coordinate with third-party labs and certification agencies.

Manage corrective actions, recalls, or withdrawals in alignment with Amazon’s policies and legal requirements.

Conduct audits of product listings and seller submissions to prevent unlawful or restricted product selection.



Cross-Functional Collaboration



Partner with Product Development, Supply Chain, and Seller Performance teams to execute compliance initiatives.

Provide clear guidance to vendors, suppliers, and internal teams on compliance requirements.

Train cross-functional stakeholders on compliance best practices and emerging regulatory risks.

Act as a subject matter expert to business teams during product launches, regulatory reviews, and inspections.



Policy & Process Development



Draft and implement compliance procedures, standard operating protocols (SOPs), and escalation processes.

Support automation and system-based compliance controls to scale monitoring and enforcement.

Contribute to internal policy development regarding restricted products, product claims, and safety certifications.

Continuously improve workflows to enhance accuracy, timeliness, and audit readiness.



Documentation & Reporting



Maintain accurate records of compliance assessments, approvals, and regulatory correspondence.

Prepare detailed reports and risk assessments for leadership review.

Provide supervisors with regular feedback on task progress, emerging risks, and resolution status.

Ensure confidentiality of sensitive data, supplier information, and Amazon business strategy.





Experience interacting directly with regulators including federal and state agencies

Experience in research and analyzing federal and state regulations

Familiarity and experience in dealing with FDA regulation is REQUIRED

Familiarity with international compliance frameworks (REACH, RoHS, CE marking).

Experience in compliance auditing, regulatory affairs, or legal review.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills for engaging with global teams and regulators.

Ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced environment with strict deadline

title: Amazon R&D Specialist
description:
DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES



Responsible for the end-to-end process of creating or enhancing products encompassing design, testing, and launch phases

Determine product specifications according to a number of various factors and uses

Research and development projects in the health, wellness, and medical product space.

Design, develop, and fabricate equipment, prototypes for laboratory and production use.

Use market research and sales data to make sure products are competitive and practical

Conduct experiments, feasibility studies, and pilot testing for new formulations, processes, and technologies

Submit proposals and designs for evaluation by the management before moving to the next stage

Continuously explore new materials, methods, and innovative solutions to enhance product performance and safety.

Ensure all R&D activities are conducted with a focus on quality, efficiency, and sustainability.

Ensure confidentiality of data and company information

Perform other related duties as required





JOB SPECIFICATIONS

Bachelor’s degree in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Chemistry, or Pharmacy.

At least 3–5 years of experience in an R&D role within pharmaceutical, medical devices, or related industries

Skills:

Comprehensive understanding of regulations pertaining to dietary supplements, guidelines set by the FDA, and adherence to GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices)

Proven track record of successfully developing and launching products

Strong knowledge of pharmaceutical product development, equipment design, and fabrication processes.

Familiarity with regulatory standards in the health and medical product sector.

Exceptional proficiency in both verbal and written communication

title: Social Media Specialist / Influencer Marketing
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking an Influencer Marketing & Social Media Specialist to expand our online presence and strengthen brand awareness through influencer partnerships and social media management. This role involves sourcing and managing influencers, coordinating content, and tracking performance, while also executing day-to-day social media tasks across
, TikTok, X, Instagram, and YouTube. The ideal candidate is creative, organized, and passionate about digital trends, pop culture, and community engagement.



Key Responsibilities:

A. Influencer Marketing

-Source, vet, and onboard influencers within relevant communities (trading cards, Funko Pop, collectibles, gaming).

-Negotiate collaboration terms and manage influencer partnerships across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Provide influencers with briefs and creative guidance to ensure brand alignment.

-Coordinate deliverables and ensure timely publishing of influencer content.

-Track and analyze influencer performance, engagement, and ROI.

-Optimize influencer strategies based on campaign results and industry trends.

-Maintain detailed influencer records, contracts, and communications.

B.Social Media Management

-Execute social media-related tasks across
, TikTok, X, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Schedule and publish posts across platforms in line with marketing campaigns.

-Respond to social media inbox messages and comments in a timely, professional manner.

-Engage with followers and online communities to foster interaction and brand loyalty.

-Support the Marketing Team in executing community engagement and content initiatives.



Qualifications:

-Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Digital Media, or related field (preferred).

-1–3 years of experience in influencer marketing, social media management, or brand partnerships.

-Hands-on experience with influencer campaigns on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Experience managing brand social media pages across
, TikTok, X, Instagram, and YouTube.

-Knowledge of pop culture, collectibles, gaming, and fan communities is a plus.



Skills & Competencies:

-Strong understanding of influencer and social media engagement strategies.

-Excellent communication and negotiation skills.

-Highly organized with the ability to handle multiple campaigns simultaneously.

-Analytical mindset with ability to track KPIs and evaluate campaign performance.

-Creative thinker with a passion for digital storytelling and community building.

-Comfortable working in fast-paced, remote, and collaborative environments.

title: Virtual Assistant (Sales & Marketing Operations)
description:
COMPANY PROFILE:

The company is a new functional drink brand launching in June 2026, designed to support focus, mood, and social energy.

We’re building from the ground up, and this role is for someone who wants to grow with a brand early, not just “do tasks.”

You’ll work directly with the founder as a trusted right hand, helping keep sales, marketing, and operations moving daily.



ABOUT THIS ROLE:

This is not a task-based VA role. You’ll help build and run the backend of the business—from outreach pipelines to marketing coordination to daily operations.



If you like ownership, structure, and figuring things out—you’ll thrive here.



WHAT YOU'LL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:

1. Sales Outreach & Lead Management

* Build targeted lead lists (LinkedIn, Google, Apollo)

* Track outreach and responses in CRM (Sheets/Airtable)

* Send and follow up on outreach (using templates)

* Flag warm leads and help schedule calls



2. Creator & Affiliate Outreach

* Find and reach out to creators (IG, TikTok, YouTube)

* Track outreach, gifting, and responses

* Coordinate product seeding

* Help onboard and track affiliate performance



3. Operations & Admin

* Keep Google Drive clean and organized

* Manage inbox and flag priorities

* Maintain trackers (outreach, inventory, tasks)

* Document SOPs as we build systems



4. Marketing Coordination

* Track weekly marketing calendar execution

* Help schedule content and campaigns

* Assist with newsletters (Klaviyo) and social posting

* Prepare weekly progress reports



5. E-Commerce & Amazon Support

* Assist with Amazon listings and updates

* Monitor reviews and flag issues

* Track inventory and send alerts

* Support Shopify orders and customer
s



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

* Nothing falls through the cracks

* The founder always knows the status of things

* You communicate proactively (no chasing needed)

* Systems stay organized and up to date



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Required

* Strong written English (clear, professional tone)

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Proactive communicator

* Comfortable working independently

* Solid experience with Google Sheets & Drive

* Familiar with LinkedIn and online research



Nice to Have

* VA or remote work experience

* Shopify / Amazon / Klaviyo exposure

* Outreach or lead generation experience



WORK DETAILS:

* Full-time (40 hrs/week)

* Monday–Friday

* Must overlap 9am–2pm CST

* Daily async comms + weekly call with founder



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT:

* You’ll help build systems, not just follow them

* Direct access to the founder

* High ownership and visibility

* Clear path to growth and higher compensation



HOW TO APPLY:

Please fill out the skills assessment survey/ application form:

title: Marketing Assistant — Digital Marketing Agency (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
This is an entry-level marketing role built for someone who wants to learn digital marketing by actually doing it — inside a real agency, on real client accounts, with a team that will train you properly and invest in your growth.



We're not looking for someone who already knows everything. We're looking for someone who follows instructions precisely, executes with care, and takes pride in getting the details right every single time.



If you're a recent graduate or early-career professional who is coachable, highly organized, and ready to commit fully to a long-term role — read on.



What This Role Is:



You'll work inside a structured marketing system, executing weekly deliverables across website management, local SEO,
/SMS marketing, and client reporting. Much of your work involves recurring tasks with documented processes — and following those processes precisely is a real skill we take seriously.



But we're not looking for someone who needs to be told what to do next. The best people on our team see what needs to be done, do it, and flag anything that doesn't look right. They take ownership of their work, not just their task list.



Success in this role looks like: consistent execution, zero dropped balls, and a quiet confidence that if something falls under your responsibility — it's handled.



What You'll Do:



In the first month, you'll shadow our Marketing Manager and learn our systems hands-on. By month two, you'll be executing independently. By month three, you'll own a full client workload.



Day-to-day responsibilities include:



- Update client websites in WordPress (specials, events, gallery, blog posts, landing pages)

- Manage Google Business Profiles (photo uploads, review replies)

- Collect and organize weekly reporting data (metric screenshots, tracking sheet updates)

- Support
 and SMS campaign execution in our retention platform (full training provided)

- Maintain content calendars and ensure deliverables stay on schedule

- Log tasks and progress in ClickUp daily



What We're Looking For:



Non-negotiable:



- Conscientious and detail-oriented — you catch your own errors, you don't cut corners, and you care about quality in routine work

- Ability to follow SOPs — you can read a documented process and execute it the same way every time

- Strong written English — clear, professional communication; able to produce client-facing content without heavy editing

- AI proficiency — comfortable using ChatGPT, Claude, or similar tools as part of your daily workflow

- Reliable internet and computer

- Fully available — this role requires your complete professional focus from month two onward (40 hours/week, Monday–Friday)



Helpful but trainable:



- Experience with WordPress, Google Sheets, or
 marketing platforms

- Canva or basic design skills

- Familiarity with local SEO concepts

- Google Business Profile management experience

- A college degree in marketing, communications, business, or a related field is preferred — not because credentials matter more than character, but because this role attracts people who want to build a real career in marketing, and we want someone who sees this as a starting point, not a stopgap.



A Note on Commitment:



We'll be direct: this is a full-time position that requires your complete, undivided professional focus — especially from month two onward at 40 hours per week. We're a small, high-output team and we need someone who is fully in.



We've hired people in the past who treated this like a side job. That doesn't work here. If you have existing obligations that would prevent you from committing fully, please be upfront about that before we begin the process.



For the right person — someone who takes ownership, communicates proactively, and shows up fully — this is a long-term role with real room to grow in both responsibilities and compensation. We promote from within. The last person hired into this role was promoted to Marketing Manager within one year.



If you're an A-player ready to commit, this is a place where your work will actually matter.



Compensation & Hours:



Month 1 (Training Period):

- 30 hours/week

- $600/month

- Shadow our Marketing Manager, learn all systems, begin supervised execution



Month 2 onward:

- 40 hours/week

- $800/month



Month 6:

- Performance review with opportunity for a raise



Hours are flexible within the Monday–Friday window. We care about output and on-time delivery, not when you're online. Time and PTO are tracked via a time-tracking app.



Benefits:

- 13th month pay

- 10 paid holidays per year

- Paid Time Off (begins accruing after probation period)

- Fully remote

- Flexible schedule

- Growth path — we promote from within and reward people who invest in the role



About LeafSuite:



LeafSuite (
) is a US-based digital marketing agency that serves independent cannabis dispensaries. We help dispensary owners grow their customer base and revenue through retention marketing, local SEO, and website operations.

Cannabis is a legal, regulated industry in the United States, and all of our clients are licensed businesses. This role requires genuine openness to learning about cannabis culture, products, and the dispensary industry — not just tolerating it, but engaging with it well enough to do good work for our clients. If that's not something you're comfortable with, this role isn't the right fit.



How to Apply:



Apply with the subject line: Focused on Marketing – [Your Name]



Include:

- A brief overview of your marketing background or education

- An example of a recurring task you've owned and how you made sure it got done consistently

- Confirmation that this would be your sole professional commitment

- Your ideal working hours (when you get your best work done).



Please write your application in your own words. We're not looking for a polished, perfect response — we're looking for yours. An application that sounds like it was written by an AI tells us nothing about you. Imperfect sentences that are genuinely yours tell us a lot. If we can't hear your voice in your application, we'll move on.



Bonus points if you include your DISC assessment results — either displayed on your profile or attached to your application. Not required, but it helps us get to know you faster.



We review every application. We respond to candidates who follow the instructions.



Thank you — and have a great day!

title: Virtual Assistant (Canva Specialist for Digital Products) – Remote
description:
Virtual Assistant (Canva Specialist for Digital Products) – Remote



About the Role

I’m a content creator and business owner in the plant-based food space looking for a Virtual Assistant with strong Canva skills to support the creation of digital products. This role is focused primarily on designing and formatting clean, visually appealing printables (such as recipe cards, guides, and planners).



You will be working primarily with me, but my friend (who also runs an online business) may occasionally require Virtual Assistant support as well. This means there is potential for more consistent hours and a wider variety of tasks over time.



If you’re someone who loves making content look polished, organized, and beautiful, this will be a great fit.



Responsibilities

Design and format digital products in Canva (recipe cards, PDFs, guides, etc.)

Turn rough content into clean, visually appealing layouts

Source and incorporate relevant visuals (icons, images, etc.)

Occasionally research recipes and format them into branded templates

Maintain consistency with brand style (fonts, colors, layout)

Organize Canva files and keep designs structured

Make revisions based on feedback



Requirements

Advanced Canva skills (layouts, spacing, typography, visual hierarchy)

Strong attention to detail and organization

Fluent in English (written and comprehension)

Ability to follow instructions closely

Reliable communication and ability to meet deadlines

Nice to Have

Experience creating printables or digital products

Experience working with content creators

Basic understanding of food or recipe formatting



Hours & Pay

Flexible schedule (no timezone overlap required)

Paid hourly (please include your rate)

Payments via Wise



Tools

Canva (required)

WhatsApp (for communication)



Test Task (Important)



To be considered, please complete the following:



Create a 1-page recipe card using a vegan recipe you find online.

Your design should include:



Recipe title

Ingredients 

Instructions

A clean, visually appealing layout

At least one relevant graphic or image



Optional (bonus):

Add a second page with a simple shopping list based on the recipe.

This helps me understand your design style and attention to detail.



How to Apply

Please include:

A short introduction

Your Canva portfolio (required)

Your hourly rate

Your availability (hours per week)

Your completed test task



Please include the word ‘pineapple’ in your application so I know you’ve read the full job description.





Maddie Giang

Mon, Apr 13, 8:17?AM (1 day ago)

to me

About the Role

You’ll be responsible for turning raw footage into polished, scroll-stopping videos that are clean, well-paced, and visually engaging.



You will be working primarily with me, but my friend (who also runs an online business) may occasionally require video editing support as well, so there is potential for more consistent work over time.



Responsibilities

Edit short-form videos (Reels and Shorts)

Cut and trim footage for strong pacing and engagement

Add captions/subtitles (clean and easy to read)

Incorporate basic effects, transitions, and text overlays

Follow brand style and editing direction

Select strong hooks and ensure videos are engaging from the start

Make revisions based on feedback



Requirements

Experience editing short-form vertical video content

Strong understanding of pacing, hooks, and viewer retention

Fluent in English (for captions and communication)

Reliable and able to meet deadlines

Attention to detail



Tools

Your preferred video editing software (please specify in your application)

Google Drive (for file sharing)

WhatsApp (for communication)



Hours & Pay

5–10 hours per week

Flexible schedule (no timezone overlap required)

Payments via Wise



Test Task (Important)

Apply to this job post and include the word “blueberry” in your application

If selected, I will send you a short video clip via Google Drive

You will be asked to edit a short-form video based on simple instructions

This helps me evaluate your editing style and attention to detail.





How to Apply

Please include:

A short introduction

Examples of short-form video work (portfolio required)

The editing software you use (e.g., CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.)

Your hourly rate

Your availability (hours per week)

title: DM Lead Qualifier & Appointment Setter for Premium Coaching Service (Instagram + Facebook Inbound Leads)
description:
Overview:



We are looking for a highly organized and fast-moving DM lead qualifier and appointment setter to manage inbound leads coming from physical therapy content on Instagram and
.



Your role is to take incoming attention and turn it into qualified booked sales calls.



This is NOT cold outreach. All leads come inbound from content.



?



Responsibilities:



1. Lead Monitoring

 • Monitor Instagram and 
ments and DMs daily

 • Identify users engaging with content and initiating conversations

 • Ensure no inbound lead is missed or left unanswered



?



2. DM Engagement & Filtering

 • Respond to inbound DMs using structured messaging

 • Ask simple qualification questions based on a provided system

 • Quickly determine whether a lead is serious or not serious

 • Filter out all low-quality, curious, or time-wasting inquiries



?



3. Qualification

 • Identify high-intent individuals based on:

 • severity of issue

 • urgency

 • commitment level

 • seriousness of solving the problem



?



4. Price Framing (Mandatory Step)

 • Clearly set expectations about the nature of the service

 • Communicate that this is a structured, high-level 90-day system

 • Frame the investment level early so only serious buyers continue



?



5. Appointment Booking

 • Book all qualified leads directly onto a calendar

 • Ensure leads are confirmed and ready before scheduling

 • Maintain clean handoff to sales calls



?



Core Objective:



You are responsible for ensuring that only high-quality, serious, and qualified leads reach the sales call stage.



Your job is to remove:

 • tire kickers

 • curiosity inquiries

 • low-intent conversations

 • time-wasters



And pass forward:

 • serious buyers

 • motivated individuals

 • people ready to take action



?



Key Expectations:

 • Fast response time to inbound messages

 • Strict adherence to messaging and filtering process

 • No long conversations or unnecessary explanations

 • No coaching or advice inside DMs

 • No negotiating or changing the offer structure

 • Maintain control of conversations at all times



?



Ideal Candidate:

 • Strong written communication skills

 • Experience handling inbound leads or appointment setting

 • Comfortable working in fast-paced DM environments

 • Highly disciplined and structured communicator

 • Able to follow a system exactly without improvisation



?



Important Notes:



This role is a critical part of a high-performance sales system. Your job is to ensure that only the most qualified leads are passed through for closing.



You are the first layer of the sales process and control the quality of opportunities entering the pipeline.



Please answer these questions:



Have you worked as a DM setter or appointment setter for a high-ticket offer before?

 If yes, what niche was it (fitness, coaching, real estate, etc.) and what was the typical price range of the offer?

In your previous role, were you responsible for qualifying leads before booking calls, or were you mainly focused on booking as many calls as possible?

Can you walk me through what you think makes a high-quality lead in a DM setting environment? What signals tell you someone is worth booking vs not?

If someone is interested but clearly not willing or able to invest in a high-ticket program, what would you do in the conversation with them?

How would you handle someone who keeps asking questions in DMs but avoids committing to a call?

How do you naturally bring up or identify whether someone is financially qualified without sounding pushy?

In your past role, what metrics were you tracked on? (booked calls, show-up rate, closing rate, etc.) What did you personally focus on improving?

Are you comfortable telling someone they are not a good fit for a program? If yes, how would you communicate that in a professional way?

How quickly can you respond to inbound DMs during working hours, and how do you stay consistent with high message volume?

Let’s say a 45-year-old man messages saying he wants to fix his shoulder, but he keeps saying he ‘needs to think about investing money’ and avoids giving a clear yes or no. Walk me through exactly what you would say step-by-step.

Why do you think you would be a good fit for a high-ticket coaching business where your main job is to filter leads and only bring in serious buyers?

title: Sales Associate / Sales Representative (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Amane Social Connect

We’re looking for a confident, personable, and driven Sales Associate to join our growing team at Amane Social Connect—a digital marketing company helping businesses elevate their online presence and attract more clients through high-quality content and strategy.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys speaking with business owners, building relationships, and confidently closing deals.

???? Role Overview

As our Sales Associate, you will take scheduled inbound calls with potential clients and guide them toward the best solution for their business—whether that’s our AI social media app or our full-service social media management.

You’ll be trained through short, easy-to-follow video modules and provided with a clear structure for calls, questions, and closing.

???? Key Responsibilities

Take inbound sales calls (scheduled appointments) during 9 AM – 5 PM (NYC time)

Confidently present and sell:

Our social media app

Our full-service social media management packages

Build trust with clients and understand their business needs

Close deals and convert leads into paying clients

Complete light admin tasks after each call:

Sending intake forms

Organizing client information

Uploading raw content for the social media team

Ensure a smooth handoff to our content team after closing

???? Compensation

Base Pay: $150/month

Commission: $50/month per client you close (recurring for the duration of the client’s contract)

? The more clients you close and retain, the more your income grows consistently over time.

???? Schedule

Full-time: 40 hours per week

Calls scheduled between 9 AM – 5 PM EST (NYC time)

???? We’re Looking For Someone Who:

Speaks clear, fluent English

Has a friendly, confident, and positive personality

Is comfortable on camera and on calls

Can follow structure and training (no guesswork needed)

Is organized and able to complete simple admin tasks

Is motivated by performance and growth

???? Additional Details

Some calls may be recorded and used for social media content and marketing purposes

This is a long-term opportunity with room to grow as the company scales

? About Us

At Amane Social Connect, we believe in helping businesses show up online like luxury brands—confident, polished, and impossible to ignore. We’re building a team that reflects that same energy.

title: Preferably FRESH GRADUATES – Petroleum / Chemical / Mechanical
description:
About the company

CoEN Solutions is a specialist energy consulting and technology company based in Singapore and Australia, delivering integrated subsurface, production, and digital solutions across the oil and gas sector. With expertise spanning reservoir engineering, production optimization, hydrocarbon accounting, and digital twin technologies, CoEN Solutions supports operators in maximizing asset value and improving operational efficiency. The company combines deep technical knowledge with advanced software and data-driven workflows to provide high-quality, practical solutions for complex energy projects globally.



We are looking for fresh graduates who are passionate about engineering and eager to build a career in the energy and oil & gas industry.

This is a great opportunity to join a technical team working on production optimisation, modelling, and digital transformation projects—even if you have no prior industry experience.



About the Role

As a Petroleum Engineer, you will be trained and mentored to work on real-world engineering projects, supporting the development of models and solutions that improve field performance and operational efficiency.



You’ll gain hands-on exposure to:



Production optimisation

Reservoir and production system modelling

Digital oilfield (smart field) technologies

Data-driven engineering workflows



What You Will Do

Assist in building and running engineering models and simulations

Support production optimisation and analysis tasks

Work with engineers to understand field data and system behavior

Learn and use industry tools (e.g. modelling and simulation software)

Contribute to technical reports and project deliverables

Collaborate with a team of experienced engineers and specialists



Who We’re Looking For



Fresh graduates only in the following field:



Petroleum Engineering

Chemical Engineering

Mechanical Engineering



Strong interest in oil & gas, energy, or engineering consulting

Good analytical and problem-solving skills

Willingness to learn new tools and technologies

Basic understanding of engineering fundamentals

Good communication and teamwork skills



Nice to Have (Not Required)

Internship or academic projects related to energy or modelling

Exposure to simulation tools or programming (Python, MATLAB, etc.)

Interest in data analytics, AI, or digital technologies



What We Offer

Structured training and mentorship program

Hands-on experience on real engineering projects

Exposure to advanced modelling and digital technologies

Opportunity to grow into a specialist or consulting role

Supportive and collaborative team environment



Start Your Career With Us

If you’re ready to kickstart your engineering career and work on meaningful projects in the energy sector, we’d love to hear from you.

Apply now:

title: Media Buyer (Google Ads & Meta Ads)
description:
We’re looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Media Buyer to manage and optimise paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta 
/Instagram).



This role is best suited to someone who is confident running campaigns independently, but still follows structure, testing frameworks, and clear processes.



You’ll be working with a number of Australian eCommerce and service-based clients, focusing on performance, consistency, and incremental improvements.



Key Responsibilities



Campaign Management



Set up, manage, and optimise campaigns across:

Google Ads (Search, Shopping, Performance Max)

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

Monitor daily performance and make data-driven adjustments

Ensure budgets are spent efficiently and aligned with targets



Optimisation & Scaling



Identify winning campaigns and scale them appropriately

Reduce wasted spend and improve ROAS/CPA over time

Implement structured testing (creatives, audiences, copy, offers)



Reporting



Provide weekly performance summaries (simple, clear, no fluff)

Highlight:

What’s working

What’s not

What actions are being taken



Account Hygiene



Maintain clean campaign structures

Ensure proper naming conventions and organisation

Keep tracking and conversions accurate

Requirements



Experience



Minimum 2–3 years experience running:

Google Ads (Search + Shopping required)

Meta Ads (conversion campaigns)

Experience with eCommerce accounts preferred



Technical Skills



Strong understanding of:

ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPC

Conversion tracking (Pixel, GA4 basics)

Ability to diagnose performance issues quickly



Work Style



Can follow systems and processes (not freelance chaos)

Communicates clearly and directly

Takes ownership of results

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience with Australian clients or markets

Familiarity with platforms like Shopify

Basic understanding of creatives and what converts

How We Work

You’ll be given clear direction and structure

No overcomplicated strategies — focus is on what works



We value:

Speed

Reliability

Clear thinking

Hours & Pay

Part-time to start (with potential to grow)

Pay based on experience (please include your expected hourly rate)



Working With Creative Team



You will be working alongside a dedicated creative designer.



Your responsibility is to drive creative direction based on performance data, not create the assets yourself.



This includes:



Requesting new creatives based on performance gaps

Clearly briefing the designer with:

Hook/angle

Offer

Target audience

What needs to change (and why)

Identifying when creative fatigue occurs

Suggesting new testing angles based on results

Important

You are not responsible for designing ads

You are responsible for knowing what creatives are needed to improve performance

You must be able to clearly communicate what to test next and why

title: GoHighLevel & Lead Generation VA – CRM, Outreach, Automation (Full-Time)
description:
We’re looking for a smart, reliable, and self-managing virtual assistant to help us run and scale a fully automated system that books commercial cleaning contracts for our clients in Australia and New Zealand. 



This is NOT basic data entry — You must have experience in using tools like, Instantly.ai, Go Highlevel, 
 and Clay. 



THIS IS A MUST. If you dont have experience in these tools for atleast 2+ years do not apply. 



You will be trained with SOPs, videos, and a full task tracker. We want someone long-term who can grow with us and take ownership of results. We do not however want to train someone from scratch, so please only apply if your confident in using these tools. 



We are also looking for a VA that can respond within 1 hr whilst in working hours, use a screen tracker and complete all task given with a EOD given each day. 



IF you do NOT meet these requirements please dont apply as you will not be accepted.

title: Customer Success Representative
description:
This is a highly personal, proactive customer success role — not a reactive support position. You won't wait for clients to come to you. You'll stay ahead of them, guide them through their courses and programs, and make sure they're moving forward every step of the way. If you genuinely love people and want to see them win, this role was made for you.



What You'll Do:



1. Client Success & Progress Tracking:

a. Proactively monitor how each client is progressing across multiple program components, each with their own recurring timelines

b. Reach out consistently — clients often won't ask for what they need, so you bring it to them

c. Congratulate clients when they hit milestones

d. Encourage and re-engage clients who fall behind



2. Onboarding:

a. Onboard new clients into the program

b. Set up their GHL account and get them fully started

c. Make them feel welcomed and clear on next steps from day one



3. 6-Week Accelerator Support:

a. Ensure clients show up each week

b. Make sure they have the right information to complete the work

c. Coach them through each stage of the accelerator — think of yourself as their guide, not just their rep



4. Issue Resolution:

a. You are not responsible for fixing technical or program issues, but you are responsible for identifying them and getting the right tea
mber to resolve them quickly

b. Be the client's advocate internally



Who You Are:

> You genuinely care about people and their success — this isn't just a job task, it's a personality trait

> You get to know each client personally and advocate on their behalf

> You're proactive, not reactive — you follow through without being asked



Skills:

+ Outstanding communication — warm, clear, and consistent

+ Highly organized with strong follow-through

+ Comfortable working across
, SMS/Text, and Zoom

+ Able to manage multiple clients and timelines simultaneously



A Note on This Role:

This is a part-time role. Also, this is a new program, which means the communication systems and workflows are still being built. You'll play a key role in helping shape how client communication runs. If you thrive in a building environment and enjoy creating structure, this is a great opportunity.



Please answer the following when you apply:

1. Tell us about a time you proactively reached out to a client or customer before they knew they needed help. What happened and what was the outcome?

2. How do you personally stay organized when managing multiple clients or projects with different timelines? Walk us through your system.

3. This role requires a lot of heart — you'll be celebrating wins and nudging people who are falling behind. How do you naturally show up for people, and why does that matter to you?

4. Is $5/hr acceptable for you?

title: MSP Operations Coordinator (Remote, Philippines)
description:
We're a US-based managed services provider serving healthcare, manufacturing, and compliance-focused companies. Five people on the team. We're looking for someone who can become the operational backbone of the company.



This is not a virtual assistant role. We need someone with real experience in the IT services world who can manage executive communications, dispatch tickets, handle procurement, and take on special projects, all in the same day. You'll work directly with the owner and touch every part of the business.



The right person for this role is sharp, proactive, and versatile. You're someone who sees what needs to happen next and does it before anyone asks. You write
s that are warm, clear, and professional. You understand how an MSP runs well enough to triage a ticket, talk to a client about an invoice, and schedule a project kickoff without needing everything explained. You're curious about technology, interested in AI tools and automation, and energized by variety.





What you'll be doing



Managing the owner's calendar, inbox, and daily priorities. Drafting and sending client
s on his behalf. Providing briefings before meetings and tracking action items after.



Dispatching tickets. Triaging incoming requests, assigning to the right technician based on skill and availability, and sending professional client acknowledgments.



Procurement. Processing hardware and software orders, tracking shipments, managing vendor quotes, updating asset records.



Invoicing and billing support. Preparing monthly invoices, sending after approval, tracking receivables, flagging overdue accounts.



License and renewal tracking. Monthly reconciliation of client license counts against billing. Vendor renewal calendar maintained so nothing catches us by surprise.



vCIO engagement support. Tracking recommendations, action items, and follow-ups from strategic client meetings. Sending follow-up communications to clients. Flagging overdue items.



Client onboarding and offboarding admin. Non-technical onboarding tasks for new clients: welcome communications, documentation setup, credential coordination. Offboarding checklists when client employees leave.



Special projects as needed. Research, vendor comparisons, process documentation, internal reporting. The kind of work where we say "can you figure this out?" and you come back with something organized and useful.





What we're looking for



3+ years working in an MSP, IT services company, or technology-focused business. You understand multi-tenant environments, ticketing systems, and the pace of managed services.



Excellent written and spoken English. This is the most important requirement. You'll be writing to clients, drafting
s on behalf of the owner, and occasionally joining calls. Your communication needs to be clear, warm, and professional without sounding scripted or corporate.



Technical literacy. You won't be fixing anything, but you need to understand the landscape. You know the difference between a Microsoft 365 issue and a networking issue. You can read a ticket and route it to the right person. You understand what conditional access, Intune, and Entra ID are at a conceptual level.



Proactive and organized. You follow up before anyone has to ask. You flag things that are coming due. You anticipate what's needed next. If something falls through the cracks, it bothers you.



Comfortable with variety. Your day will include dispatch, client
s, procurement, calendar management, and special projects. That range should energize you, not overwhelm you.



Interest or experience in AI tools, scripting, or automation. You've used ChatGPT, Claude, or similar tools to make your work more efficient. Or you've built a simple script or automation to eliminate a repetitive task. We're an AI-forward team and we want someone who thinks this way.





What we offer



Full-time remote. $1,000 to $1,400/month depending on experience. Minimum 4 hours daily overlap with US Mountain Time. 60-day trial period so we can both make sure it's a good fit. A role with real variety and direct impact on how the company runs.





How to apply



To be considered for this role, please include ALL THREE of the following:



1. Your resume.



2. A short document (PDF or Word) responding to the following. This is how we'll evaluate your writing, formatting, and technical comprehension. Please take care with how you present it.



   Writing exercise: Draft the
s you would send in each scenario.



   Scenario A: A client
s asking why their monthly invoice is $300 higher than last month. The reason is they added 6 new employees mid-cycle and the prorated Microsoft 365 licensing was included. Draft the response you'd send on behalf of the company owner.



   Scenario B: A client submits a support ticket that says &quot
 isn't working." You need to acknowledge the ticket and ask the right clarifying questions so the technician who picks it up can move quickly. Draft the response to the client.



   Tech triage: For each of the following, tell us what category of issue it is and which type of technician you'd route it to (for example: identity/access specialist, endpoint tech, networking, general support).



   - "Users in our Denver office can't connect to the VPN since this morning."

   - "I can't get into my
 on my phone but it works fine on my laptop."

   - "We added a new employee and they need access to SharePoint, Teams, and our project management tool."

   - "Our QuickBooks database is running really slow and it's hosted on a server in our office."



   AI and automation: Describe a time you used AI tools, scripting, or automation to make a repetitive task more efficient. If you haven't yet, describe a task from your current or previous role that you think could be automated and how you'd approach it.



3. A short video (3 to 5 minutes) introducing yourself. Tell us about your MSP or IT services experience and what you'd bring to this role. Speak naturally. We're listening for communication clarity and how you think, not a rehearsed pitch.

title: Test Analyst - Remote
description:
We are seeking a detail-focused Test Analyst to support the quality and reliability of our core business systems. In this role, you will help ensure that enterprise applications function as expected by applying structured testing approaches across multiple stages of the development lifecycle.



The ideal candidate brings a solid IT foundation, strong knowledge of both the software development lifecycle (SDLC) and software testing lifecycle (STLC), and the ability to analyze systems thoroughly to identify potential issues before release.



Key Responsibilities:

- Test Planning and Preparation

- Collaborate with business analysts and developers to define testing strategies

- Develop detailed test plans and test cases for new implementations and system enhancements

- Test Execution and Defect Management

- Perform testing across multiple phases including system, integration, regression, and UAT

- Record and track defects, ensuring issues are resolved before release

- Provide regular updates on testing progress and results

- Enterprise System Validation

- Perform thorough testing of ERP systems and related business workflows

- Integration and Data Testing

- Verify data exchanges and message accuracy when testing EDI transactions and API endpoints

- Database Validation

- Use SQL queries to validate backend data and confirm database accuracy

- Continuous Improvement

- Recommend improvements to testing practices, coverage, and overall efficiency



Required Qualifications:

- Minimum 3 years of experience in software testing

- ISTQB Foundation Level certification or higher

- Strong knowledge of system, integration, and regression testing approaches

- Experience testing ERP platforms and EDI integrations/message formats

- Practical experience performing API testing

- Ability to write and execute SQL queries for backend validation

- Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills



Preferred Experience:

- Experience conducting performance testing, including load, stress, or volume testing

- Experience creating and maintaining test automation scripts using Java



Work Schedule :

6:30 AM - 3:00 PM Philippines Time

title: AI Operator — Hybrid Agency (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Dirt Digital is a growth agency built on a hybrid model: AI agents handle strategy, drafting, and intelligence. We need a human operator in the loop — someone who can pick up agent outputs, QC them, steer them, and ship real work for real clients.



This isn't a traditional marketing or engineering role. You don't need to be a designer, developer, or copywriter. You need to be an AI power user who can operate across all of those domains — someone who's already living in the future of how work gets done.



We use Claude Code, Codex, and a stack of AI tools daily. If you're a power user of these platforms — or can become one fast — we want to talk. This is a two-way relationship: we'll push each other. I want to learn from you as much as you learn from us.



WHAT YOU BRING: CORE SKILLS — NON-NEGOTIABLE



01 — AI TOOL MASTERY

You're a power user of Claude Code, Codex, or equivalent AI development tools. Not just chat prompting — you build with them. You can spin up a site, generate content, wire automations, and ship from inside an AI-assisted workflow. You know where these tools shine and where they break.



02 — PROMPT ENGINEERING AT A PROFESSIONAL LEVEL

Not hobby prompting. You build and maintain prompt systems that produce consistent, brand-locked output across formats. You create few-shot examples, voice guidelines, and systematic prompts that scale.



03 — SYSTEMS THINKING OVER INDIVIDUAL SKILL

You think in workflows, not tasks. You can look at a process and design the AI-assisted system that makes it repeatable and compounding. One recording becomes 6 platform-ready assets. One research brief becomes 3 outreach angles.



04 — EDITORIAL JUDGMENT AND QUALITY INSTINCTS

You can look at AI output and immediately know if it ships, needs a human touch, or gets scrapped. You know when a draft sounds like a real person vs. a chatbot. You catch what agents miss.



05 — AI SKEPTICISM, NOT AI ENTHUSIASM

You understand how LLMs confabulate, where they fail, and when not to trust them. You reflexively fact-check AI output. You design guardrails and validation layers, not just prompts.



06 — ASYNC AUTONOMY

You don't need meetings, standups, or hand-holding. You pick up a brief, execute, and ship. You communicate progress in writing. You document decisions so the team can follow your work without synchronous check-ins.



STRONG PREFERENCE



Cross-platform content instincts — X copy isn't LinkedIn copy isn't newsletter copy

Cultural signal reading — plugged into crypto, AI, founder, and tech conversations

Relationship memory — tracking engagements, what landed, compounding relationships

Data pipeline intuition — understanding how data flows between tools and agents

Research tradecraft — hypothesis formation, source evaluation, primary source navigation

WHAT DOESN'T MATTER



Traditional specialist skills. You don't need to be a senior developer, graphic designer, video editor, or ML researcher. Those are the old categories. We're hiring for the new one.

Specific platform expertise. We don't care which CRM you've used or which analytics dashboard you know. Tools change. Thinking doesn't.

Formal AI/ML education. No CS degree required. No need to fine-tune models or write Python. We care about what you can do with AI, not what you can explain about how it works.

THE TEST — SHOW US HOW YOU THINK



We don't do interviews. We don't do resumes. You show us what you can build — and more importantly, how you think.



THE BRIEF:

You are an AI operator at Dirt Digital. Your first assignment: find us a client and show us what you'd build for them. 



01 — RESEARCH

Study Dirt Digital — our site, our positioning, our services. Then go find a real company that should be our client. Pick someone specific. Explain why they're a fit.



02 — BUILD THE PITCH

For that company, put together a growth direction: brand positioning, content strategy, key deliverables, and how you'd automate the execution. Build as much of it as you can — a landing page, sample content, social posts, automated workflows, design assets. Use AI tools at every step. Host it somewhere free (Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages — your call) or run it locally.



03 — RECORD THE WALKTHROUGH

Screen record a demo. Walk us through your research, your strategy, and what you built. Narrate it like you're presenting to a client. Show your tools, show your thinking, show your taste. Keep it tight. Free tip: screen.studio



04 — WE REVIEW

We evaluate on: strategic thinking, research quality, brand instincts, content quality, tool diversity, technical ambition, and editorial judgment. The ambiguity is intentional — how you interpret the brief tells us as much as what you build.



WHY THIS ROLE



You'll work directly with the founder. You'll operate across every domain — content, engineering, design, automation, client strategy. You'll use the most advanced AI tools available, daily. And you'll be part of building something genuinely new: a hybrid agency where AI agents and human operators work as one team.



This is a two-way relationship. If you're ahead of us on a tool, a workflow, or an idea — we want to know. We're building the playbook together.



To apply: Send your screen recording and a short note on why this role fits you. (Screen recording must be less than 3 minutes). Determine how to best showcase what you've built.

title: Senior US Mortgage Underwriter
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for experienced US Mortgage Underwriters to join our growing team. The ideal candidate must have strong expertise in evaluating and underwriting mortgage loans in accordance with US guidelines. This role requires accuracy, attention to detail, and a deep understanding of underwriting standards.



Key Responsibilities

• Review and evaluate mortgage loan applications in compliance with US guidelines.

• Assess borrower creditworthiness, income, assets, and risk factors.

• Ensure loans meet FNMA, FHLMC, FHA, VA, and USDA guidelines.

• Analyze financial documents such as credit reports, tax returns, and bank statements.

• Make sound underwriting decisions and document findings accurately.

• Coordinate with processors and other stakeholders to complete loan evaluations.

• Maintain high accuracy and turnaround time standards.



Qualifications

• Open to college-level candidates.

• Must have at least 2 years of experience as a US Mortgage Underwriter (non-negotiable).

• Strong knowledge of US mortgage guidelines (FNMA, FHLMC, FHA, VA).

• Experience underwriting Conventional, FHA, VA, and USDA loans.

• Excellent analytical and decision-making skills.

• High attention to detail and ability to work independently.

title: Short Form Video Editor who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Short Form Video Editor’ in the subject line. The job responsibilities include editing engaging short-form videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, adding captions and motion graphics, selecting impactful clips, enhancing audio and visuals, staying on top of trends, and organizing video assets. You’ll also collaborate with the team to test different styles and improve performance over time. Creativity, speed, attention to detail, and a strong sense of storytelling are key to success in this role. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. Please make sure to send your job application here on OnlineJobs and not via
. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! Irish #Believe

description:
I am looking for a full-time Video Editor to join my team of VAs. Make sure to read until the end to know how to apply for this position.



Requirements:

- Experience in Video Editing, preferably with knowledge in 4K Video Editing

- Experience in Adobe Premiere Pro

- With own Adobe Premiere Pro software

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

- Creative and innovative with attention to detail

- Using MacBook or being able to edit Mac files is PREFERRED

- Knowledge of graphic design (Adobe Photoshop/Illustrator) is a PLUS



Pay: TBD, this will depend on your level of skill and other people that apply to the job.



Tasks:

*Editing 4k videos for a YouTube channel

*Editing short-form videos for TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram

*Creating/editing content for social media

*Organizing video files and storage



Perks:

*You can work as much as you want. I will pay you a salary but if you work extra hours you will get paid.

*Flexible Vacation, if you need time off just let me know.

*Opportunity to advance/get bonuses, If you do a good job I will give you a raise and bonuses.



TO APPLY FOR THE JOB:

1. Change the subject line to “I Want to Work for You [Insert the name of my mom who is the co-owner of Bdancewear]

2. At the top of your message, write 2-3 sentences on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Do not write more than that, or else your application will be deleted.

3. Write out the name of one of the passion products I featured on my channel (check out my vlogs on my YouTube channel: Travis Marziani)

4. How many years have you been doing video editing?

5. Link to a sample video that you've edited in the past.



Make sure to follow all the steps above. This is a great job opportunity with the ability to get bonuses and raises, so I will only look at applicants who really want the job. If I interview you, there will be a short call between us, and a video will be required



Do not write more than what I have asked you above. If you write more than what is requested above, I will ignore your job post.



Thank you,

Travis Marziani

title: AU Tax Accountant
description:
We believe our people are the foundation of our success. Our culture is built on respect, collaboration, and supporting one another.



We strive to create a workplace where employees feel valued, heard, and empowered to grow both personally and professionally. Our leadership is committed to fostering open communication, professional development, and a positive environment where everyone can perform at their best.



If you're looking for a company that values your contribution and supports your growth, we’d love to have you on our team.



Why Join Bravo?

We believe great people deserve great support. Here’s what you can expect when you join us:

-Competitive and stable full-time work from home opportunity

-HMO and Life Insurance coverage

-13th Month Pay

-Government Contributions (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG)

-Sick Leave and Vacation Leave benefits

-Free Training and Professional Development opportunities

-Monthly Virtual Employee Engagement activities (with prizes!)

-Fun Company Get-Togethers

-An Annual Christmas Party that our team truly looks forward to

-Year-End Package



We make sure our team not only works hard, but also feels appreciated and celebrated.



About the Role

We are currently looking for four (4) experienced AU Tax Accountants to join our growing team.

In this role, you will work closely with an Australian firm handling tax compliance and accounting services for a diverse client base. This position offers the opportunity to further develop your expertise in Australian taxation while working in a supportive and collaborative environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Prepare and review Australian Tax Returns, BAS, and Financial Statements

-Ensure compliance with Australian tax regulations and legislation

-Provide tax planning support or advice to clients or internal stakeholders

-Analyze financial statements and provide insights where needed

-Maintain accurate financial records and documentation



What We’re Looking For

-2–5+ years of Australian Tax and Business Services experience

-Ability to prepare tax returns for Individuals, Partnerships, Companies (including Group Companies), and Trusts

-Experience in preparing and reviewing Financial Statements

-Solid understanding of Australian tax legislation, including:

Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT)

Division 7A compliance and application

-Experience in preparing IAS and BAS

-Experience in tax planning is an advantage

-Strong analytical and communication skills

-Proficient in using Xero, XPM, and other accounting software

-Positive and proactive attitude with a fun team spirit

-Bookkeeping experience is a plus



If you're interested in this opportunity, feel free to apply through this job post or send your resume directly to 
 look forward to hearing from you!

title: Appointment Setter (Medspa Niche) EST
description:
We are a fast-growing performance advertising startup based in Canada. We’re looking for a skilled Appointment Setter to join our team on a monthly long-term retainer, contingent on probation and ongoing performance. You will support our clients by calling and converting leads into booked appointments for our clients.



We want Setters who act as true consultants, not just script-readers. You will be handling leads for the health/beauty service industry (Medspas, Laser Clinics, Estheticians).



What You’ll Do:

-Call and qualify warm leads within 5 minutes of receiving them in our CRM.

-Manage and organize the CRM (scheduling, notes, and pipeline management).

-Follow up with potential patients via SMS and
 to maximize booking rates.

-Handle objections professionally and educate leads on treatments (e.g., Botox, PRP, Laser Hair Removal, etc).

-Collaborate with our team to improve script and lead quality feedback.

-Attend daily/weekly check-in meetings



What We’re Looking For:

-Flawless English communication skills (Spoken & Written). You must sound confident, clear, and friendly on the phone with minimal/no accent.

-Experience in Sales or Appointment Setting.

-Prior experience working with Medspas or selling high-ticket beauty services.

-Tech Savvy: Familiarity with CRMs (GoHighLevel/GHL experience).

-Availability: Must work during Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours.

-Focus: This will preferably be your main focus (no sub-contracts/agencies). You will work very closely with our team.

-Reliability: Fast response times via Slack/Email and a quiet working environment with reliable internet connection.



This is perfect for someone who:

-Thrives in a fast-paced, high-pressure startup environment.

-Is not afraid of the phone and can handle rejection with resilience.

-Is looking for a long-term growth opportunity with a diverse client base.





To apply, please send us:

-A short video introducing yourself and your previous experience related to this role.

-Scenario: How would you handle a lead who says, "That’s too expensive" for a laser treatment?

-Your availability (EST timezone)

-Salary/Commission expectations ($CAD).

-Resume/CV.



If selected for an interview, you may be asked to complete a mock-call assessment.

title: Marketing & Admin Coordinator | Part-Time, Path to Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are a small team doing work that genuinely matters.



Talanton is a faith-driven impact investment firm on a mission to create 1 million jobs for Christ in Sub-Saharan Africa. We back values-aligned, growth-stage businesses that lift people out of poverty through dignified work. Our tagline says it plainly: Create Jobs. Bring Hope. Transform Lives.



We are lean, focused, and serious about what we do. Every piece of content we publish, every
 we send, every asset we update is part of how we tell that story to investors and advisors who trust us with their capital and their values.



What this role is



This starts at 20 hours per week with a genuine path to full-time. As trust builds and you take on more of the admin and operations load, the role grows with you. We are looking for someone who wants to be a long-term part of how Talanton works, not someone filling a seat for three months.



You will support our VP of Marketing, who works on Brisbane time, across content scheduling,
 campaigns, Canva design, video editing, performance reporting, and eventually calendar and CRM support.



What you will be doing



Social media: scheduling and publishing across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram using Metricool, maintaining the content calendar, adapting graphics in Canva, and monitoring engagement.



 marketing: building and sending monthly campaigns in Mailchimp, managing subscriber lists, and tracking performance data.



Brand assets: maintaining our Canva template library, updating key numbers and stats when they change, and keeping everything current and on brand.



Video editing: cutting and editing short-form videos of 2 to 5 minutes in Descript for social media and investor updates, adding captions and branding.



Reporting: pulling monthly data fro
tricool, Mailchimp, and Google Analytics and presenting a simple summary to the VP.

As the role grows, ma also take on CRM entries and investor follow-up support, and file organisation in SharePoint.



Tools we use

Metricool, Canva, Mailchimp, Google Analytics, Descript, Microsoft Outlook, and SharePoint. 



What we are looking for

You bring 2 to 5 years of experience in marketing, admin, or a similar coordinator role. Beyond that, here is what matters most.



You are proactive. You see what needs to happen and you do it without being chased.

You are organised. Deadlines and details do not slip through the cracks.

You write well. Clean, warm, professionn

You are consistent. You show up, deliver, and take ownership of your area.

You share our faith. Talanton is a Christian organisation and our mission is rooted in that. You do not need to have it all figured out, but you need to understand why this work matters to us.



Practical details

Remote contractor position starting at 20 hours per week. Pay is competitive and based on experience. Overlap with Brisbane business hours is needed for regular check-ins. You will be joining a small, globally distributed team so comfort across time zones matters.



Full-time is a real possibility for the right person. 



To apply



Please submit your resume and cover letter with your application.



Read everything above carefully, because here is what we need from you. Record a short video, no longer than 5 minutes, specifically for this role. We are not interested in a generic showreel or something you already have on hand. We want to hear you talk about Talanton directly. Tell us three things: what it is about our mission that resonates with you personally, how you would approach keeping our brand consistent and our content calendar moving without being chased, and what faith looks like in the way you work day to day. Upload it to YouTube (unlisted is fine) or Google Drive and include the link in your application message.



Applications without a video made specifically for this role will not be read. We are a small team and we take hiring seriously. If you took the time to read this far, we think you are probably the kind of person we want to hear from.
