title: Real Estate Operations & Transaction Coordinator (Full-Time, Long-Term)
description:
We are a fast-growing real estate team based in South Carolina looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Operations and Transaction Coordinator to support our business.



This role goes beyond a typical virtual assistant. We are looking for someone who can help manage our day-to-day operations, keep our transactions on track, and grow with our team long-term. This position will start with administrative and operations tasks and grow into full transaction coordination over time.



If you are someone who enjoys organization, systems, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks, this could be a great fit.



Responsibilities:



Operations and Scheduling:

Schedule listing photos, videos, staging, and marketing appointments

Manage team calendars and timelines

Coordinate showing instructions and listing setup



 and Communication Management:

Organize inboxes and provide daily summaries

Flag urgent
s and maintain smooth communication flow

Assist with client communication and follow-ups



CRM Management:

Maintain and update Follow Up Boss CRM

Ensure all clients are properly tagged, staged, and followed up with

Set up and manage automations for lead follow-up



Listing and Administrative Support:

Input listings into MLS

Prepare and send listing agreements, buyer agreements, and referral agreements

Coordinate marketing timelines for listings



Transaction Coordination (Training Provided):

Track contract deadlines including inspection, appraisal, and closing

Communicate with lenders, attorneys, and all parties involved

Ensure all documents are complete and organized

Assist in managing transactions from contract to close



Organization and Systems:

Organize Google Drive, files, and documents

Maintain transaction files and forms

Help improve and maintain systems and workflows



Bonus (not required but helpful):

Experience in U.S. real estate

Familiarity with Follow Up Boss, MLS systems, or transaction coordination

Experience with automation tools or AI

Experience with task management tools such as Trello, Asana, or ClickUp



What We Are Looking For:

Extremely detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

Strong written English and communication skills

Proactive and able to take initiative

Able to follow systems and improve processes

Looking for a long-term position with growth opportunities



Why Join Us:

Fast-growing and supportive team

Opportunity to grow into a key operations role

Long-term stability

Training provided on systems and processes



How to Apply:



To apply, please include the following:

A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with real estate or administrative work

What systems or tools you have used before

Your favorite way to stay organized

Include the word STANDARD in your application so we know you read everything

title: Social Media VA + Video Editor (TikTok shop/Short-Form Content)
description:
I’m a TikTok content creator looking for a reliable, creative VA to help me scale my content output. This is a long-term position with consistent daily work. I film in batches and need someone who can keep up with high volume while maintaining quality and my specific style.



What You’ll Be Doing



Video Editing (Primary Role)

 • Edit short-form vertical videos daily (volume varies, anywhere from 5 to 30 videos per day)

 • Edits include: removing silence/dead air, adding zooms for emphasis, fun sound effects, and overlay images/graphics

 • Tool preferred: CapCut 

 • Videos should feel energetic, fun, and casual, not overly polished



Script Writing

 • Research high-performing TikTok videos in my niche

 • Write short scripts I can use for filming, based on what’s trending and performing well

 • Scripts should match my voice: casual, funny, a little unhinged, focused on deals not hard selling



You’re a Great Fit If You…

 • Have experience editing short-form vertical video (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

 • Are comfortable with CapCut or similar mobile/desktop editing tools

 • Have a good eye for pacing, energy, and what makes videos feel fun

 • Can write in a casual, conversational tone

 • Are organized, reliable, and communicate clearly

 • Have experience with TikTok Shop or affiliate content (big plus, not required)





Please send a portfolio/examples of your work in editing videos. I prefer non-ai edited videos.

title: Marketing Project Manager (Growth Ops)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Mission: Helping Small Businesses Scale through Technology



At itGenius, we believe technology is the ultimate multiplier for growth. As a premier Google Workspace partner, we’ve spent 15 years helping over 5,000 business owners transition from startup chaos to scalable, efficient operations with Google Workspace and other cloud tools.



We are currently building a global, high-volume, systems-first consultancy. To achieve this, we need a Marketing Project Manager who views marketing as an engineering challenge—focusing on building the “pipes” that drive consistent, global growth.



The Role: Strategic Execution & Workflow Management

We prioritize data-driven execution over traditional marketing “fluff.”



Reporting directly to the Chief of Growth, your role is to bridge the gap between high-level strategy and tactical output. You won’t be managing a large internal team; instead, you will orchestrate a network of specialist contractors and automated systems to ensure our organic growth engine—primarily driven by our high-authority YouTube channel—is running at peak performance.



? Why Join Our High-Performance Team?

We offer a remote-first culture that values systems, clarity, and measurable results.



Work From Anywhere: Permanent work-from-home (aligned with Philippine Time).

Clear Career Growth: Budget for professional certifications and a defined path toward senior leadership.

Performance-Based Rewards: A monthly success bonus tied directly to the achievement of your KPIs.

Dynamic Culture: Annual team conferences (past locations include Boracay) and a focus on holistic well-being.

Comprehensive Benefits: Competitive compensation, health allowances, and tech support for your home office.





Core Responsibilities

You will oversee the marketing portfolio, ensuring every project is clearly defined, properly resourced, and delivered on schedule.



1. Content Strategy & Production Management: Direct our external editors and copywriters. Your task is to ensure all content aligns with our brand voice—the “Calm Expert Guide”—and effectively solves real-world business problems for our audience.

2. Growth Research & Competitive Analysis: Oversee our YouTube and search research process. You will identify high-demand topics and work with creatives to package them into high-performing titles and thumbnails.

3. Customer Lifecycle & Marketing Automation: Manage and optimize the customer journey within our CRM (Intercom). You will build and refine automated nurture sequences that guide prospects through our service tiers.

4. Technical SEO Coordination: Collaborate with our Engineering team to ensure our web properties remain healthy, crawlable, and optimized for the next generation of AI-driven search.

5. Performance Analytics: You will monitor and validate marketing KPIs bi-weekly, providing actionable insights during our Growth Sync meetings to improve ROI across all organic channels.





Who You Are (Fit & Mindset)

We look for candidates who demonstrate high ownership and a systems-first approach to problem-solving.



The “Systems Thinker”: You fundamentally understand B2B marketing funnels and how to manage complex workflows in a remote, international environment.

The “Tech-Savvy Professional”: You are comfortable navigating new tools, directing technical implementations, and taking absolute accountability for project outcomes.

The “Accountable Executor”: You are a power-user of project management tools (Asana preferred). You can write clear, “fail-proof” creative briefs and keep multiple contractors moving toward a single goal.





Required Qualifications

- 5+ Years in Marketing Operations or Project Management: Preferably within a B2B, SaaS, or tech consulting environment.

- Contractor Management: Proven experience sourcing, briefing, and holding external freelancers accountable for quality and deadlines.

- Tool Proficiency: Strong experience with Asana (or similar), CRM automation platforms, and an understanding of YouTube/Search analytics.

- Communication Excellence: You bring solutions, not just problems, and communicate with clarity and professionalism.





Work Schedule

- 8-hour shift, Philippine Time but flexible as some team are based in Europe.

- Monday to Friday (Weekends off).





Are You Ready to Scale with Us?

If you’re ready to build a scalable marketing machine that delivers tangible business impact, we’d love to meet you.



Apply Now and tell us: Which specific marketing system or workflow have you built that you are most proud of?

title: Sales Consultant (FT Remote)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.







----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Are you a driven sales professional who thrives on turning conversations into lasting client relationships and real business results?



At itGenius, we need a Sales Consultant who acts as the growth engine of our mission to "Help small businesses play a bigger game." Reporting to the Head of Sales, you are a trusted advisor who uncovers real business needs, crafts ingenious solutions, and builds the kind of trust that makes itGenius an essential part of every client's success.

itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 60+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.



Join our team of A-players—if you're one too, apply now!



-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

? Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here's what you’ll get:



???? Competitive Compensation & Bonuses

December Bonus 

Performance Incentive Bonus 

Regular Annual Salary Increases as you grow with us



????? Time Off That Matters

Paid Leaves after regularization 

Paid National/Local Holidays 



???? Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!



???? Investing in Your Growth

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways 



???? Support to Help You Thrive

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Reports To: Head of Sales



Job Overview:

As a Sales Consultant at itGenius, you'll be at the forefront of our mission to "Help small business play a bigger game," directly contributing to our vision of "facilitating happy, healthy, productive teams fuelling important global purpose-work." You embody the spirit of being the "Amazon Prime" of IT – highly responsive and providing solutions that are more convenient than Google or AI.

You'll operate like a member of a "high-performing sports team," demonstrating 10x thinking to achieve ambitious goals. As a "useful Geek," you'll leverage your love for technology to provide smart, human-centric solutions. This role is crucial in expanding our reach within the SMB market, acquiring new clients, and nurturing relationships that drive our growth towards becoming the global leader in remote-delivered IT services. You will be directly responsible for identifying opportunities, presenting our ingenious and seamless solutions, and ensuring our customers trust us to be an essential part of their success.





Core Accountabilities

The Sales Consultant will be held accountable for the following measurable objectives:

Individual Gross Profit Target Achievement: Consistently meet or exceed assigned quarterly and annual sales gross profit targets for new and existing clients

Sales Pipeline Health & Progression: Proactively manage and maintain a robust sales pipeline, ensuring a consistent flow of qualified leads and efficient progression of opportunities through all stages of the sales funnel.

Client Satisfaction & Smooth Onboarding: Ensure high levels of prospective client satisfaction throughout the sales process, culminating in a seamless and positive handover experience to the delivery and account management teams.





Key Responsibilities:

The day-to-day activities and duties of the Sales Consultant include:



Prospecting & Lead Qualification: Proactively identify, research, and qualify new sales opportunities within the small to medium business (SMB) market through various channels, including outbound prospecting, inbound lead follow-up, networking, and referrals.



Needs Assessment & Solution Design: Conduct in-depth needs assessments with prospective clients to thoroughly understand their business challenges, technology requirements, and strategic objectives.



Solution Presentation & Value Articulation: Develop and deliver compelling presentations and demonstrations of itGenius's tailored IT solutions and services, clearly articulating their value proposition, benefits, and return on investment.



Proposal Development & Negotiation: Prepare comprehensive and accurate sales proposals, quotes, and contracts. Lead negotiations to secure mutually beneficial agreements and close sales.



CRM Management & Reporting: Maintain accurate, up-to-date, and detailed records of all sales activities, client interactions, pipeline status, and forecasts within the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system. Provide regular sales performance reports to the Head of Sales.



Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate closely with the technical, operations, and delivery teams to ensure proposed solutions are feasible, client expectations are managed effectively, and client onboarding is seamless.

Market & Product Knowledge: Continuously stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, emerging technologies, and itGenius's evolving product and service offerings to effectively position our solutions.



Post-Sales Handoff: Facilitate smooth and comprehensive handovers of new clients to the dedicated account management and service delivery teams, ensuring continuity and client satisfaction.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Required Qualifications:

- Experience: 2-3+ years B2B sales experience (ideally IT services or SaaS)

- Track record of meeting/exceeding GP targets

- Experience with CRM tools (Pipedrive, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

- Strong written and verbal communication

- Familiarity with Google Workspace / cloud IT would be a plus





Skills:

- Consultative/solution selling (needs assessment, value articulation)

- CRM pipeline management

- Proposal writing and negotiation

- Presentation and demo delivery

- SMB market awareness

- Basic IT/cloud technology literacy (enough to be a "useful Geek")

- Cross-functional collaboration



It would be nice if you have:

- Proven track record in Managed Service Provider (MSP) sales.

- AI Integration: Experience using AI (like GeniusAI) and automation to optimize workflows.



Work Schedule

8-hour shift

Philippine timezone, morning shift

Monday to Friday

Weekends off

Observance of Philippine holiday

Permanent Work Form Home



You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Senior Account Manager
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Come join our dynamic, award-winning cloud technology consulting firm!



Are you passionate about empowering small businesses to achieve their greatest potential through technology? 



We’re looking for a Senior Account Manager to be the trusted partner for our clients, driving retention, satisfaction, and revenue growth. If you’re passionate about technology, problem-solving, and making a real impact, this is your chance to shine.



We’re itGenius, a leading cloud technology consulting firm and Google’s top partner in Australia. For over a decade, we’ve helped small and mid-sized businesses across the globe transform how they work with Google Workspace, AI, and automation. Our business model combines consulting expertise with scalable managed services that empower modern teams to do their best work.



If you're an A-player—apply now!



Why You’ll Love Working With Us



We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here's what you’ll get:



Competitive Compensation & Bonuses:

- December Bonus

- Performance Incentive Bonus

- Annual Salary Increases



Time Off That Matters:

- Paid Leaves

- Paid National/Local Holidays



Work & Life Experiences You'll Remember:

- Annual Team Conferences & Events (travel, food, accommodation covered)



Investing in Your Growth:

- Training & Development Budget

- Career Growth Pathways



Support to Help You Thrive:

- Government-Mandated Benefits/ HMO





Reports To: Head of Sales & Accounts



Job Overview: 



As a Senior Account Manager, you will be at the forefront of this mission, acting as a trusted partner and strategic advisor to our valued clients.



You will be instrumental in ensuring their continued success, identifying opportunities for them to leverage technology more effectively. This role is about building lasting relationships, driving mutual growth, and ensuring our clients experience the "Amazon Prime" of IT service - effortless, responsive and world class. 



You will be directly accountable for client retention, satisfaction, and the growth of your assigned accounts, contributing significantly to itGenius's 10-year goal of becoming the global leader in remote-delivered IT services to the SMB market.



Accountabilities



The Senior Account Manager is specifically accountable for the following measurable objectives within their assigned client portfolio:



Holding the Game Plan: Accountable for holding a clients long term objectives and ensuring the plan is constantly moved forward over time via quarterly reviews.



Strategic Client Partnership: Holding strategic relationships with key decision-makers within assigned client accounts, positioning itGenius as a trusted technology partner.



Client Retention & Satisfaction: Accountable for maintaining high levels of client satisfaction and ensuring the retention of assigned client accounts.



Revenue Growth: Accountable for identifying and securing opportunities for revenue growth through upsell and cross-sell within their assigned client portfolio.





Key Responsibilities:



To achieve the above accountabilities, the Senior Account Manager will perform the following day-to-day activities:



Relationship Management: Proactively engage with assigned clients through regular meetings (virtual and in-person where appropriate), calls, and
 communications to understand their evolving business needs and technology landscape.



Needs Assessment & Solution Proposal: Conduct thorough needs analyses to identify client challenges and opportunities, and present tailored IT solutions and services that align with their strategic objectives and our service offerings.



Sales & Negotiation: Prepare and deliver proposals, negotiate contracts, and manage the sales cycle for upsell and cross-sell opportunities within existing accounts to achieve revenue targets.



Client Advocacy & Issue Resolution: Act as the primary point of contact for assigned clients, advocating for their needs internally and collaborating with the technical, support, and project teams to ensure timely and effective resolution of any issues or escalations.



Account Planning & Review: Develop and maintain comprehensive account plans for each assigned client, including key contacts, service history, future opportunities, and conduct regular business reviews to demonstrate value and align on future strategies.



CRM Management & Reporting: Maintain accurate and up-to-date client information, communication logs, and sales pipeline data within the CRM system. Prepare and present regular reports on account health, sales performance, and client satisfaction to the Head of Strategic Sales.



Tea
ntoring: Serve as a subject matter expert and mentor to Junior Account Managers and Sales Representatives, assisting in their professional development and contributing to team best practices.



Market Awareness: Stay informed about industry trends, technological advancements, and the competitive landscape to better advise clients and identify new opportunities.





Required Qualifications & Skills



Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, IT, or related field

5–8+ years in account management, sales, or client services, ideally in IT/technology/SaaS. 

Proven track record in client retention, revenue growth, and account expansion.

Client Relationship & Strategy: Build trusted partnerships with senior decision-makers. Develop account plans, conduct business reviews, and identify growth opportunities.

Sales & Solution Selling: Skilled in proposal creation, contract negotiation, upsell/cross-sell, and delivering tailored IT solutions.

Communication & Collaboration: Excellent verbal and written skills; adept at presenting to executives and working seamlessly with internal teams.

CRM & Reporting: Proficient in CRM tools for tracking accounts, pipeline management, and reporting on KPIs.

Leadership & Mentoring: Mentor junior account managers and contribute to process improvements.

Behavioral Competencies: Proactive, innovative, accountable, collaborative, and trusted.





Work Schedule



8-hour shift

Morning shift

Monday to Friday

Weekends off

Observance of Philippine holiday

Permanent Work Form Home





You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:



The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Brand Designer (Premium / High-End, Australian Startup)
description:
WE ARE BUILDING SOMETHING BIG! 



We are an Australian-based startup launching a premium, app-first marketplace for buying and selling livestock and we’re looking for a top-tier Brand Designer to shape how the entire brand shows up to the world.



This is not a basic Canva role.



We want someone who understands luxury, identity and emotional brand positioning.



ABOUT THE ROLE 

You will be responsible for designing and evolving the entire visual identity of our app based platform, ensuring it feels:

Premium

Clean & minimalist

Trustworthy

Industry-leading



You’ll work directly with the founder to bring a high-end, modern brand to life across digital platforms.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING 

Develop and refine brand identity systems

Create logo variations, typography, and brand assets

Design social media creatives, ads, and campaign visuals

Assist with app and website visual direction

Produce marketing collateral (digital + print)

Maintain brand consistency across all touchpoints

Contribute creative direction (not just execution)

 

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Strong portfolio (this is critical – must show premium work)

Experience in start up branding, not just graphic design

Ability to create minimalist, modern, luxury-style visuals

High attention to detail (spacing, typography, composition)

Strong understanding of color psychology and brand tone

Ability to take direction and also think creatively

Reliable, responsive, and professional



ITS A BONUS IF YOU HAVE

Experience with marketplaces

Experience in livestock, lifestyle, or luxury brands

UI/UX or app design exposure



TOOLS & SKILLS 

Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)

Figma (preferred)

Strong layout + typography skills



WORK SETUP 

Reliable network and adequate speed   

Ongoing work for the right person

Flexible hours, but must be responsive & proactive 

Paid per project or ongoing (based on experience)



TO APPLY 

Please send us:

Your portfolio (must be high-quality branding work)

A short intro about your experience

Your rate (hourly or per project)

ANSWER THIS QUESTION; 

If you were designing a luxury livestock marketplace brand, what would you focus on first?

 

WHY JOIN US 

Be part of a startup from early stage to scale

Work on a brand positioned to lead its market and an Australian first 

Direct collaboration with founder (fast decisions, no red tape)

Opportunity for long-term role and growth

We are not looking for average.

We are building a brand that stands out.



If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you today!

title: Administrative Officer – Claims & Operations
description:
Overview: 



We are seeking a proactive, highly organised, and detail-driven Administrator to join our Head Office team at CRDN UK, part of a global restoration services network with Master Franchise operations.



This is a high-responsibility role suited for someone who thrives in a structured yet fast-paced environment and can confidently manage multiple priorities with minimal supervision.



You will take ownership of Restoration Claims Management, overseeing the full lifecycle—from allocation and administration to fulfilment, reporting, and closure. You will also play a key role in supporting Franchise operations, ensuring consistent standards and performance across territories.



This is not an entry-level role. We are looking for someone who can operate with accountability, precision, and strong organisational discipline.



Company:

CRDN UK– Restoration Services

 



CRDN UK is part of an internationally recognised restoration services brand specialising in textile, electronics, and property restoration following fire, water, and disaster damage.



As part of a Master Franchise network, we work closely with franchisees across regions, ensuring high-quality service delivery, operational excellence, and scalable growth.



Location:

Remote – Philippines



Schedule:

Full- Time I UK Business Hours



Position Type: 

Long- Term with Growth Opportunity



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage inbound calls and
s from the call centre and national accounts 

• Allocate claims to appropriate territories and ensure timely processing 

• Oversee the end-to-end claims management process (allocation, tracking, fulfilment, reporting, and closure) 

• Coordinate daily with Production and Customer Service teams to ensure seamless operations 

• Monitor Franchisee claims activity and provide performance tracking and reporting 

• Maintain accurate documentation, including filing, archiving, and legal records 

• Provide professional and timely responses to customer and stakeholder enquiries 

• Support additional administrative and operational functions across the business

title: Expert Financial Assistant/ QBO Specialist
description:
Are you SUPER ORGANIZED and Detail Oriented?





Do you have at least 2+ years of experience working US hours as an Administrative Assistant?



Do you have EXCELLENT English Skills & CONFIDENT being forward facing with clients?



If so, CONGRATS you may have just found your DREAM CAREER POSITION…



The Finance Assistant/ QBO Specialist role is a key position to support our Finance Department at Driven Inc.





Driven Inc. empowers Entrepreneurs, Experts, and Business Owners to scale their companies, amplify their voices, and build lasting legacies. We're not just a company — we're a movement that blends strategy, soul, and sales.



As we grow, we're looking for Tea
mbers who are just as passionate about making an impact as we are. If you're highly organized, client-focused, and thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, we want YOU to be part of the Driven team.





The Finance Assistant/ QBO Specialist role is a key support position. The position will be responsible for supporting a Company with spreadsheet management, project management, and basic accounting tasks in quickbooks.





You will be responsible for organizing payment information, including interfacing with clients and prospects. Professionalism and timeliness is required for this role.



We’re not so much into temporary hookups, nor we’ll treat you as a remedy to this “gap” (position) that we’re trying to fill. We’re in this together for the long run! So if you’re someone looking for a LONG TERM CAREER, here’s the benefits you can earn:



HMO

PTO

Internet allowance

Generator

Performance Reviews

...and a LOT more!



If you don’t want a long-term career with growth potential **please do NOT apply**



This is a FULL TIME 40 hours/ week position.



This is a long term career opportunity, with 13th month and benefits after 90 days of successful performance. In exchange we require an exclusive commitment, no outside project, clients, freelancing or P/T jobs.





Must be willing to work US hours. You have at least 2 years experience working US hours..





RESPONSIBILITIES FOR THIS JOB INCLUDE:



Manage incoming communications such as phone calls,
s, and mail; redirect or prioritize as appropriate.

Reviews and answers mail,
 and other inquiries assigned by Finance Manager

Serve as a point of contact for clients, providing prompt and professional service to address inquiries and ensure a positive client experience.

Assist with client onboarding and document collection to ensure compliance.

Recognizes and effectively handles confidential information on a routine basis

Establishes, maintains and updates the filing system for the finance department including filing, scanning and organizing. Retrieves information from files when needed Experience with Dropbox and Google Drive is a must

Work independently and within a team on special and ongoing projects.

Ability to multitask, and work effectively under deadlines

Admin Assistant must have the ability to take initiative, organize and complete projects with minimal direction

Project Management- prioritizing tasks & projects both large and small

Filing & organizing paperwork

Create, manage and streamline organizational systems

Arrange domestic and international travel schedules, reservations and logistics that optimize time

Able to anticipate needs

Run weekly, monthly & quarterly sales reports.

Maintain a high level of professionalism and discretion in handling information.

Accounting and clerical support

Accounts receivable

Accounts payables

Client invoicing

Payment processing

Prepare and maintain accurate accounting documents and records

Prepare bank deposits, general ledger postings, wire transfers, and statements

Research, track, and restore accounting processes, document & fix discrepancies



THE IDEAL CANDIDATE:



Has EXCELLENT English & People Skills, Professional demeanor and strong interpersonal skills.

Tech-savvy and proficient in all major platforms

At least 5 years experience with Quickbooks Online (QBO)

Clear, focused, organized, grounded, efficient, able to achieve outcomes FAST

Strong organizational and time-management skills with the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

Experience with technology & tools:

Comprehensive knowledge of Gdrive & GSuite tools

Quickbooks





NEXT STEPS:

What attracts YOU to this position & why are you the BEST candidate?

mber?

title: Motion Graphics Designer & Video Editor — Digital Marketing Agency
description:
I'm looking for a video editor who can produce short-form content in the style of Alex Hormozi and Leila Hormozi. You know the look. Fast cuts, punchy pacing, clean motion graphic overlays, and visual elements that keep viewers locked in.

Specifically, the cleanliness of this type of video:





Here's what the work involves:



Editing talking-head footage into scroll-stopping short-form content

Adding simple motion graphics, text overlays, and on-screen elements

Using AI tools for frame expansion, audio cleanup, and background enhancement

Drawing on screen, highlighting key points, and adding visual cues that make the content easier to follow

Keeping pacing tight and attention high from second one to the last frame



How to Apply

Step 1: Watch this sample footage.



Step 2: Reply with links to previous work that shows you can edit in this style. Portfolio samples are required before moving forward.

Step 3: If your portfolio is a fit, I'll pay you double your hourly rate to create a short sample edit from the footage above.

You're also welcome to go ahead and edit a sample clip upfront if you're confident in your skills. That'll move you to the front of the line.

Looking forward to seeing your work.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ THIS FIRST



[SHORT INTRO OF OUR COMPANY]



We are a Singapore based company.



Our main core business involves coaching and training a new generation of financial advisors to reach out to more people, transform more lives and build the business of their dreams.



We have coached more than 3000 Financial Advisors and have more than 8 years under our belt in doing so.



Our clients are mainly in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong and we are on track to reaching out to more of them as we speak.



Right now, We are looking for an Executive Assistant to be part of our company, and to be working directly with the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).



As the Executive Assistant of our company, you will be responsible for coordinating, planning events, communicating to the team and clients, and organising all the backend logistics and operations of the company.



More importantly, your main objective is to buy back time for the CEO.



Your position will play an important and crucial role in the team’s success.





[HOW LIFE IS GONNA LOOK LIKE FOR YOU]



You will be involved in the day to day communications and supporting the CEO directly, assisting in random tasks or any tasks that the CEO requires.





There is no limit to duties an executive assistant can handle, which is why if you are taking on this role, you must have a confident, problem-solving-can-do attitude.



We will not sugarcoat anything but here’s how it is like as well.



You WILL be in a high pressure environment that will force you to step up and grow as an individual.



There will be no bullshit beautiful lies, but rather ugly truth - although necessary - but ugly all the same that will poise you for growth.



While it might be intense, the rewards are great.



Bonuses, employee benefits and perks that will ensure you get well remunerated for your efforts.



The “work hard, play hard and work even harder mantra” is here.



Because we are going to be poised for crazy growth and expansion, you will have to put on your thinking cap, initiative and out of your comfort zone to get things done.





You'll get to attend world-class business, marketing and personal development programs for FREE and rub elbows with renowned Asian entrepreneurs and Financial Advisors.



You’ll be working with an international team, and you’ll even get to hang out with them at least once a year at our annual retreat in an exotic location.





=========

If you are remotely interested after reading the above, click here for next step:

title: Bubble.io Developer Wanted
description:
I’m building a voice-first Contractor Operating System in 
. This is a serious, long-term project that will take 5–7 months of consistent work.

I’m looking for someone who is organized, communicates clearly, and can stay focused on a big project.

What I’m looking for:

•  Strong experience with complex Bubble apps (workflows, databases, repeating groups)

•  Ability to build automated systems and smart logic

•  Someone who can show me working examples every single week

Key Features you’ll be building:

•  Voice-first workflows (talk to the app while on job sites)

•  Client red flag scoring system

•  Smart scheduling with trade dependencies

•  Daily crew check-in with mandatory photos

•  Multiple user portals (Contractor, Sub, Homeowner)

If you’re reliable, good at Bubble, and looking for steady long-term work at $6-7 per hour, reply with “Interested” and answer these 3 questions:

1.  How would you build a client red flag scoring system?

2.  How would you force crew members to upload a photo before they can clock out?

3.  How would you automatically update the schedule if one trade gets delayed?

Only serious replies will be considered.

title: Architect (Multi-Residential Experience Required) | Advanced Revit | Brisbane-Based Architecture Firm

Projects: Brisbane & South East Queensland, Australia

Paul Group Virtual is recruiting on behalf of a well-established and highly reputable Architecture Firm based in Brisbane, Queensland.



The firm specialises in multi-residential and mixed-use developments across South East Queensland and is seeking a Licensed Architect with strong multi-residential experience to join their team in a full-time offshore capacity.



This is a long-term position supporting Australian projects and working directly with senior architects and project directors.

* Proven Australian project experience

* Minimum 5+ years professional experience

* Strong multi-residential background

Project Scope

- Medium to high-density apartment developments

- Mixed-use residential buildings

You must be confident delivering accurate, buildable documentation aligned with Australian standards.

* Produce high-quality documentation using Revit

* Stable high-speed internet connection







Employment Details

Submit a complete and serious application — this role can lead to long-term work and career growth with a trusted Australian firm.

title: Part-Time Graphic Designer
description:
WE ARE HIRING: Part-Time Graphic Designer



Remote | Part-Time (Potential Full-Time Growth)

PAUL GROUP VIRTUAL



About Us



PAUL GROUP VIRTUAL is a fast-growing virtual business solutions company specializing in recruitment, operations, and digital support. We work with fast-paced clients who require high-quality, conversion-driven creative output. We are expanding our creative team and looking for a skilled Graphic Designer who can produce professional-level marketing creatives.



Position Overview



We are looking for a fast, detail-oriented Graphic Designer with strong marketing design skills. This role requires the ability to produce high-converting advertising creatives under tight deadlines.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can work fast while maintaining agency-level quality and consistency.



Key Responsibilities



Create high-quality social media graphics, ads, and marketing materials

Design branding assets including logos, promotional visuals, and campaign creatives

Replicate and improve existing high-performing ad designs and layouts

Ensure all visuals follow strong marketing and branding principles

Work closely with internal teams to interpret briefs quickly

Revise and improve outputs based on feedback while maintaining speed and accuracy



Qualifications (Strict Requirements)



Proven experience in Graphic Design

Strong portfolio showing marketing ads and promotional creatives (required)

Ability to replicate high-quality, conversion-focused advertisements similar to sample creatives provided

Must be able to produce at least 10 high-quality design outputs within a 4-hour period (speed and consistency required — applicants below this will not be considered)

Strong understanding of marketing design principles (layout, hierarchy, typography, color psychology)

Proficient in Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools

Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment

Must demonstrate ability to handle “copy-style” design work (replicating and improving existing adverts)



Preferred Skills



Experience in digital marketing and branding strategy

Experience working with multiple client styles and fast turnaround campaigns

Ability to interpret reference ads and produce improved versions quickly

Highly proactive, fast worker, and open to continuous feedback



Important Note



We are prioritizing speed + quality + marketing impact. This role requires designers who can work efficiently while maintaining strong visual and commercial standards.



How to Apply



Please send your resume, portfolio, and sample works showcasing your graphic design experience. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Zoft Clean, a US cleaning company is seeking an experienced marketing Manager to help with brand awareness and revenue generation/growth. The marketing Manager will be responsible for developing and executing comprehensive marketing strategies to attract new clients, promote the company's cleaning services, and maintain brand awareness within the local market, utilizing digital and traditional marketing tactics to achieve business growth goals, while closely collaborating with the customer service team to generate leads and convert them into customers. The Marketing manager responsibilities include tracking and analyzing the performance of advertising campaigns, managing the marketing budget and ensuring that all marketing material is in line with our brand identity. To be successful in this role, you should have hands-on experience with web analytics tools and be able to turn creative ideas into effective advertising projects. Ultimately, you will help us build and maintain a strong and consistent brand through a wide range of online and offline marketing channels.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Strategic Planning:

• Conduct market research to identify target demographics and competitor analysis. 

• Develop and implement a comprehensive marketing plan aligned with company objectives. 

• Set marketing budgets and track ROI across campaigns. 

• Brand Management:

• Maintain a consistent brand image across all marketing materials and communication channels. 

• Develop messaging and positioning that highlights the unique selling points of the cleaning services. 

• Digital Marketing:

• Develop strategies and tactics to get the word out about our company and drive qualified traffic to our front door

• Deploy successful marketing campaigns and own their implementation from ideation to execution

• Experiment with a variety of organic and paid acquisition channels like content creation, content curation, pay per click campaigns, event management, publicity, social media, lead generation campaigns, copywriting, performance analysis

• Manage the company website and optimize for search engine ranking (SEO). 

• Develop and execute paid advertising campaigns across platforms like Google Ads and social media. 

• Manage
 marketing campaigns to nurture leads and promote special offers. 

• Content Creation:

• Produce valuable and engaging content for our website and blog that attracts and converts our target groups

• Develop blog posts, case studies, and other content to educate potential customers about cleaning services. 

• Produce high-quality visual content (photos, videos) to showcase cleaning results. 

• Lead Generation:

• Develop strategies to attract new leads through online forms, website landing pages, and social media promotions. 

• Implement lead nurturing campaigns to guide potential customers through the sales funnel. 

• Customer Relationship Management:

• Build strategic relationships and partner with key industry players, agencies and vendors

• Collaborate with management team to ensure smooth customer onboarding and retention. 

• Monitor customer feedback and implement improvements based on client needs. 

• Reporting and Analysis:

• Monitor the marketing budget on a quarterly and annual basis and allocate funds wisely

• Track key marketing metrics (website traffic, lead generation, conversion rates) to measure campaign effectiveness. 

• Analyze data to identify trends and make data-driven adjustments to marketing strategies. 

• Measure and report on the performance of marketing campaigns, gain insight and assess against goals

• Analyze consumer behavior and adjust
 and advertising campaigns accordingly



JOB QUALIFICATIONS



• Minimum of 5 year’ experience work as a Marketing Manager or similar roles

• Proven experience in setting up and optimizing digital marketing, including SEO, Google Adwords, PPC, social media advertising,
 marketing, 

• Proven experience in identifying target audiences and in creatively devising and leading across channels marketing campaigns that engage, educate and motivate

• Strong understanding of web marketing analytics and reporting tools (e.g., Google Analytics, NetInsight, Omniture, WebTrends)

• Excellent communication and writing skills 

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team 

• Passion for the cleaning industry and a desire to promote a positive brand image 

• Numerically literate, comfortable working with numbers, making sense of metrics and processing figures with spreadsheets

• Up-to-date with the latest trends and best practices in online marketing and measurement

• BSc or certification in Marketing or advertising. 

• 



BENEFITS

Performance bonus

2 weeks paid vacation

title: Home Health Care Coordinator
description:
About Us:

Universal Global Management Inc. provides compassionate and professional healthcare services, specializing in home health care. We are committed to delivering high-quality care while supporting our team with structured processes and growth opportunities.

We are seeking a dedicated Care Coordinator to manage and oversee patient care for both hospice and home health services. The ideal candidate must be organized, detail-oriented, and able to effectively communicate with patients, families, and healthcare professionals.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Coordinate and manage patient care plans for hospice and/or home health services

2. Schedule and follow up on patient visits and care requirements

3. Communicate with healthcare providers, patients, and family members to ensure quality care

4. Maintain accurate and updated patient records

5. Monitor patient progress and escalate any concerns as needed

6. Ensure compliance with healthcare regulations and company policies

7. Support tea
mbers and provide guidance on care coordination processes



Requirements:

1. Proven experience in care coordination, home health, or hospice care

2. Strong communication and organizational skills

3. Ability to multitask and manage time effectively

4. Knowledge of healthcare compliance standards

5. Compassionate, professional, and detail-oriented

6. Proficient in using Google Workspace, project management tools, and scheduling software 



Preferred:

1. Previous experience in hospice care or home health care coordination

2. Formal training or hands-on experience in HIPAA compliance and healthcare documentation standards

3. Familiarity with patient management systems 

4. Licensed Registered Nurse (RN) or Bachelor’s degree in Nursing or a related healthcare field. 



Equipment Requirements:

1. Laptop or desktop computer

2. Stable internet connection

3. Backup internet connection and power supply

4. Webcam

5. Headset or earphones



Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST



How to Apply:

If you have a strong passion for providing quality hospice or home health care and want to make a positive impact on the lives of patients and their families, we encourage you to apply.



Please submit your resume with the subject title “CARE COORDINATOR” to

title: Virtual Assistant for Folly
description:
WHO WE ARE

We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS

- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Free & Full Healthcare coverage (HMO & Health Insurance)

- Free Mental Health coverage

- HAVE FUN at our team-building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila teams. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, Korean BBQ, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Customer Support: Help musicians, athletes, celebrities, and top executives on chat,
, and phones with easy, low stress questions like booking rooms or general info about their stay.

- Sales & Follow-Up (Warm Leads): No cold calling! We only reach out to guests who’ve shown interest—like those who canceled a booking—to find out what happened. We also check in with past guests to share new locations and help plan their next stay.

- Back Office: We handle scheduling, calendar management, organizing files, invoicing, and other admin tasks to keep things running smoothly.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.



To apply: 



See the vibe:

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
Video Editor & Personal Assistant – Personal Brand (TikTok & Instagram)



Niche: Day Trading | Personal Development | Miami Lifestyle

Format: Short-form video (2 minutes or under)

Hours: ~1 hour/day to start | Potential to grow into full-time

Pay: $100/month | Paid weekly or by preference | Significant growth potential tied to brand success



---



 Who You're Working With



My name is Dante. I'm 20 years old and I just moved to Miami, Florida. I trade stocks full time and I'm building a personal brand that I plan to grow into a real business — and more than that, a way to make genuine connections with like-minded people. My content covers day trading, personal development, and the lifestyle that comes with living in Miami and betting on yourself at a young age. I'm constantly working on becoming a better version of myself, and that energy runs through everything I create. I'm very easy to work with. I just ask for honest communication and reliable follow-through — that's it.



---



About the Role



I'm looking for a reliable, creative, and communicative video editor who can grow with this brand from the ground floor. This isn't just an editing job — I'm also looking for someone open to other online tasks like research, content ideas, and general assistance as the brand evolves. If you're someone who takes initiative, communicates well, and wants to be part of something that's genuinely being built, this could turn into something significant.



This starts as a part-time role (~1 hr/day), but the opportunity grows directly with the brand's success.



---



 What You'll Be Editing



Simpler edits:



- Cutting dead space and silences

- Making talking-head or lifestyle clips flow naturally and engagingly

- Adding captions, motion graphics, and on screen images where appropriate



Advanced edits (live trading videos):



- Receiving screen recordings of live trading sessions (multiple GBs of footage)

- Using provided timestamps to isolate specific trades within the recording

- Syncing a separate reaction recording with the trading footage

- Cutting and combining both into a clean, polished final video



---



 Editing Style



I want simple and clean. No cluttered editing, no flashy transitions, no overwhelming sounds or effects. The content should speak for itself. If you're someone who defaults to over-editing, this probably isn't the right fit. Less is more here.



---



 Requirements



- Fluent in English — strong reading, writing, and communication skills required

- Proficient in CapCut or any professional video editor (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

- Powerful enough computer to import and scrub through several GBs of footage smoothly

- Familiar with day trading — basic understanding and genuine interest in the topic matters

- Quick communicator — responds promptly, sets realistic timelines, and follows through every time

- Open to variety — willing to help with other online tasks like research or general assistance when needed

- Inspired, not just hired — I want someone who actually connects with the content and brings their own ideas to the table



---



The Editing Vision



I'm not looking for someone to just execute instructions. I want someone who watches my content and thinks "here's how we could make this even better." Someone who will suggest improvements to how I film, how I structure videos, and how the overall brand looks and feels. The ideal workflow looks like this: I film, drop everything into a folder with directions, and you handle the rest with minimal input needed fro
. If you can get us to that point, this role grows with you.



---



On Pay & Growth



The starting rate is $100/month (~$3/hr) for approximately 1 hour of work per day. I'm fully transparent about that. What I can also tell you is that as this brand grows, the compensation has room for significant increases. I'm not looking to underpay someone who delivers real value — the starting rate reflects where we are right now, not where we're going. If you're the right person and the brand takes off, this becomes a full-time role with real earning potential. I'll always compensate fairly for extra work beyond the standard hours.



---



 How We'll Work Together



- I drop footage and directions into a shared folder

- You edit and deliver within the agreed timeline

- You flag ideas, suggestions, and improvements along the way

- We communicate quickly and clearly — no guessing games



I'm very easy to work with. My only non-negotiables are honest communication and reliable follow-through.



---



I know this application asks for a lot, and I want to be upfront about why. I'm not looking to fill a position — I'm looking for the right person. Someone I genuinely enjoy working with and can trust long term. My plan is to incorporate this person into my businesses as they grow, and if I bring on more virtual assistants down the road, I'd want you to be the one managing them. So whether it ends up being just the two of us or a larger operation, you would be my main point of contact and someone I rely on heavily. That's exactly why I need to be thorough now — so I don't have to go through this process again. If you're the right fit, this is the beginning of something much bigger than an editing job. I appreciate you taking the time and I'm genuinely excited to see who steps up.

— Dante





 To Apply



You will be given a test task before being hired. I want to see your work firsthand.



Watch the tutorial here — (
)

Access the editing materials here — (
)



Please submit the following:



- A short video about yourself — your hobbies, your interests, what you do with your free time, what motivates you, your dreams, your ideal job and pay, and what type of work you enjoy most



- A portfolio of short-form content you've edited (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, etc.)



- Your preferred editing software



- What you watch — What type of content do you watch on TikTok or Instagram? Do you watch YouTube? Who are your favorite creators on any platform? Be completely honest, I won't judge at all



- Your completed test edit from the materials linked above



- One or two suggestions on how you'd improve the content or the filming process based on what you've seen (the goal of this style of content is to be the Juliano Massarelli of daytrading see his content here: 
)



The person who shows the most initiative, creativity, and genuine interest will be selected. I'm excited to find the right person and build something great together.

Key Responsibilities

Manage client communication via online portals,
, and virtual meetings.

Essential Skills & Experience

Hubdoc

Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.

Qualifications

Supportive and collaborative online team culture.

title: Google LSA Specialist — Home Services Agency (Full-Time | $1,000/mo + Growth)
description:
We're a US-based marketing agency that works exclusively with contractors: HVAC, plumbing, asphalt, ect. We build their websites, run their local SEO, and manage their Google ads. Our clients are tradespeople who are great at their craft but need a team behind them to keep the phone ringing.

 

We're hiring our first dedicated LSA specialist to take full ownership of 15 active Local Service Ads accounts. This is a growth position, not a task list. You'll start at $1,000/month with performance-based raises & a clear path to $1,500+/mo as your portfolio grows and results follow.

 

 

THE ROLE

 

Once a client's LSA account is handed off to you, you own it. Not "manage" it, you own it. 

Their results are your results. (what's controllable of course) 

 

That looks like: optimizing profiles so they're fully built out with strong bios, photos, correct hours, and accurate service areas. Staying ahead of document expirations, insurance, licenses, background checks, so nothing lapses and kills a live campaign. Calling into local service ad support to trouble shoot. Rating leads with detailed notes so Google's algorithm learns what a good lead looks like. Listening to call recordings to make sure owners are actually picking up the phone. Tracking performance and bringing possible solutions when something's off.

 

You'll communicate directly with our strategist & sometimes our clients. These are contractors in the US, they don't speak marketing. You need to explain things clearly, record professional Loom video updates, and write messages that a busy business owner will act on.

 

You are NOT responsible for creating LSA accounts, running onboarding calls, or setting up billing. That happens before the account reaches you.

 

 

WHO YOU ARE

 

You've managed Local Service Ads before, not just Google Ads, actual LSA. You understand verification workflows, how lead credits work, and why hours matching GBP matters. You've dealt with insurance uploads, background check delays, and license requirements that vary by state and trade.

 

More importantly, you don't wait to be told something's wrong. You're the person who flags a declining lead quality trend on Monday, not the person who finds out about it in a Friday meeting. You track your own work, keep your own accounts tight, and take pride in the results you deliver.

 

Required:

- 2+ years managing GA's or LSA

- Strong written and spoken English (you'll talk to US clients directly)

- Comfortable recording Loom videos, clear, concise, professional

- Organized enough to run minimum 15 accounts without anything falling through the cracks 

- Proactive by default, you raise flags before they become fires

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional workspace

 

Bonus:

- Google Ads (Search, PMax) or Meta Ads experience

- Experience with home service businesses

- Familiarity with call tracking platforms

- Google Ads certification

 

 

THE DETAILS

 

$1,000/month USD starting salary with performance-based bonuses & salary increases with managed account volume. Full-time, flexible hours, but you need to be available during US business hours for client communication / internal strategy calls This is a long-term position. We're building an in home team! 

 

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Start your application with the words "LSA Ready" so we know you actually read this.

 

Then answer these three things:

 

1. How many LSA accounts have you managed at once, and for what types of businesses?

2. Tell us about a time you caught a problem before it hit a client's campaign.

3. Record a Loom video introducing yourself & walking through of an LSA or CPC Campaign you're proud of.

 

No Loom, no interview. We need to hear how you communicate!

title: Sales Operations & CRM Virtual Assistant
description:
We're a sustainability consulting firm doing B2B sales with clients across international markets. Our COO leads the sales function and needs a sharp, reliable VA to run the operational side of our pipeline, keeping outreach moving, HubSpot clean, and nothing falling through the cracks.



What You'll Own

Sales Pipeline & CRM (Primary Focus)



- Manage and maintain HubSpot CRM: update contacts, log activities, move deals through stages, and flag stalled pipeline

- Build and manage outreach sequences in Lemlist; monitor performance and flag what's working

- Research target accounts and build prospect lists with context (company background, key contacts, pain points) before sales calls

- Track outreach metrics and keep pipeline dashboards up to date

- Support sales automations such as connecting tools, building workflows, keeping sequences running smoothly



Executive Support (Secondary)



- Help manage the COO's calendar and coordinate meetings across time zones

- Handle follow-up logistics so nothing gets missed between sales conversations



What We're Looking For



- Hands-on experience with HubSpot or equivalent (CRM management, not just data entry)

- Experience with outreach tools such as Lemlist, Apollo, Instantly, or similar

- Strong written English 

- Organized, proactive, and comfortable working independently

- Bonus: experience with B2B sales support or consulting environments

title: Product Lister/Relister - Shopify Full-time Dropshipping
description:
We run an established home decor e-commerce brand that sells through Google Shopping and Google Ads. We're looking for a detail-oriented Product Lister to join full-time and get fully onboarded into our operations.

What You'll Be Doing

You'll be responsible for listing and maintaining our product catalog. This means adding new products, updating titles, descriptions, inventory levels, SKUs, and pricing, and making small ongoing adjustments to keep everything accurate and optimized. You should be able to comfortably process 50 products within 2.5 hours at a high standard.

Beyond the data side, you'll also be responsible for maintaining the visual quality of our storefront. That includes building clean, professional-looking theme pages and ensuring every product listing looks polished and on-brand for a home decor audience.

What We're Looking For:



Absolutely Required

Previous experience listing products for established e-commerce brands (experience with Google Shopping or Google Merchant Center is a strong plus)

High proficiency with Kopy for writing and optimizing detailed product listings

Proficiency using Gemini to generate AI product images that feel consistent and branded — not generic or stock-looking





Highly Preferred

Strong eye for visual detail — you care about how a page looks and can spot when something feels off

Extreme attention to detail with product data (titles, descriptions, pricing, SKUs, inventory)

Reliable, self-motivated, and comfortable working independently once onboarded



About the Role

This is a full-time position. The initial phase will focus on onboarding you into our brand so you understand our standards, workflows, and what "good" looks like. From there, you'll own the product listing process end-to-end.

How to Apply

Please include a portfolio or links to stores you've previously worked on so we can see your listing quality firsthand. Reply with the word LOVEDOMU if you're interested and meet the requirements above.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!!!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Senior Media Buyer (Facebook & Google Ads) - REMOTE
description:
Company Overview

At LevelUp, we believe growth happens when people feel trusted, supported, and challenged. For more than seven years we’ve partnered with agencies, software vendors and website owners to provide world class outsourcing and offshore hiring services in a range of verticals, such as technical, operational, and back-office support. We hire curious problem-solvers, give them room to own outcomes, and back them with systems, support and a culture that makes learning part of the job. Join us and help businesses (and your career) level up.



Position Overview

We are seeking a high-caliber Senior Media Buyer who functions as a technical architect within the Meta and Google Ads ecosystems. We need a specialist who manages platforms with confidence, navigates complex technical setups, and has a proven track record of scaling significant ad spend. The ideal candidate is ready to contribute from Day 1, bringing precision, technical mastery, and strategic rigor.



Key Responsibilities



Technical Execution

•Own end-to-end technical setup and optimization of campaigns on Meta (FB/IG) and Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping)

•Build and manage complex ad units, including manual carousel builds, dynamic product ads (DPA), and catalog sales

•Plan, execute, and optimize high-performing PPC campaigns across all platforms

 

Optimization & Analysis 

•Rigorously monitor and adjust bidding strategies, audience segments, and funnel structures to meet ROAS and CPA targets

•Analyze campaign data, extract insights, and provide strategic recommendations to improve ROI

•Conduct A/B testing on ad creatives, targeting, and bidding strategies

 

Data & Tracking 

•Advanced management of Google Analytics, Meta Pixel, and API conversions to ensure data integrity

•Track performance using platform-specific dashboards and analytics tools

•Set up and optimize conversion tracking, remarketing campaigns, and audience segmentation

 

Budget Management

•Manage ad budgets effectively, ensuring campaigns are on track with pacing, spend, and target KPIs (CTR, CPC, ROAS, CPA)

•Confidently manage and pace large-scale monthly budgets across multi-million dollar lifetime spends

 

Creative & Collaboration

•Create compelling ad copy and work closely with design teams to produce engaging creatives

•Prepare and deliver detailed performance reports to clients and stakeholders

•Stay current with industry trends, platform updates, and emerging best practices



Qualifications (Must-Haves):

•Minimum 5+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads and
 Ads campaigns

•Proven experience managing significant ad spend ($1M+ annually)

•Deep, native understanding of Meta Business Manager and Google Ads platforms

•Proven track record of driving tangible conversions (leads/sales) at scale

•Skilled in setting up and optimizing conversion tracking, remarketing, and audience segmentation

•Strong analytical mindset and proficiency in analytics tools (Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, etc.)

•Excellent communication and collaboration skills

•Ability to walk through account structures and results during the interview process



Nice to Haves:

•Active Meta Blueprint or Google Ads certifications (certified is not required -  proven experience matters more)

•Experience in eCommerce (B2C) or high-volume B2B lead generation

•Proficiency in TikTok Ads or programmatic buying

•Advanced tracking, remarketing architecture, and attribution modeling

•Exceptional copywriting skills for ad creatives

•Recent experience in high-growth tech environments, agencies, or "Big Tech"



More Info:

•Competitive Salary

•Fully remote work arrangement

•Role follows Pacific Time (US) Business Hours

•Daylight Savings (PDT): 11:00 PM – 8:00 AM Manila Time

•Standard Time (PST): 12:00 AM – 9:00 AM Manila Time



APPLY HERE:

title: Amazon FBA Seller Central Marketing Analyst / Manager / Specialist
description:
Amazon FBA Seller Central Marketing Analyst / Manager / Specialist



+4 Years Amazon Experience Required



This is a unique opportunity for an organized and entrepreneurially-minded Amazon Manager to join our team and help operate and grow startup and household name client brands. As an Amazon Manager, you will be ideating and executing growth strategies while optimizing the Amazon presence of our rapidly growing portfolio of client products and brands.



This is a full time remote role.



What you’ll be doing:



Playing an integral role in designing and building a best-in-class Amazon presence for a set of companies from our diverse brand portfolio.



Creating and continually optimizing listings, as well as troubleshooting and fixing issues as they arise.



Developing marketing strategies across our portfolio of brands, and coordinating with stakeholders as needed to execute.



Managing promotions (coupons, deals) and PPC advertising campaigns.



Analyzing Amazon data (sales, conversation rate, sessions, etc.) to determine why certain products are trending up or down and developing strategies to increase conversions and sales.



Resolving issues that come up (listing take downs, content not publishing, catalog errors, etc.) and escalating to internal stakeholders as needed.



Developing and maintaining a professional knowledge of new or emerging trends within the Amazon and online shopping space. You’ll constantly research opportunities for improvement to drive traffic and conversion growth.





Attending weekly meetings to communicate needs and resolve issues.





Your profile / Must Have:



In-depth knowledge of Amazon Seller Central and FBA processes. +4 Years experience with a track record of success.

Comprehensive understanding of Amazon and Seller Central, best practices, along with policies and guidelines. Flat file expert.



Proven experience as an Amazon Virtual Assistant or in a similar role.

Experience in Amazon detail page optimization, listing management, SEO marketing, and PPC

Excellent organizational and analytical skills, as well as a hands-on mentality.

Excellent communications and customer service skills

Excellent English (speaking and writing)

Creative thinker



Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and make informed decisions. Top notch problem solving skills.



Attention to detail. Self-motivated and able to work independently.

Good with Excel, Google Sheets, and formulas

Proficient in using Google Drive for collaborative tasks.





Nice to Have



Experience with graphic design / photoshop or similar software



Experience with social media marketing



Experience with Walmart Seller Central





About us

We are a full-service agency that works with brands and manufactures to grow their sales and profit on Amazon both in the US and globally. Additionally, we own a handful of private label brands that we own and operate ourselves.

This is a remote position, and candidates from all locations are welcome to apply. We offer flexible working hours and opportunities for professional growth within our organization.



To apply, please submit your resume and a cover letter outlining your relevant experience and why you are interested in this position. We look forward to reviewing your application!
