title: HR and Onboarding Specialist
description:
ABOUT SUNSENT



SunSent is a fast-growing U.S.-based solar and roofing company. As we continue to scale, we are strengthening our internal systems, team structure, and employee experience.



We are looking for a highly organized, process-driven HR & Onboarding Specialist who can build, manage, and optimize our people operations across both our U.S. and Philippines teams.



COMPENSATION



• $170–$300/week (depending on experience)

• Part-time: 20 hours/week

• Paid weekly



ROLE OVERVIEW



As our HR & Onboarding Specialist, you will own and manage the end-to-end employee lifecycle, ensuring a smooth, structured, and consistent experience from hiring to ongoing team support.



You will:

• Lead end-to-end onboarding for U.S. employees (in-house & subcontractors) and PH remote team

• Refine HR processes, SOPs, and policies

• Support and execute recruitment and hiring processes

• Conduct and track performance check-ins and evaluations

• Handle employee relations (IRs) with professionalism and structure

• Track and manage PTO, attendance, and HR records

• Ensure alignment and communication across departments

• Support leadership with HR reporting and insights



You will work closely with leadership and report directly to the Chief of Staff.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS



• Proven experience in HR, People Operations, or Talent Management

• Strong experience in onboarding, hiring, and HR process creation

• Experience managing remote and/or international teams (U.S. + PH preferred)

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through

• Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

• Experience with HR tools, ATS platforms, or workforce tracking systems

• Ability to handle confidential information with professionalism

• Comfortable working U.S. Central Time Zone hours



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience in solar, roofing, construction, or service-based industries

• Familiarity with EOS (Entrepreneurial Operating System)

• Experience supporting fast-growing startups or scaling teams



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR



We are specifically looking for someone who is:

• Process-driven and highly structured

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Strong in execution and accountability

• Proactive and solutions-focused

• Calm, professional, and people-centered

• Able to balance compliance with culture and team experience



This is a high-impact role where you will help build the foundation of our HR systems as we scale.



HOW TO APPLY



To apply, please submit:

• Your updated resume

• A short message describing your HR and onboarding experience

• Any experience supporting U.S. teams or remote teams



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



WHY JOIN SUNSENT?



• Be part of a fast-growing U.S. company

• Help build and shape HR systems from the ground up

• Opportunity to grow into a full-time HR leadership role

title: Virtual Assistant for Folly
description:

We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS

- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city, you’re free!

- Low stress, no burnout

- Minimum of 24 days off a year. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms

- Free & Full Healthcare coverage (HMO & Health Insurance)

- Free Mental Health coverage

- HAVE FUN at our team-building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila teams. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, Korean BBQ, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



- Customer Support: Help musicians, athletes, celebrities, and top executives on chat,
, and phones with easy, low stress questions like booking rooms or general info about their stay.

- Sales & Follow-Up (Warm Leads): No cold calling! We only reach out to guests who’ve shown interest—like those who canceled a booking—to find out what happened. We also check in with past guests to share new locations and help plan their next stay.

- Back Office: We handle scheduling, calendar management, organizing files, invoicing, and other admin tasks to keep things running smoothly.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.

title: Google Apps Script Developer (Part-Time | Automation & Systems Build)
description:
Job Title: Google Apps Script Developer (Part-Time | Automation & Systems Build)



We are building an advanced internal system for an Amazon-based e-commerce business and are looking for a skilled Google Apps Script developer to help build, improve, and stabilize our workflows.



This is not a beginner role. You will be working on real systems tied to operations, inventory, and financial tracking.



What You’ll Be Working On:

Google Sheets automation (Apps Script)

Building and improving workflows across multiple sheets

Debugging and fixing existing scripts

 parsing (Gmail ? PDF ? Drive workflows)

Data processing and movement between systems

Creating clean, modular, and scalable code

What We’re Looking For:

Strong experience with Google Apps Script

Comfortable working with Google Sheets automation at scale

Ability to write clean, structured, and modular code

Strong problem-solving skills (not just copying code)

Ability to follow clear instructions and execute independently

Bonus (Not Required but Valuable):

Experience with Amazon SP-API or working with Amazon reports/data

Experience with APIs, authentication, and data integrations

Experience building internal tools or automation systems

Work Structure:

Part-time: ~20 hours per week

Initial project scope: 6–8 weeks

If performance is strong, there will be ongoing work and additional projects available

How We Work:

Clear weekly task assignments and priorities

Focus on building and improving real systems (not busy work)

Structured communication (weekly check-ins, async updates)

Development work is done in a test environment before deployment

Emphasis on clean, maintainable code—not quick hacks

What Success Looks Like:

You can take a defined task and execute it with minimal back-and-forth

You write code that is clean, modular, and easy to understand

You identify potential issues before they become problems

You recognize opportunities to improve or extend the system and communicate them clearly

You contribute to making the overall system more efficient and scalable

Ideal Candidate:

Detail-oriented and reliable

Comfortable working independently

Takes ownership of their work

Communicates clearly when something is unclear or broken

Thinks beyond the immediate task and can suggest improvements or additional capabilities when appropriate

Important:



To be considered, your application must begin with the phrase:



“Purple Plantain”



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be reviewed.



To Apply:



Please include the following in your message:



A brief summary of your experience with Google Apps Script (specific examples)

1–3 examples of projects or code you’ve built (links, screenshots, or explanation)

In 2–3 sentences, explain how you would prevent duplicate rows in a Google Sheet using Apps Script

Your hourly rate and weekly availability



We value clear thinking and practical problem-solving over copy-paste solutions.

title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description:
LED Trucking Inc., managed by Sacramento Managing Company, is seeking a highly detail-oriented and operationally disciplined Accounts Payable Specialist (Independent Contractor) to support financial operations with a primary focus on driver settlements, transaction processing, and account reconciliation. This role is structured as an independent contractor engagement and is responsible for delivering defined financial and operational outputs within a high-volume, asset-based transportation environment. The contractor will operate with a high level of autonomy while adhering to company-defined processes, timelines, and quality standards. The position reports functionally to the Head of Finance Division for workflow alignment and deliverables oversight.



 Job Responsibilities: 

Perform end-to-end driver settlement calculations in accordance with company policies and contractual structures

Manage communication with drivers regarding settlement inquiries, discrepancies, and issue resolution

Enter and maintain financial transactions within QuickBooks and TMS systems with a high degree of accuracy

Execute account control functions including transaction matching, verification, and closing of accounts

Maintain categorization and documentation of financial transactions in compliance with internal standards

Prepare and provide reports related to settlements, account activity, and financial records upon request

Identify discrepancies, escalate issues, and support resolution across Finance and Operations

Maintain audit-ready documentation and comply with internal financial controls and procedures

Perform additional accounting-related tasks tied to settlements and financial recordkeeping as required

All other duties, as assigned





Talent Requirements:

Minimum of two (2) years prior experience in accounts payable, accounting operations, or financial administration (transportation/logistics preferred)

Strong working knowledge of QuickBooks and transactional accounting processes

Experience with TMS platforms and high-volume financial environments preferred

High attention to detail and ability to maintain accuracy under volume

Strong organizational and time-management skills with the ability to meet defined deadlines

Effective communication skills, particularly in handling driver-facing financial discussions

Ability to independently manage workload while adhering to defined processes and KPIs

Contractor must maintain their own work environment, equipment, and connectivity

Strong general business acumen

Able to demonstrate professional phone etiquette

Demonstrate a high customer service commitment

Strong analytical skills – ability to assess, design, and sell a given solution

Ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously and maintain composure under pressure in a fast paced environment

title: Experienced Funnel Builder (E-commerce / Dropshipping)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-scaling e-commerce company running dropshipping dropshipping stores across the European market. Our focus is on building high-converting funnels and aggressively scaling winning products.

We are looking for an experienced Funnel Builder who understands what makes funnels convert — not just how to build them.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for building and optimizing high-converting funnels (in a proven to work template made by us).

This role is for someone who understands buyer psychology, and can execute fast.



Key Responsibilities

- Build complete sales funnels using Funnelish (from scratch)

- Build advertorials for the sales pages

- Connect the funnels to our shopify page

- Connect the funnels to WeTracked





Requirements

- Proven experience building high-converting e-commerce funnels (preferably in dropshipping)

- Strong experience with Funnelish or similar tools

- Ability to work independently and execute without constant guidance

- Strong attention to detail and problem-solving mindset

- Good understanding of customer personas

- Perfect English communication skills

Fast internet connection



What We’re Looking For

- Someone who understands why a funnel works, not just how to build it

- Fast execution and ability to iterate quickly

- Performance-driven mindset (focused on results, not just design)

- Reliable and consistent long-term partner



What We Offer

- Long-term collaboration (not a short-term gig)

- Good pay (based on experience)

- Paid holiday leaves (in the long run)

- Performance-based bonuses

- Opportunity to grow into a key role within the company



How to Apply



Please include:

- Examples of funnels you have built (with results if possible)

- A short intro about yourself

- Funnel Building tools you are most experienced with

- Your experience in e-commerce / dropshipping



Important: Start your application with the word "strawberry" so we know you read everything and you are serious about this job.

title: Odoo Systems Expert— Part-Time VA Click ACS · Westbury Enterprises Pty Ltd Remote | Part-Time | Monday to Friday | AEST
description:
About Us

Click ACS is a nationally scaling, majority Aboriginal-owned aged care services provider based in Port Macquarie, NSW. We support approximately 756 active clients across eight regions through domestic assistance, garden maintenance, and social transport services.

Odoo is our single source of truth. It runs our task management, client records, systemization, reporting, and team operations. As we scale, we need someone who can make it work harder.



The Role

This is a hands-on, execution-focused Odoo role. You will work directly with our Admin Manager and Tech Lead to configure, optimise, and automate our Odoo environment. We are not looking for a consultant — we need someone who builds, documents, and delivers.



What You Will Do



Configure and maintain Odoo modules across CRM, Contacts, Projects, Planning, Documents, Knowledge, E-learning, Purchase, and Discuss

Build workflow automations, automated task reminders, and activity tracking

Design and maintain dashboards and reports for operational visibility

Support data migration and deduplication from ServiceM8 and Google Sheets into Odoo

Support integration work with third-party platforms (primarily ServiceM8)

Document every build in Odoo Knowledge — if it only works because you're holding it, it's not finished

Proactively flag gaps, limitations, and automation opportunities — we do not wait to be told





Must-Have Technical Skills



Odoo 17, 18, or 19 Enterprise Edition — hands-on, not just familiarity

Demonstrated experience across: CRM, Contacts, Projects, Planning, Documents, Knowledge, E-learning, Purchase, and Discuss

Automation and workflow setup within Odoo

Reporting and dashboard configuration and maintenance

Automated task reminders and activity tracking setup

Strongly Preferred



Odoo 19 Enterprise specific experience

Integration experience with ServiceM8 or similar field service software

Data migration and deduplication experience

Background supporting a services business





Practical Requirements

Part-time, Monday to Friday

Minimum 4 hours overlap with AEST business hours daily

Responsive on Slack and Odoo during overlap hours



Portfolio or examples of Odoo work built or maintained — required with application





How to Apply

Send your application to 
 with the subject line: Odoo Systems Expert— [Your Name]

Please include:



A brief introduction and what you bring to this role

Your Odoo version experience (Enterprise editions specifically)

Modules you have configured hands-on

Portfolio or examples of Odoo builds, automations, or dashboards

Your available hours and timezone overlap with AEST

Applications without an Odoo portfolio will not be progressed.

title: Remote Appointment Setter – Travel Industry
description:
We are hiring remote appointment setters to present and sell exclusive travel experiences for a US-based vacation program. If you’ve been wanting a role where you can work comfortably from home, save on rising daily expenses, avoid long commutes, and still grow your income, this could be a great fit for you.



Who This Is For



This role may be a great fit if you:

-Enjoy talking to people and making genuine connections

-Take pride in doing your work well, even when working independently

-Are looking for a long-term remote opportunity with growth potential

-Appreciate the flexibility of being at home while still staying productive





Requirements

-Excellent spoken English

-Friendly and confident communication skills on the phone

-Own computer and stable internet (minimum 25mbps)

-Quiet and professional workspace

-Ability to work US business hours

-Comfortable learning and using CRM systems

-Goal-oriented and willing to improve consistently





Responsibilities

-Reach out to warm leads via call,
, and text

-Help prepare prospects for their scheduled presentations

-Follow up with no-shows in a professional and helpful way

-Keep CRM records updated after each interaction





Preferred Experience

-Sales or telemarketing

-BPO or call center background

-Travel or hospitality industry experience





Compensation

-Training Period (First 3-4 Months)

US$400/month training allowance

Paid bi-monthly

Monthly evaluation based on participation, effort, and progress

-After Training 

Earn commission, no cap

OTE: US$1,200/month

Our top performers earn US$2,500+





Work Schedule

-26–27 business days per month (option to work more for higher earnings)

-Monday to Friday

8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (8:00 PM – 5:00 AM PHL) or 

12:00 PM - 9:00 PM EST (12:00 MN - 9:00 AM PHL)





Why Many People Appreciate This Role

-Work from the comfort of your home

-Save time and money by avoiding daily travel

 subject line and mention it in your voice/video recording.

title: Electrical Estimator / Electrical Engineer
description:
Job Title: Electrical Estimator / Electrical Engineer 



Company Overview:

We are a Los Angeles based electrical distributor and wholesaler established in 2004, supplying contractors and developers with electrical materials for residential, commercial, and industrial projects. We are an authorized distributor for major brands including Siemens and other leading manufacturers, providing a full range of electrical solutions.



This is a long-term opportunity with consistent and ongoing work. We are not looking for occasional support. We need someone reliable who can handle a steady volume of projects and grow with our team.



Position Overview:

We are seeking an experienced Electrical Estimator / Electrical Engineer who can review electrical drawings and provide accurate material takeoffs and cost estimates. This role also requires strong technical knowledge and the ability to support both internal staff and clients.



Key Responsibilities:



Review electrical plans and drawings and prepare detailed estimates

Perform material takeoffs for:

• Switchboards

• Metering Panels

• Lighting Systems

Ensure all materials meet project specifications and requirements

Analyze electrical systems and provide accurate, code-compliant solutions

Provide technical support to internal staff

Assist with client questions and communicate technical details clearly

Work closely with the team to ensure fast and accurate turnaround on quotes



Mandatory Requirements:



Must be able to work 5 hours per day, 5 days per week (starting schedule)

Must be able to fully accommodate PST (Los Angeles) business hours and remain responsive during this time

Strong understanding of U.S. electrical standards and codes

Strong knowledge of power distribution fundamentals, including:

• Three-phase systems

• Voltage regulation

• Protection schemes

• Electrical system analysis

Experience in industrial, commercial, and construction projects

In-depth knowledge of:

• Transformers

• Switchgear

• Circuit breakers

• Protective devices

Ability to read and interpret electrical drawings accurately

Ability to ensure all designs and materials meet U.S. project requirements and compliance standards



Communication Requirements:



Must be able to speak and write clear English

Must be able to communicate effectively with U.S.-based staff and clients



Compensation:



Starting: $430/month based on 25 hours per week (5 hours per day, 5 days per week)

Schedule must align with PST (Los Angeles) business hours

After performance review: $690–$700/month based on full-time (40 hours per week, 5 days per week)



Important Notes:



This is a long-term role with consistent daily work

Candidate must be reliable, detail-oriented, and able to handle multiple projects

Opportunity to transition into a full-time role based on performance



Experience working with U.S. contractors, developers, or distributors preferred

Familiarity with quoting materials for U.S.-based projects is a must

title: Virtual Receptionist – Remote
description:
Virtual Receptionist – Boutique Hotels in Panama

Remote · Salaried · Long-Term · Freelance / Independent Contractor



Join a professional hospitality team managing 6 boutique hotels in Boquete, Panama — one of Central America's most beautiful mountain destinations. We're looking for warm, organized people who genuinely enjoy taking care of guests, and who can commit to a real long-term role, not a side gig.

Before you apply, please make sure you can check all four boxes:



-  Fluent English, written and spoken (C1 / IELTS 7+)

-  20+ Mbps stable internet, quiet workspace, laptop + headset

-  Comfortable with rotating shifts including weekends, holidays, and eventual night coverage

-  Available for PH nighttime training hours (9 PM – 5:30 AM PH) for the first 2–3 weeks



If all four are a yes, we'd love to hear from you. Keep reading.



About Us

Villa Alejandro is a professional hospitality management company operating 6 boutique hotels in Boquete, Panama. We manage 60+ units with a trained remote team, structured systems, and thorough onboarding. We are not a single Airbnb host. We are a professional hotel brand.

Learn more: 
/en/



The Role

You'll be the first point of contact for international guests — handling inquiries, reservations, check-in coordination, and concierge support through WhatsApp,
, and OTA platforms (
, Airbnb, etc.). This is not a generic VA role. This is hospitality.



Schedule — PLEASE READ CAREFULLY

Rotating shifts, 5 days/week (40 paid hours), including weekends and holidays. Each shift is 8 paid hours + 30 min unpaid break.

ShiftPanama Time (UTC-5)Philippine Time (UTC+8)Morning8:00 AM – 4:30 PM9:00 PM – 5:30 AMAfternoon3:00 PM – 11:30 PM4:00 AM – 12:30 PMNight (launching soon)Overnight coverage, ~8 hrsPhilippine daytime



You must be flexible for all shifts, including the night shift once it launches

Optional 6th day with proportional extra pay

Shifts rotate fairly across the team



Onboarding — IMPORTANT

First 2–3 weeks: paid live training by our on-site receptionist in Boquete during Panama daytime hours. This means Philippine nighttime hours (approx. 9 PM – 5:30 AM PH). After training, you move to the regular rotation. Full support until you're ready to go solo.

Compensation

This is a long-term salaried position — not hourly, not gig work.



$700/month starting (40 hrs/week)

Performance and salary review at 3 months

Top performers reach $850+/month within 6 months

Optional 6th day with proportional extra pay

Paid weekly or bi-weekly via PayPal or bank transfer — no fees



What You'll Do

- Guest communication via WhatsApp (incl. voice notes),
, and OTAs

- Reservation handling, updates, cancellations, special requests

- Check-in instructions and arrival guidance

- Concierge: tours, restaurants, transport, spa in Boquete

- Organized shift notes and handovers

- Tools: Google Workspace, WhatsApp Business, OTA dashboards



What We're Looking For

- C1-level English or equivalent (IELTS 7+, native-like written fluency)

- Hospitality mindset — "guest experience," not just "customer service"

- Highly organized — creates clean documentation without being asked

- Works independently and takes ownership

- Quiet workspace, stable 20+ Mbps internet, laptop/desktop, headset

- Comfortable with Google Sheets, calendars, messaging apps

- Fully flexible for all rotating shifts incl. weekends and holidays



Strongly Preferred

Previous professional experience in one of the following is the fastest path into this role:

- Hotels — front desk, reservations, guest services, concierge

- Short-term rental / Airbnb property management companies

- Travel and tourism — travel agencies, tour operators

- Airlines — reservations, ticketing, ground staff

- Customer service for hospitality accounts — BPO/call center work where your account was a hotel chain, 
, Expedia, Agoda, or an airline



If you don't have this background but believe you'd be a great fit, we still want to hear from you. In your application, tell us clearly why you think you'd excel at guest-facing hospitality work — what transferable skills you bring, and why hospitality is the direction you want to grow. The best members of our current team came in without hotel experience. What they had was a clear story about why they'd be great at it.



Nice to Have

- Experience with Cloudbeds, Hostaway, Guesty, Sabre, Amadeus, or any hotel PMS

- 
 / Airbnb / OTA extranet experience

- Spanish (any level) — Villa Alejandro is in Panama and many guests speak Spanish. Even basic conversational Spanish is a real plus.



Why Join Villa Alejandro?

- 2–3 week paid onboarding — we invest in you

- Long-term salaried role with a growing professional hotel brand

- Small, high-quality team focused on reliability and guest satisfaction

- Clear systems and ongoing support

- Growth as we expand to new properties

- Salary increases based on performance



How to Apply

Send to: 

Subject line: VR Application – [Your Full Name]



Your updated CV

Answer this scenario in 2–3 sentences:



- A guest at 11 PM says the AC in their room isn't working. They're upset and demand either a full refund or to be moved to another room tonight. The property is fully booked. Maintenance can't arrive until 8 AM. What do you do?



- Confirm you're OK with PH nighttime training hours during the first 2–3 weeks.

If you don't have hospitality, travel, or OTA/hotel BPO experience, add 2–3 sentences telling us why you'd still be a great fit for this role.



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted directly. Serious applicants only.

Looking forward to your application!

title: Instagram Carousel Designer — Wedding Photography Studio
description:
Instagram Carousel Designer — Wedding Photography Studio



We're a wedding photography and videography studio based in Vancouver, BC looking for a detail-oriented carousel designer to help us create Instagram carousels from our wedding galleries.



What the job looks like



You'll be given access to a wedding gallery and a template, and your job is to go through the photos, select the best ones, and assemble them into 3–5 carousels with about 15-20 images per carousel per wedding. We have roughly 30 weddings to work through, so there's plenty of consistent work. Expect 2–3 carousels per week, which works out to around 2–10 hours of work weekly.



This is not a job where you download a bunch of photos and throw them together. We care deeply about how our work is presented. The right person will have a genuine eye for which photos pair well together — in terms of color, contrast, negative space, framing, and visual flow — and will know how to sequence them so each carousel tells a complete story from slide to slide.



What we're looking for



Experience creating Instagram carousels, ideally in the wedding or photography space

Strong eye for photo selection, sequencing, and visual storytelling

Comfortable working in Canva or SCRL

Detail-oriented when it comes to exporting and organizing files in Google Drive

Able to work independently with minimal supervision

Submits completed work each week



How it works



We'll start with a paid working interview — we'll walk you through our expectations, provide a template, and have you complete one test carousel so we can see how you work.

Pay is $30 CAD per wedding (3–5 carousels), which works out to roughly $50–$100 CAD per week depending on volume.

Work is fully async. You set your own schedule as long as work is submitted weekly.



To apply



Take a look at our Instagram before 

If our aesthetic feels like something you can match or elevate, we'd love to hear from you. Send us a short intro and any examples of carousel or social media work you've done.



If you do not have wedding-related experience or similar relevant experience, please do not apply. This is not a position for someone who is just learning - we are looking for someone who can make an immediate impact right away 



Also, Only apply through
 by
ing me directly at: 

If you apply via instagram, you will likely be ignored. Please make the
 subject line:  ICD- YOUR NAME, followed by a description about the weather in your city and information about your experience and links to relevant work 



We look forward to partnering with you and joining our exciting team!

description:

You'll work directly with the founder producing short-form vertical videos (TikTok, Reels,
) in the health/wellness/natural remedies niche. Think: scroll-stopping hooks, expressive AI characters, and cinematic B-roll — all generated, not filmed.

This is a long-term, ongoing role with consistent work for the right person.



What You'll Be Doing:



Generating realistic AI talking-head UGC videos from scripts (lip-sync, gestures, facial expressions)

Creating AI B-roll sequences that match specific moods, styles, and visual direction

Building and maintaining consistent AI characters/personas across multiple videos

Writing and refining prompts to get the highest quality output from AI video tools

Working smart with credits — maximizing quality while being efficient with generations

Keeping up with the latest AI video tools, updates, and techniques





You're a Perfect Fit If:



You've already made AI UGC-style videos — not just played with the tools, but actually produced content

You know the difference between a stiff AI generation and one that actually looks natural and alive

You've used Veo (Google Flow), Kling, Runway, Pika, HeyGen, D-ID, or similar tools

You understand short-form content — hooks, pacing, energy, what makes people stop scrolling

You're obsessed with detail — bad lip-sync, weird hands, uncanny valley stuff bothers you

You can work independently, take creative direction, and deliver without hand-holding

Bonus: you've created AI content in the health, wellness, or beauty niche





Job Details:



Type: full-time

I want to see your work, not just your words.



Short intro — who you are, your experience with AI video tools

Show me 1–3 AI-generated UGC videos you've made — Google Drive links, portfolio links, or even screen recordings of your Veo/Kling outputs. This is the most important part.

title: PERSONAL ASSISTANT (REMOTE – PART-TIME, PROACTIVE + NUMBERS-FOCUSED)
description:
We are looking for a highly proactive and detail-oriented Personal Assistant to support a busy homeschooling family and entrepreneur.



This is not a role where you wait for instructions.



We are looking for someone who takes initiative, thinks ahead, and actively looks for ways to make life easier.



The right person will regularly ask:



“Dom, how can I make your job easier today?”

—and then take action.



?



Key Responsibilities:



 • Track and manage monthly bills (due dates, amounts, confirmations)

 • Assist with bill pay and ensure nothing is missed

 • Maintain and update financial tracking spreadsheets

 • Provide clear monthly updates on spending and financial goals

 • Create and manage grocery shopping lists and assist with ordering (Instacart or similar)

 • Identify patterns or areas to improve organization and efficiency

 • Schedule appointments (haircuts, family needs, etc.)

 • Conduct light research when needed

 • Assist with simple Canva edits (homeschool materials, printables)

 • Keep tasks, reminders, and priorities organized



?



What We’re Looking For:



 • You are a self-starter who takes initiative without being told

 • You are comfortable with numbers, tracking, and spreadsheets

 • You notice things before being asked (missed bill, low groceries, upcoming task)

 • You are organized, reliable, and detail-oriented

 • You communicate clearly and consistently

 • You follow through and take ownership of your work

 • You are trustworthy with personal and financial information



?



Preferred (Not Required):



Experience with:

 • Canva

 • Google Sheets / Excel

 • Monarch Money (or similar budgeting tools)

 • Instacart (or grocery ordering platforms)

 • Asana (or task management tools)



?



This Role is NOT for You If:



 • You wait for instructions instead of taking action

 • You need constant supervision

 • You struggle with organization or deadlines



?



Schedule:



 • Part-time (5-10 hours per week)

 • Must have some overlap with EST but can do most tasks on your own time



Pay:

 • $4/hour

 • Paid twice monthly



?



To Apply:



Please include:



 1. A short written introduction

 2. Your experience with spreadsheets, bill tracking, or financial organization

 3. Your availability (in EST)

 4. A link to your resume

 5. A 1–2 minute video introduction answering the questions below



?



???? Video Introduction Questions:



 1. Tell me about yourself and your experience

 2. How do you stay organized when managing multiple tasks?

 3. How would you ensure bills and deadlines are never missed?

 4. What does being proactive mean to you?

 5. If you were working with me, how would you make my life easier?



?



Subject Line: Proactive Personal Assistant – [Your Name]



?



Important:

Start your application with:

“Jackie, here’s how I would make your life easier…”



(Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.)

title: Senior UK B2B Lead Researcher (Decision-Maker Data for Sales Outreach)
description:
Applications without clear explanation of their verification process will not be considered



We are a UK-based language services agency specializing in interpreting and translation services for professional organisations.

We are looking for a highly experienced B2B lead researcher to support our sales outreach efforts by building high-quality, verified contact lists of UK decision-makers.

This is a project-based / ongoing role (not full-time) depending on business needs. The data you provide will be used directly for cold calling and personalized
 outreach, so accuracy and quality are extremely important.



Responsibilities:

• Research UK organisations in target sectors such as:

• Law firms (solicitors, legal offices)

• Schools and universities

• Private healthcare clinics

• Mental health services

• Social services and charities

• Construction and corporate services

• Identify real decision-makers responsible for interpreting and translation services, such as:

• Office Managers

• Practice Managers

• Admin Managers

• Procurement Officers

• Operations Managers

• Collect and verify accurate B2B contact data including:

• Company name

• Contact person name

• Job title

• Verified business

• Phone number (direct or switchboard where available)

• Company address

• Ensure data is:

• Up to date

• Verified (not guessed or scraped)

• Relevant to decision-making roles

• Deliver clean, structured spreadsheets ready for sales outreach







 IMPORTANT QUALITY STANDARD:

We are NOT looking for bulk or scraped data.

We only accept verified, real, decision-maker-level leads suitable for cold calling and direct
 outreach.

All data will be checked. Low-quality or unverified data will be rejected.



REQUIREMENTS:

• Minimum 3–5+ years’ experience in B2B lead generation or data research

• Proven experience sourcing decision-maker contacts (not generic databases)

• Strong understanding of UK business structures

• Experience using:

• LinkedIn

• Google Sheets

•
 verification / enrichment tools (e.g. Hunter, Apollo, etc.)

• Ability to verify contact accuracy (not just collect data)

• Strong attention to detail

• Fluent English comprehension

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision





WORK SETUP:

• Remote

• Project-based / ongoing assignments

• Flexible hours

• Work assigned based on business needs



PAYMENT:

We are open to one of the following structures:

• Per 1,000 verified decision-maker leads

• Hourly rate (for highly experienced professionals only)

• Performance-based bonuses for high accuracy and low bounce rate

Final rate will depend on experience and quality of data delivered.



 TO APPLY:

Please include:

• CV / work history

• Examples of previous B2B lead generation work

• Tools used for research and verification

• Explanation of your verification process (very important)

Bonus if you can describe how you ensure:

 “decision-maker accuracy +
 validity”

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and empathetic Customer Support Specialist to handle complex, high-volume user inquiries and technical issues for our platform. This role goes beyond basic troubleshooting and requires a strong technical mindset, including the use of SQL, APIs, and diagnostic tools to investigate and resolve production issues. You will support non-profit customers, organizers, and donors by triaging unexpected platform behavior, navigating sensitive user situations, and collaborating closely with Engineering and Product teams to ensure timely and effective resolutions. The ideal candidate is analytical, tech-savvy, and compassionate, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.



Key Responsibilities:



Investigate and resolve complex user issues that extend beyond basic troubleshooting using SQL queries, APIs, and internal tools.



Perform technical triage through
 and phone support, analyzing datasets and platform behavior to diagnose root causes.



Manage high-volume support tickets related to accounts, platform functionality, and bank transfer verifications with professionalism and empathy.



Document and investigate “unexpected behavior” within a 45-minute window before escalation.



Write clear, detailed JIRA tickets including API values, console error logs, reproduction steps, and database update tracking.



Collaborate cross-functionally with Engineering and Product teams to escalate bugs, advocate for user needs, and drive issue resolution.



Optimize workflows, documentation, and self-service resources to scale support operations and improve user experience.



Support non-profit customers, organizers, and donors while navigating sensitive and emotionally complex situations.



Troubleshoot software application issues and integrations in real-time using technical tools and diagnostic methods.



Monitor and meet key performance metrics such as CSAT, SLAs, and resolution time targets.



Required Qualifications:



2–5 years of experience in a customer-facing product or technical support role, with a strong focus on troubleshooting technical issues (1–3 years in customer service or help desk environments will also be considered for high-volume support experience).



Proficiency in SQL for data querying, analysis, and root cause investigation.



Hands-on experience working with APIs and understanding technical integrations.



Basic understanding of programming concepts and software application troubleshooting.



Experience with case management and structured issue documentation.



Strong experience with ticketing systems and writing technical reports (e.g., JIRA or similar platforms).



Core Competencies:



Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical users.



Advanced problem-solving skills and the ability to independently diagnose and resolve complex issues.



High emotional intelligence and empathy, especially when supporting users facing sensitive or real-life challenges.



Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple high-priority tickets simultaneously.



Tech-savvy and quick to learn new tools, platforms, and internal systems.



Benefits:**

Fully remote:

Salary - $4 per hour X 40 hours per week (salary every Friday)

Opportunities for professional development and growth.

Dynamic and supportive work environment.

Monday to Friday, 9AM - 5PM EST

Job Security and Stability

PTO

Inclusive Culture

Upskilling Opportunities

100% Work-From-Home

Exceptionally Supportive Team

Opportunities for Career Growth

Financial Reporting and Analysis:

-Prepare, review, and analyze monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports.

-Provide insights and recommendations based on financial analysis to suit desired stakeholder requirements.

-Ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulatory requirements.



Budgeting and Forecasting:

-Participate in the budgeting and forecasting process for clients, including variance analysis and reporting.

-Collaborate with clients and internal stakeholders to develop realistic and achievable plans.

-Monitor budget implementation and provide ongoing financial projections and analysis.



Business Advisory:

-Support strategic business advisory services to clients, helping them make informed financial decisions.

-Identify opportunities for business growth and cost savings, and provide actionable recommendations.

-Conduct financial modeling and scenario analysis to support business strategies.



Client Relationship Management:

-Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, ensuring high levels of client satisfaction.

-Act as a primary point of contact for clients, addressing their accounting and business service needs.

-Provide regular updates and reports to clients on their financial status and business performance.



Compliance and Risk Management:

-Ensure all financial practices adhere to legal regulations and company policies.

-Identify and mitigate financial risks through diligent monitoring and control processes.

-Support internal and external audits by providing required documentation and explanations.



EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATIONS:



To be successful in this role, the ideal candidate will have the following experience and

qualifications:

- Software Experience: By familiar with ERP systems like Netsuite, Salesforce etc. while having a strong competence in XERO and/or MYOB

- Educational Background: A bachelor's degree in accounting, finance, or a related field

- Relevant Experience: A minimum of 3 years post-graduate experience within the financial management or accounting industry

- Regulatory Knowledge: Strong understanding of relevant accounting standards, tax laws, and regulatory requirements.

- Communication Skills: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

- Problem-Solving Skills: Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities

- Technical Skills: Proficiency in Microsoft Office and financial management software

- Professional Certification: Professional accounting or finance qualification (e.g. CA, CPA, CFA) is highly desirable.

- Client Management Skills: Strong relationships building and maintenance with clients.

title: Meta (Facebook) + Google Ads Expert Needed – Generate Phone Calls for Insurance (No Lead Junk)
description:
Job Description:



We are a growing insurance and financial services brand focused on final expense and life insurance, and we are looking for a serious performance marketer to help us scale.



Let’s be clear upfront:



???? We do NOT care about clicks

???? We do NOT care about impressions

???? We ONLY care about phone calls and qualified conversations



If you cannot generate inbound calls, this is not the role for you.



What We Need:



We need someone who can build and manage campaigns in:



 Ads Manager (lead forms + call ads)

Google Ads (search campaigns + call extensions)



Your job is simple:



???? Make the phone ring with people who are actually interested in coverage



Scope of Work:

1. Campaign Setup

Build campaigns from scratch or optimize existing ones

Structure campaigns by state and targeting intent

Set up call-focused campaigns (NOT just forms)

2. Lead & Call Optimization

Optimize for:

Phone calls (primary)

High-quality leads (secondary)

Improve:

Cost per call

Call quality (not junk leads)

3. Tracking & Systems

Set up:

Conversion tracking

Call tracking (required)

Retargeting audiences

Ensure everything is measurable and optimized

4. Testing & Scaling

Test multiple:

Hooks

Creatives (we will provide content)

Audiences

Scale what works, kill what doesn’t quickly

Who This Is For:



You are a good fit if:



You have generated real phone calls from ads before

You understand the difference between:

Meta = interruption marketing

Google = intent-based marketing

You think in terms of ROI, not vanity metrics

Who This Is NOT For:

If you only run engagement or traffic campaigns

If you rely only on cheap lead forms

If you cannot explain your strategy clearly

Required Experience:

Proven results with:

Insurance, financial services, or local service ads

Strong experience with:

 Ads Manager

Google Ads

Ability to show:

Screenshots

Case studies

Metrics

Compensation:

Paid 2-week trial

Then:

Hourly OR monthly retainer

Bonus for hitting cost-per-call targets

To Apply (READ CAREFULLY):



At the top of your proposal, write:



???? CALLS



Then answer:



Show a campaign where you generated phone calls (not just leads)

How would you structure Meta vs Google ads for this business?

What would you do in your first 7 days?

Final Note:



We are building a long-term system.

If you can deliver results, this will turn into an ongoing role with increased budget and responsibility.

title: Data & Reporting Assistant  - CrucialPoint Agency | Remote | Part-Time
description:
About CrucialPoint

CrucialPoint Agency is a precision retention marketing agency trusted by 7-, 8-, and 9-figure D2C brands. We specialize in
, SMS, and lifecycle marketing. Our team is lean, fast-moving, and obsessed with accuracy.



The Role

We are looking for a Data & Reporting Assistant to serve as the backbone of our performance tracking. You will be responsible for pulling, organizing, and maintaining the data that allows our strategists to make multi-million dollar decisions.



What You’ll Be Doing

- Data Extraction: Pulling reports from Klaviyo, Shopify, and Google Analytics.

- Data Management: Transferring raw data into Google Sheets and Notion dashboards.

- Quality Control: Auditing reports to ensure numbers match across different systems.

- Reporting Cycles: Updating daily and weekly reports with 100?curacy.



Requirements

- Extreme Attention to Detail: You catch small errors that others miss.

- Spreadsheet Fluency: High comfort level with Google Sheets (formatting, basic formulas).

- Reliability: Available for at least 4 hours of overlap with US Mountain Time (MST).

- Process-Oriented: You enjoy following a checklist and ensuring data is "clean."



Compensation & Growth

- Rate: $6–$10/hour (depending on experience).

- Path: Starts part-time with a clear path to full-time based on performance.



How to Apply (The Precision Test)

To be considered for this role, please submit your application along with the answer to the following Data Accuracy Challenge.



The Challenge:

Compare the two data entries below. There are 3 specific discrepancies (errors) in the "Manual Entry" when compared to the "Raw Data."

Raw Data (Source): Order_ID: #9921 | Date: 10/12/26 | Subtotal: $142.50 | Tax: $11.40 | Total: $153.90 | Attribute:
_Klaviyo

Manual Entry (Sheet): ID: #9912 | Date: 10/12/26 | Subtotal: $142.05 | Total: $153.90 | Source: Klaviyo



Please provide your application with:

A list of the 3 errors you found in the Manual Entry.

A brief 1-sentence explanation of why a marketing platform (like Klaviyo) and a store platform (like Shopify) might show different "Total Revenue" for the same time period.

title: Video Editor – Long-Form Cinematic Adventure
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled YouTube video editor to transform raw footage into immersive, cinematic experiences. This role isn't about fast-paced "retention editing"; it’s about building an atmosphere, mastering sound design, and letting the environment tell the story.



This channel is dedicated to sharing outdoor adventures through a lens of tranquility and awe. We believe that the most powerful stories aren't told through frantic cuts or loud personalities, but through the landscape itself. Our mission is to transport the viewer to the world’s most remote and beautiful destinations, providing a digital sanctuary that emphasizes the scale, silence, and serenity of the natural world.

We are looking for a dedicated Video Editor who can transform raw field footage into polished, immersive long-form experiences. This is a role for a storyteller who enjoys the "slow cinema" process—someone who can find the narrative thread in hours of wilderness footage and weave it into a cohesive journey.



Your day-to-day will involve:

 • Narrative Curation: Reviewing 2–3 hours of raw footage to select the most impactful clips that build a 20–60 minute story.

 • Color Grading: Bringing LOG footage to life with a "true-to-life" aesthetic—natural, vibrant, and sharp.

 • Atmospheric Audio: Crafting a seamless audio flow where the environment speaks as loudly as the visuals.

 • Musical Curation: Selecting tracks from our licensed library that complement, rather than overpower, the scene.

We operate under a "Place over Personality" philosophy. Your editing style should be cinematic and invisible—the viewer should not feel it’s over edited.

 • Pacing: Slow and immersive. We want shots to breathe, giving the viewer time to register the emotion of a location.

 • Subject Integration: We use people primarily for scale and perspective. We favor motion transitions (e.g., a subject walking through the frame) to move between scenes naturally.

 • The Invisible Observer: The camera is a witness, never an intrusion. Your edits should maintain this sense of being a quiet observer of the journey.

TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

 • Software Proficiency: Expert-level command of DaVinci Resolve or Final Cut Pro.

 • Workflow: Experience managing a 4K 10-bit workflow and large file transfers.

 • Color Mastery: Proven ability to grade LOG footage to a professional, natural finish.

 • Sound Design: You must be skilled at working primarily with natural ambient sounds recorded in the field. While we provide a music library, the "music" of the wind, footsteps, and water is the priority.

 • Attention to Detail: A high standard for technical polish, from frame-accurate cuts to clean audio transitions.

 • Infrastructure: A reliable, high-speed internet connection for consistent file synchronization.

HOW TO APPLY To ensure we are a good creative match, please follow these steps carefully:

 1 Review the Benchmark: Watch this video to understand our required look, feel, and pacing. If you can meet or exceed this quality, we want to see your work.

 2 Portfolio: Provide a link to your portfolio, specifically highlighting cinematic or outdoor adventure work. Applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed.

 3 Software Experience: Tell us about your journey with DaVinci Resolve or Final Cut Pro. How many years have you used them? What are your strengths, and what areas are you currently developing?

 4 Technical Specs: Please include your current internet upload/download speeds.

 5 Submission: Send your application to our hiring
. Note: Your subject line must include the word “mabusisi” to be considered.

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a paid test edit to demonstrate their grasp of our specific pacing and color requirements. We look forward to seeing your vision.

 Marketplace.

 Marketplace for couches with at least **$200 profit potential**

title: Graphic Designer (E-commerce)
description:
Graphic Designer (E-commerce)

We are looking for a fast, detail-oriented, and highly creative Graphic Designer with experience in e-commerce product image creation and high-volume design production. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a performance-driven environment and can deliver high-quality outputs at scale using AI tools and Adobe Photoshop.



Key Responsibilities:

• Create complete product image sets (6–10 images per SKU) following marketplace standards

• Design campaign banners, promotional graphics, and marketplace visuals

• Produce short product videos (15–60 seconds) for listings and marketing

• Ensure all designs meet platform-specific requirements (Amazon, Kogan, etc.)

• Use AI tools to generate and enhance product images, then perform manual refinements in Adobe Photoshop

• Retouch and correct AI-generated images (lighting, shadows, edges, proportions, colors)

• Maintain consistent branding, layout, and visual quality across all outputs

• Collaborate with listing and marketing teams to meet deadlines





Performance Expectations:

• Deliver high daily output across images, banners, and videos

• Ensure 100% completion of image sets for new listings

• Maintain a minimum 98% quality pass rate (QC standards)

• Meet strict deadlines and platform requirements

• Achieve monthly performance targets based on output points





Qualifications:

• Proven experience in e-commerce graphic design (product images, banners, videos)

• Strong understanding of conversion-focused design

• Experience using AI design tools (background removal, enhancement, automation)

• Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop (required) for editing, retouching, and final quality enhancement

• Experience combining AI-generated outputs with manual Photoshop editing

• Strong eye for detail, able to fix AI imperfections (distorted shapes, shadows, textures)

• Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

• Excellent attention to detail and time management



For interested applicant:

Kindly send us a message on Microsoft Teams at 
 and send your CV/resume there so we can discuss further details.

title: Graphic Designer & Video Content Creator (Hospitality / Events)
description:
We are looking for a talented and reliable Graphic Designer & Video Content Creator to support the marketing and promotion of a fast-paced bar and restaurant based in Grand Cayman (Caribbean).



This is a remote position ideal for someone based in the Philippines who has strong creative skills and experience working with nightlife, events, or entertainment brands.



The role focuses on creating high-quality visual content for social media, including event promotions, reels, and short-form videos.

Edit content using a mix of:

Stock images/videos

Event footage provided by our team

Work closely with management to execute marketing ideas and campaigns

Creative mindset with the ability to bring new ideas to the table

Work Setup:

Fully remote (Philippines-based candidates preferred)

Flexible schedule, but must be able to align with deadlines based on Cayman time zone

Ongoing work with weekly deliverables tied to event schedules

What We’re Looking For:

Someone who understands nightlife energy and event marketing

Fast, creative, and detail-oriented

Able to produce high-quality content consistently

Takes ownership and does not require constant supervision

title: **Join Our Team as an AI Specialist – Where Innovation Meets Impact!!
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative AI specialist to design, develop, and deploy artificial intelligence solutions that drive business value. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning, data science, and software engineering, with a passion for solving complex problems using AI technologies.



Key Responsibilities

-Design, build, and implement AI and machine learning models to solve business challenges

-Analyze large datasets to extract actionable insights and improve model performance

-Develop and maintain scalable AI systems and pipelines

-Collaborate with cross-functional teams including data engineers, product managers, and stakeholders

-Research and stay up-to-date with the latest advancements in AI and machine learning

-Optimize algorithms for performance, accuracy, and efficiency

- Ensure ethical AI practices, including fairness, transparency, and data privacy compliance

-Document processes, models, and workflows for internal use



Required Qualifications

-Proven experience in AI/ML development and deployment

-Strong programming skills in Python, R, or similar languages

-Experience with machine learning frameworks (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)

-Solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and statistics

-Experience working with large datasets and data preprocessing techniques



Preferred Qualifications

-Experience with deep learning, natural language processing (NLP), or computer vision

-Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

-Knowledge of MLOps practices and tools

-Experience with APIs, microservices, and software integration

-Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking skills



Key Skills

-Machine Learning & Deep Learning

title: Creative Youtube Editor + Thumbnail Designer ( Gaming / Reactions / Meme Edits
description:
I’m building a YouTube channel (gaming, reactions, commentary) and I’m looking for a CREATIVE editor who understands internet culture and knows how to make content entertaining — not just cut clips.





What I need:

Someone who:

    •    Is tapped into 
s, TikTok, YouTube trends, and internet culture

    •    Understands humor, timing, and viral-style edits

    •    Can match my personality and build on it through editing

    •    Can take initiative and add their own ideas

    •    Knows how to make clickable thumbnails by studying what’s working





IMPORTANT (read this):

My content style is similar to PewDiePie.



If you don’t understand the style:

Go watch older PewDiePie videos and come back.



That type of personality, humor, and pacing is what I’m going for.





This is NOT a basic editing job.



You are expected to:

    •    Add 
s that match what’s happening in the video

    •    Enhance jokes with sound effects, zooms, and visuals

    •    Turn random/funny 
nts into creative edits (for example: if I make a weird noise or say something random, you turn it into something visual or funny that fits)

    •    Understand recurring jokes/phrases and build edits around them



I want edits that feel ALIVE, not plain.





Your responsibilities:

    •    Edit 1 main YouTube video per day (gaming / reactions / commentary)

    •    Create 3–7 short clips from that video (TikTok / YouTube Shorts)

    •    Add captions, 
s, sound effects, and fast-paced edits

    •    Create 1 thumbnail per video

    •    BEFORE making thumbnails: look at similar videos in the niche and base your design on what is currently working (style, text, emotion, simplicity)

    •    Keep thumbnails clean, clickable, and not cluttered

    •    Suggest content ideas based on trends when possible





Content style:

    •    Gaming + reactions + commentary

    •    Funny, opinionated, personality-driven

    •    Fast-paced and engaging (not boring edits)





Current situation:

I already have hours of recorded footage ready, so you’ll have content to work with immediately.





To apply:

    •    Send your best edits (especially 
-style/funny edits)

    •    Send thumbnails you’ve made

    •    Tell me what creators you watch regularly

    •    Put the word “CREATIVE” at the top so I know you read everything

title: Tenancy manager
description:
Job Title

Tenancy Management Admin – Full Time – Remote



Job Description

We are looking for a highly reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive Tenancy Manager Admin to join our team full time on a remote basis.



We manage a portfolio of residential properties in central London and need someone who is precise, organised, and able to handle important administrative tasks without mistakes. This is NOT a generic VA role. We need someone who can work carefully, follow procedures exactly, and take real ownership of their work.



This role involves handling sensitive tasks such as rent tracking, tenant administration, contract checks, move-in coordination, landlord and tenant communications, and general property management support (problem solving). Accuracy is absolutely essential.



Main Responsibilities



Update and maintain rent ledgers accurately

Track rent payments, arrears, and outstanding balances

Prepare and check tenancy documents, guarantor documents, and contract packs

Ensure all required documents and payments are complete before move-ins

Draft clear and professional
s to tenants, landlords, and contractors

Solve and deal with maintenance issues through our trusted contractors

Follow up on maintenance issues and confirm completion

Keep spreadsheets, records, and internal systems fully accurate and up to date

Report any issue, discrepancy immediately and handle general admin tasks

Follow procedures carefully and double/triple-check all important tasks before completion



Requirements



Previous experience in property management, real estate admin, leasing support, or a similar role (Uk or US preferred but not essential)

Excellent written and spoken English

Very strong attention to detail

Highly organised and able to manage multiple tasks carefully

Able to follow instructions and procedures exactly

Good problem-solving skills and common sense

Comfortable using spreadsheets,
, and online systems

Able to work independently and take ownership of tasks

Honest, reliable, and consistent, and able to work under pressure



Important

This role requires a high level of accuracy. Mistakes in this position can have financial and operational consequences. We are looking for someone who naturally double-checks their work and is able to think outside the box and takes pride in getting things right.



What We Offer

Full-time remote role

Opportunity to grow within the company

Performance-based company bonus

2 weeks Paid holidays after 1 year of continuous work

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Working Hours

Applicants must be available to work during UK business hours



Salary

Competitive, depending on experience and suitability.

Performance bonus



Application Process

To apply, please send:

Confirmation of whether you currently work for any other clients



Please note that shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a practical test to assess accuracy, judgment, and attention 

to detail.



Please note: to confirm attention to detail, copy and paste this exact sentence at the top of your application: “I understand that accuracy is essential in tenancy management.”

Your only goal is to identify and eliminate the 20% to 30% of budget waste that Google's algorithm generates. You will be responsible for the "Capital Recovery" of our French B2B clients.

What you will do:

• Aggressive Negative Auditing: Scrutinize search terms daily to exclude non-converting, informational, or "junk" queries.

• Placement Cleaning: Block mobile apps and low-quality display placements that drain cash.

• B2B Intent Filtering: Use AI tools (DeepL/ChatGPT) to ensure the intent of French keywords is 100% commercial/transactional.

• Performance Reporting: Fill out our weekly "Capital Recovered" tracker to prove your value.

Requirements:

• Proven experience in Google Ads (B2B preferred).

• Data-obsessed mindset. You hate wasting even 1€.

• Fluent in English. Ability to use AI tools to navigate French accounts is a must.

• Experience with Optmyzr, Adalysis, or advanced Google Ads scripts is a plus.

Compensation:

500€ per month, per account managed.

We are looking for long-term partners. As we grow, you can manage multiple accounts and scale your income significantly.

How to apply:

Start your application with the word "CLEANER" so I know you are a detail-oriented pro. Tell me about the biggest "waste" you ever found in a Google Ads account.

This role is not one-dimensional. You will be executing two distinct sales angles:

Selling to individual car salespeople inside dealerships



You will be provided with cold leads and expected to manage the full sales cycle — from first call to close.



If you cannot handle high call volume, adapt your pitch based on who you’re speaking to, and take full ownership of results, this role is not a fit.



What You’ll Be Doing

Navigate gatekeepers and reach decision-makers

Pitch two different offers depending on the contact:

Dealership-level solution (owners, GMs, managers)

Individual-level solution (car sales reps)

Run demos and close deals

Follow up consistently until deal is closed or disqualified

Manage pipeline and activity inside CRM

Adapt in real-time based on conversation and dealership type

Compensation

Base pay (varies based on experience)

High commission on every deal closed

Residual monthly income on accounts

Uncapped earnings

Requirements

Proven cold calling experience

Ability to handle 100–200+ dials per day

Strong communication and objection handling

Ability to switch between two sales angles fluidly

Self-managed, disciplined, and competitive

Comfortable speaking with business owners and salespeople

What Makes You a Fit

You don’t rely on scripts alone — you understand conversations

You can handle rejection without slowing down

You adapt quickly when a call doesn’t go as expected

You take ownership of your pipeline and results

Additional Details

Fully remote

Leads are provided (no prospecting required)

Fast sales cycle (often 1–2 calls to close)

Opportunity to grow into a senior closing role

Reality Check



Most applicants will not succeed in this role.



If you need hand-holding, struggle with rejection, or cannot maintain consistent call volume, this will not work.



If you can execute, this is a high-income opportunity with no ceiling.

title: Backend engineer
description:
There are TWO openings for the Backend Software Engineer



Focus is on Python, FastAPI, building ETL Data pipelines, AWS and containerization

Also this one is a MUST HAVE: experience integrating LLM APIs (Azure OpenAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Vertex AI, Bedrock) into applications, including prompt engineering, token management, and error handling

Nice to have: Kubernetes and Infrastructure-as-code familiarity (Terraform / Pulumi / CloudFormation) 

Backend Engineer



We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Backend Software Engineer with experience building cloud-native systems to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in building production platforms, APIs, and services that enable internal teams to operate at scale. This role involves designing, building, and maintaining core backend infrastructure and service layers that power workflows across the organization. You will collaborate with data scientists, internal product teams, and other cross-functional stakeholders to understand their needs and deliver reliable, scalable services that accelerate business outcomes.



Qualifications:



Education: Bachelor's or Master's in Computer Science / Software Engineering / related field, or equivalent professional experience.



Experience: 6+ years of experience in software engineering, platform development, or a related field.

Technical Skills:



- Strong proficiency in Python with experience building production-grade services and libraries

- Experience designing and building RESTful APIs using modern Python frameworks (e.g., FastAPI, Starlette)

- Solid experience with relational databases, ORMs (e.g., SQLAlchemy), and schema migration management (e.g., Alembic)

- Experience building production data systems (ETL / data processing workflows)

- Cloud platform experience (AWS / GCP) including services like S3/GCS, Lambda/Cloud Functions, SQS/Pub-Sub, and managed databases

- Proficiency with containerization technologies (Docker)

- Practical experience developing CI/CD workflows — experience shipping code to production environments regularly

- Strong commitment to automated testing practices (unit, integration, and end-to-end testing)

- Strong software engineering fundamentals: version control, code review, testing, and documentation

- Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving abilities, strong communication skills, and the ability to work effectively in a team environment. Ability to translate data science team needs into well-designed platform abstractions.



Additional Skills (Preferred):



- Kubernetes experience (EKS, GKE) - deploying, scaling, and troubleshooting containerized workloads

- Infrastructure-as-code familiarity (Terraform / Pulumi / CloudFormation)

- Experience integrating LLM APIs (Azure OpenAI, OpenAI, Anthropic, Vertex AI, Bedrock) into applications, including prompt engineering, token management, and error handling

- Experience with data manipulation and analysis using libraries such as pandas, NumPy, and SciPy



Job Responsibilities:



- API & Service Development: Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services and APIs that enable internal teams to integrate platform capabilities into their workflows.

- Database Design & Management: Design and manage database schemas, write performant queries, and oversee migration strategies to support evolving application requirements.

- Service Architecture: Architect and implement shared service layers - including API gateways, authentication, caching, and data access patterns - that the broader organization can leverage.

- Infrastructure & Reliability: Own cloud infrastructure, containerization, and deployment pipelines, ensuring high availability, observability, and cost efficiency.

- Developer Experience: Build well-documented SDKs, libraries, and tooling that make it easy for internal consumers to use platform services without deep infrastructure knowledge.

- Collaboration: Work closely with data scientists, product teams, and other engineers to understand their needs, gather requirements, and translate them into robust platform features.

- CI/CD & Testing: Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines, automated test suites, and monitoring to ensure reliable, repeatable deployments of services to production.

- Data Pipeline Support: Build and maintain ETL and data processing pipelines, ensuring data quality and integrity at scale.

title: Paid Traffic Operator
description:
Company Overview:

We're a US-based digital media agency experiencing rapid growth. We manage content and marketing campaigns for creators across various platforms. Our team works fully remote, spanning multiple time zones.



The Role:

We're hiring a Paid Traffic Operator to handle the hands-on execution of our paid advertising campaigns. This is an operational role—our internal traffic management system guides campaign decisions, and your responsibility is to execute workflows precisely, launch campaigns according to specifications, track performance, and report consistently.



You don't need to be a media buying strategist. You need to be dependable, process-oriented, and a clear communicator.



What You'll Do:

- Launch paid campaigns across multiple ad networks using detailed SOPs

- Check campaign performance daily through our internal dashboard

- Make manual adjustments in ad platforms—budgets, creatives, targeting—as instructed

- Flag performance issues that fall outside defined thresholds for management to review

- Deliver a brief daily async update covering spend, results, and any concerns

- Maintain accurate, current campaign data across all platforms



What We're Looking For:

- Meticulous attention to detail—you follow processes exactly, without shortcuts

- Dependable and consistent—daily reporting and punctuality are essential

- Basic experience with at least one ad platform (Meta Ads, Google Ads, or similar)

- Self-sufficient in a remote, async work environment

- Strong written English—clear, concise communication is central to this role

- Open to feedback—you ask questions early instead of guessing



Bonus Points:

- Experience with push, pop, or display traffic networks

- Background in a digital agency or media buying team

- Familiarity with CPM or CPC buying across multiple networks



How to Apply

Send your resume along with a short paragraph about the ad platform or traffic network you know best and what your responsibilities were. Applications missing this will not be considered.

title: Associate Account Manager
description:
About Us

Cardinal Education is a premier educational services firm based in the San Francisco Bay Area that provides world-class academic coaching, test preparation, and admissions advising. The Connect Division, the team concerned with client operations, is central to our service delivery model, coordinating logistics, managing relationships, and ensuring that every family experiences the highest level of support and impact.



Role Overview

We are seeking a Client-Focused Associate Account Manager to own and manage ongoing relationships with families receiving our educational services. You will serve as the operational and relational hub for each client account, from onboarding through ongoing support, ensuring each family's experience is seamless, responsive, and high-value.



You’ll work closely with academic coaches, consultants, billing teams, and cross-functional leaders to deliver timely service, address concerns, and retain long-term clients.



Key Responsibilities

Serve as the primary point of contact for families after the initial onboarding, managing ongoing service delivery and communication.

Conduct regular client check-ins and provide timely, personalized support to maintain high levels of satisfaction and engagement.

Track client engagement and service quality, maintain accurate records, and recommend additional support to improve outcomes and retention.

Coordinate service launches and scheduling by aligning with internal teams, maintaining updated documentation, and addressing any issues to ensure a smooth client experience.

Work closely with Sales and Marketing to align messaging, share client insights, and support continuous improvements to the client experience.



Skills and Qualifications

Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; background in education, customer success, or client services is a strong plus.

At least 1-3 years of experience in account management, client services, or operations.

Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Comfort working across multiple platforms (e.g., Google Workspace, Trello, CRM/billing systems).

Ability to multitask and manage multiple client relationships in a fast-paced environment.

Empathetic, service-oriented mindset with a bias toward action and follow-through.



Benefits

Competitive salary and performance-based bonuses
