title: UGC Manager
description:
UGC Manager (Creator Sourcing + Execution)



We’re looking for a UGC Manager to manage creators and execute content at scale.



This is a strategy role — while our team already creates the scripts and concepts, your job is to match the right creator to the right script based on persona and get content produced efficiently.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:

Sourcing and onboarding UGC creators (TikTok, IG, etc.)

Matching creators to specific customer personas + scripts

Coordinating content production (briefs, deadlines, revisions)

Ensuring creators follow scripts accurately

Managing communication and relationships with creators

Keeping a consistent pipeline of content going out weekly

Organizing content and tracking delivery



(Your focus is execution + coordination)



What We’re Looking For:

Experience working with UGC creators or influencer outreach

Strong understanding of different customer personas

Ability to match the right face/person to the right message

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Fast communicator who can manage multiple creators at once

Bonus: Experience in e-commerce or paid ads

What Success Looks Like:

Right creators paired with the right scripts (persona alignment)

Fast turnaround times on content

Minimal revisions needed from creators

Consistent weekly output of content

How to Apply:



Please include:



A short intro about your experience

Examples of creators you’ve worked with

How you would choose a creator for a specific audience



Important: To show attention to detail, include the word “GROWTH” at the top of your application.



Compensation:

Competitive (based on experience)

Room to grow as the brand scales

Will be expanding to TikTok Shop, IG Shop, partnership ads etc.



Thank you,

Evans

title: Grant Writer
description:
Who We Are



Feathers Project is a non-profit dedicated to finding the poorest of the poor in the Philippines, those who have fallen through the cracks—people living in dire conditions without any other form of assistance. Our mission is to ensure “100% direct charity”. We do this with a small team that goes into the most poverty darkened communities in search of those in the greatest need of charity, and we provide the sponsors’ donations to  them—directly.



Feathers Project  is mostly funded by partner companies whose employees become volunteers to ensure integrity in the process. We emphasize disciplined processes, transparency, and audits to ensure that we do not wander from the mission.



What You’ll Do – Position Summary:

The Grant Writer will play a key role in securing funding to support Feathers Project’s mission of delivering “100% direct charity” to underserved communities in the Philippines. As a Grant Writer, you will directly contribute to expanding Feathers Project’s  reach and strengthening its programs by securing funding from local and international donors. Your work will enable the organization to scale its initiatives, improve community outcomes, and build long-term impact.



Responsibilities:

Research and identify grant opportunities from Philippine government agencies (e.g., DOH, DSWD), local foundations, NGOs, and international funding bodies

Develop and write high-quality grant proposals, including narratives, budgets, and supporting documents

Create and manage a grant calendar to track deadlines, submissions, and reporting requirements

Collaborate with internal teams to gather program data, impact stories, and operational details

Maintain accurate records of grant applications, funding status, and compliance requirements

Build and maintain relationships with funders, partners, and stakeholders

Prepare grant reports and impact updates for donors

Ensure all submissions align with Hey Dan’s mission, programs, and strategic priorities

Stay updated on funding trends in the Philippines, particularly in nonprofit, community development, and digital initiatives

Support monitoring and evaluation efforts to strengthen funding proposals

Assist in developing fundraising materials (decks, concept notes, donor briefs)

Goal: To generate an average of 250,000 php in grant funding per month





Skills & Experience:

At least 3–5 years of successful experience in grant writing, fundraising, or nonprofit development

title: Hiring: Senior Creative Strategist (High-Volume | Meta Ads | Fashion E-commerce)
description:
**???? Hiring: Senior Creative Strategist (High-Volume | Meta Ads | Fashion E-commerce)**



We are a fast-scaling **fashion dropshipping brand** looking for a **top-tier Creative Strategist** who can produce **high-converting creatives at scale** and actively find new winning ideas.



This is a **performance-driven role**. If you don’t understand what makes ads convert, this is not for you.



---



### ???? Your Responsibilities



* Create **40–60 creatives per day**:



  * Static images (1:1)

  * Video ads (9:16) with & without voice-over

  * UGC-style, collages, “ugly ads”, product-focused creatives

* Develop creatives for:



  * Product pages

  * Collection pages

  * Ad testing campaigns



---



### ???? Creative Research & Strategy



* Daily research on *
 Ads Library** to find winning ads in our market

* Identify:



  * Winning hooks

  * Angles

  * Offers

  * Formats that are currently working

* Bring **new creative ideas every single day**



---



### ???? Tracking & Optimization



* Maintain a **daily tracking spreadsheet**:



  * Log creatives produced

  * Track performance (CTR, CPA, etc.)

  * Identify winners & scale angles

* Analyze what’s working in our store and **iterate fast**



---



### ? What We’re Looking For



* Strong experience in **e-commerce / dropshipping (fashion preferred)**

* Deep understanding of:



  * **Direct response marketing**

  * **High CTR creatives**

  * Conversion-focused ad structures

* Ability to work **fast, consistently, and independently**



---



### ???? Required Tools



You MUST be comfortable using:



* AI tools (for creative production & ideation)

* Freepik

* Higgsfield (motion/video editing)

* Canva

* ElevenLabs (voice-over)



---



### ???? You Are a Good Fit If:



* You’ve worked with **winning stores / brands**

* You understand how to **find and replicate winners**

* You can handle **high-volume output without losing quality**

* You are **ready to start immediately**



---



### ???? Do NOT Apply If:



* You are a beginner

* You can’t show real past work

* You are slow or inconsistent

* You don’t understand performance metrics



---



### ???? How to Apply



To be considered, you MUST:



1. Start your message with: **CREATIVES**

2. Send examples of your work (images + videos)

3. Share **stores/brands you’ve worked with**

4. Share results if possible (CTR, CPA, ROAS)

5. Confirm you can produce **40–60 creatives per day**



---



We are building a serious creative machine.

If you perform, you will have **long-term, stable work with us**.



Start immediately.

title: Google Ads Manager
description:
We are two New Zealand video production businesses looking for a skilled and reliable Google Ads Manager to help us generate more leads online.



The two businesses are:

- Pilot Films (
) – Corporate video production and photography studio

- YellowFire Wedding Films (
) – Wedding videography 



This is an ongoing part-time role, approximately 5–10 hours per month.





RESPONSIBILITIES



- Set up and manage Google Ads campaigns for both websites

- Research and target the right keywords for NZ audiences

- Write ad copy that suits each brand

- Set up conversion tracking so we can see which ads generate enquiries

- Monitor and optimise campaigns monthly to reduce wasted spend

- Send a simple monthly report showing results and what was done





REQUIREMENTS



- At least 2 years of Google Ads experience

- Experience with service-based businesses and lead generation (not online stores)

- Google Ads certification is a plus

- Familiar with Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager

- Good written English

- Honest, reliable and easy to communicate with

- Experience working with Australian or New Zealand clients is a bonus





HOW TO APPLY



Please send us:

1. A short intro about yourself and your Google Ads experience

2. One or two examples of campaigns you have managed and the results you achieved

3. Your monthly rate for managing two accounts



We are not looking for the cheapest option — we want someone who takes pride in their work and genuinely wants to help our businesses grow.

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Sales Support Specialist
description:
We are seeking a Sales Support Specialist in the IT services and solutions industry. This is a blended role combining business development and sales support, ideal for a proactive professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment. The role involves prospecting, managing client relationships, supporting the full sales cycle, and leveraging AI tools to enhance efficiency and lead generation.



Job Responsibilities:

-Prospect and identify new accounts; build and manage call lists within CRM platforms.

-Execute call and
 campaigns; schedule meetings and presentations with potential clients.

-Manage and nurture 200–250 active accounts/leads, maintaining consistent follow-up cadences.

-Engage with C-level executives and IT leaders to discuss business objectives and solutions.

-Develop and implement sales strategies to drive revenue growth and acquire new clients.

-Support the full sales process, including creating sales orders, consolidating notes, and assisting procurement.

-Maintain accurate sales forecasts and pipeline reporting.

-Utilize AI tools to generate leads, create content, and automate workflows.

-Prepare presentations, respond to RFPs, and support client meetings.

-Assist in managing existing accounts and identifying cross-selling opportunities.

-Generate weekly, monthly, and quarterly performance reports.

-Collaborate with internal teams to support technical discussions and client needs.

-Continuously learn and adapt to evolving products, services, and industry trends.



Qualifications:

-Bachelor’s degree in a related field or equivalent experience.

-Minimum of 5 years of sales or business development experience.

-Experience using AI platforms to support sales functions.

-Strong understanding of sales processes and client relationship management.

-Familiarity with Salesforce (or similar CRM tools) is expected or highly preferred

-Excellent communication, presentation, and negotiation skills.

-Ability to manage multiple projects and prioritize effectively.

-Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to engage stakeholders at all levels.

-Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.



Requirements:

-Updated Resume/CV.

-Reliable internet connection and modern computer setup 

-Ability to work in a dynamic, evolving environment.

-Strong commitment to data privacy, security policies, and operational standards.



Benefits:

-Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

-HMO for you and your dependents

-Paid time off and holidays.

-Training and development opportunities.



Join our team now and be part of the top 1% talent in the Philippines!

description:

) provides services for seniors including estate sales and online auctions, a podcast (
) and a variety of resources for seniors and caregivers (
, 
, 
, 
).

You will coordinate with and direct our project managers, video editors and copy editors to create compelling posts that attract users and increase engagement, and

), download the application and submit it with your resume and response. Only those that submit the application will be considered.

Candidates should be fluent in English. This is a full time role and we want the successful candidate focused on marketing our businesses across all the major platforms.

title: Graphic Designer who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description: We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Graphic Designer’ in the subject line. Please apply through OnlineJobsPh and not via email. The job responsibilities include designing and creating engaging YouTube thumbnails, researching trending thumbnail styles, editing and enhancing images, organizing and maintaining a thumbnail archive, analyzing thumbnail performance, collaborating with the content team, ensuring brand consistency, and assisting with basic design tasks. Additionally, creativity, attention to detail, and collaboration skills are key to creating thumbnails that align with the brand and content strategy. Please make sure to send your job application here on OnlineJobs and not via email. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! Irish #Believe

Real estate experience is a PLUS

Clear, neutral English (easy to understand)

title: Online Arbitrage Sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE 

Looking to grow our team seeking one full time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as full time. 



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long-term, advancing position, this is for you. 



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately. 



We are seeking a full time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher-paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application. 



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 8-12 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs. 



Requirements 

Keepa experience required 

Seller Amp (SAS) experience 

Online Arbitrage experience 

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank 

Ability to work full-time (40 hours per week) 

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits 

Unlimited PTO 

Holidays Off 

Bonuses which will be discussed 

Communication Skills 



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications. 



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application. 

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link. 

This is our criteria. 

Low sales rank 

Minimum 35% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price 



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission. 

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer? 

If so, why did you leave your current candidate? 

What are your computer specs? 

How many monitors do you have? 

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates? 

What is your favorite sport and why ? 

Do you have a VPN already ? 

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



As well as answering those questions above, please upload a screenshot of your internet speed as well as a 20 second voice recording of why you would be a good fit for this opportunity.



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: Content Creator
description:

About the Role

Part-time: 10–20 hours per week

Fully remote (Philippines-based)

Focused on editing and posting Reels, Shorts and TikToks

Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving real estate investing brand



What You’ll Do

Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Turn long-form content (calls, trainings, clips) into engaging short-form videos

Add captions, hooks, trending sounds, and visuals that increase retention

Post and schedule content across platforms

Help test and improve content performance over time



What We’re Looking For (Must-Have)

This is not an entry-level role. We’re specifically looking for someone with hands-on Reels experience for clients.

You should:

Have a portfolio with 100+ Reels (client work preferred)

Be skilled with CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar tools

Know how to create:

Strong hooks

Clean, readable captions

Engaging edits using trending formats

Have experience managing end-to-end Reels production (editing ? captioning ? posting)

Reels are a core part of this brand’s growth strategy, so this level of experience is essential.



Compensation (Philippines-Based)

We are looking for top-tier talent, not entry-level.

$6–$12/hour depending on experience and quality

Approx. $480–$960/month (part-time)

Opportunity for growth and increased hours based on performance

???? We are open to paying more for someone exceptional who can move fast and produce high-quality content consistently.



What We’re Looking For (Beyond Skills)

Detail-oriented (this matters more than you think)

Proactive and takes initiative

Fast and execution-focused (not stuck in perfectionism)

Strong sense of energy (content should not feel flat or boring)

Bonus: Worked in real estate, investing, or property management 



This Is NOT For You If

You apply to everything without reading instructions

You need constant hand-holding

You overthink instead of executing

Your content feels generic or low-energy



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

Please include:

Links to your portfolio (must include Reels work)

A 1–2 minute video telling us:

Who you are

What you would bring to the team

Why you’re interested in this role

If the video is missing, your application will not be reviewed. Send in any way possible: Google drive, Dropbox, Loom, etc.



Why This Role Matters

You’ll be helping share real stories, real wins, and real strategies that are helping people take action in real estate.

This isn’t just content for the sake of posting. It’s about impact, clarity, and 
ntum.



If you’re interested, apply here or
 us at 

If you know someone great, send this their way.

title: Event Admin
description:
About Us

Event Strategies produces and owns a portfolio of B2B event properties across multiple industry sectors in Ireland and the UK. From flagship corporate conferences to curated industry gatherings, we deliver events that matter to the communities they serve. As we scale, we're looking for a sharp, organised Event Admin Executive who strives for the best to keep our event engine running smoothly behind the scenes.



The Role

You'll be the operational backbone of our event delivery team — managing the details that make the difference between a good event and a great one. Working closely with our Event Leads, you'll handle everything from entry processing and attendee coordination to post-event reporting, ensuring every programme runs without a hitch.

This is a remote role suited to someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes ownership of their work, and genuinely cares about getting things right.



What You'll Do

Event & Administrative Support

- Process entries, manage data, and maintain accurate records, including attendee lists and finalist databases

- Handle incoming event-related enquiries and communications professionally and promptly

- Proof and quality-check event materials before they go out



Attendee Services

- Manage guestlists and assist with registration processes

- Provide responsive online support to attendees and handle special requests



Team Coordination

- Report to Senior/Junior Event Leads and support the wider team as needed

- Liaise with Event Leads to coordinate the production of promotional materials

- Support the integration of multimedia elements into event presentations



Post-Event

- Gather feedback from attendees and vendors

- Assist in compiling post-event reports and performance analysis





What We're Looking For

- Experience in event coordination, administration, or a similar support role (a plus, not a must)

- Highly organised with strong multitasking ability

- Clear, confident communicator — written and verbal

- Comfortable with Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and event management tools

- Calm under pressure with a sharp eye for detail

- A self-starter who can manage their workload independently in a remote setting





What's on Offer

- Fully remote, full-time position

- Varied and engaging work across a diverse range of industry events

- A collaborative, supportive team environment, where attention to detail is valued above all else — if you've read this far, mention the word I love Events at the start of your

- Real opportunities to grow within the organisation





How to Apply

Send your CV and a brief cover letter outlining your relevant experience to 
 and 
 with the subject line "Event Admin Executive Application".

Event Strategies is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to building a diverse and inclusive team.

title: Credit Repair VA (FTC Reports, CFPB Complaints & Client Intake)
description:
We are a fast-growing, high-volume credit repair organization based in the US. We are currently managing 100+ active clients and are looking for a highly meticulous Virtual Assistant to take over our administrative processing, specifically handling FTC identity theft affidavits and CFPB complaints. We have an immediate need to knock out a large number of FTC Reports ASAP, and this task would be your primary responsibility when you start. 

You will not be required to draft custom Round 1 dispute letters initially (while we’re getting adjusted). Your primary role is to ensure the administrative and compliance filings are executed flawlessly and client onboarding is smooth.

Your Immediate & Core Responsibilities:

• FTC Filings: Accurately submitting Identity Theft Reports through 
. (Previous Experience Required)

• CFPB Complaints: Drafting and submitting well-structured complaints to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

• Client Intake: Creating client profiles in DisputeFox and ensuring all documents (ID, utility bills, credit reports) are properly attached.

• Billing Setup: Utilizing Stripe natively to set up client invoices and installment payment plans. 

• Light Automation: Assisting with our front-end flow via GoHighLevel (triggering onboarding texts/emails).

Strict Requirements:

• Fluent English (Written & Spoken): REQUIRED. You will be submitting government forms and complaints. Your grammar, spelling, and reading comprehension must be flawless.

• High Attention to Detail: One wrong SSN digit on an FTC report ruins the file. Meticulous accuracy is non-negotiable.

• Industry Experience: You must have prior experience submitting FTC reports and CFPB complaints for US credit repair clients.

• Software: Experience with DisputeFox is highly preferred. Familiarity with Stripe and GoHighLevel is a major plus. I currently am not using GoHighLevel, but I know I need it in the near future to scale my business.

title: Accounts Payable Specialist
description:
Job Overview:

The Accounts Payable (AP) Specialist is responsible for managing and processing the company’s financial transactions related to vendor payments. This role will involve using QuickBooks for invoice processing, maintaining financial records in Excel, and participating in vendor and payment audits to ensure the accuracy and compliance of all transactions. The AP Specialist will play a key role in supporting the accounting team and contributing to the smooth financial operation of the company.



Key Responsibilities:



Process and review vendor invoices for accuracy, proper coding, and approval in QuickBooks.

Use QuickBooks to enter accounts payable transactions and ensure accurate data entry into the system.

Reconcile vendor statements, resolve discrepancies, and follow up on overdue payments.

Participate in vendor and payment audits to verify the accuracy of payment records and ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards.

Maintain an organized filing system for accounts payable records, both digitally and physically.

Prepare and process payments (via check, ACH, wire transfer, etc.) and ensure timely disbursements to vendors.

Generate and manage reports in Excel, including outstanding payables, payment trends, and audit findings.

Assist with month-end and year-end financial closings by providing necessary accounts payable reports and documentation.

Work closely with the accounting team to ensure all financial transactions are accurately recorded and comply with tax and regulatory requirements.

Assist with the preparation of 1099 forms at year-end and ensure proper tax compliance for vendors.

Communicate with vendors to resolve payment issues or discrepancies in a professional and timely manner.

Collaborate with internal teams to ensure efficient payment processing and resolve any issues that arise during the accounts payable cycle.

Ensure that all vendor contracts and payment terms are properly documented and followed.

Assist with the preparation of audits and provide necessary documentation to auditors as required.

Maybe ask to help assist with other projects if needed

Maintaining accounts payable inbox.

Participating in tea
etings.

Documenting update processes



Qualifications:



- An associate’s or bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, or related field is preferred.

- Previous experience as an Accounts Payable Specialist or similar accounting role.

- Proficiency in QuickBooks and Excel (intermediate or advanced skills, including formulas and pivot tables).

- Strong knowledge of accounts payable processes and general accounting principles.

- Attention to detail and accuracy in processing invoices, payments, and audits.

- Excellent organizational and time-management skills with the ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with the ability to interact professionally with vendors and internal teams.

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

- Experience with vendor and payment audits, or willingness to learn, is a plus.

- Basic understanding of tax regulations related to accounts payable (e.g., 1099 compliance) is preferred.

- No freelancers and must not be working another job/position.

-Have been using Adobe PDF or similar software for over 1 year

-Have been using Dropbox for over 1 year

-Must be self-motivated, detail and deadline oriented with superb follow-up and prioritization skills

-Must demonstrate the ability to perform in a busy work environment during high-volume periods

-A reliable internet connection with at least 30mbps and a computer with at least 8gb ram, windows 11 to perform work duties.

-2nd monitor is required

-A proactive, positive attitude and a strong willingness to learn and grow.

-okay to use Time Doctor as a time tracker







To apply, the following must be provided:

1. One minute video of you stating your name and why you think you should be hired.

2. Resume

3. What KPIs you believe are most important to tracking your success in this job

4. Your remote work environment

5. How long you have worked remotely

6. Is there any background noise or distractions that would cause you to not be able to be on Zoom or Phone calls from 8:00AM – 5:00PM EST (new york timezone)?

7. Your desired rate of pay?

8. When you can start?

9. What is the most revenue and expense size of the company you have worked for?

10. Proof of QBO certification is required.

title: Video Editor for Trading Livestream Content — Short-Form + Long-Form YouTube
description:
Description:

We're PropHub — a live NQ futures trading community that streams every weekday morning with full screen share. We're growing fast and need a dedicated video editor to join the team long-term.

What you'll be doing:

We provide all the raw footage — you edit it. Raw content comes from two sources: our daily livestream recordings and standalone videos we film separately (skits, giveaways, educational pieces, reaction videos, etc.). Everything gets uploaded to a shared Google Drive. You pull from that footage, edit, and upload finished files back to the Drive in ready-to-post format.

Weekly deliverables:



2 short-form clips per day, Monday through Friday (10 per week total), following this weekly content split:



4 entertainment clips — personality moments, reactions, funny highlights from the livestream, or standalone videos we provide (skits, giveaways, etc.)

3 educational clips — pulled from the stream when there's a strong teaching moment, otherwise we'll provide dedicated educational recordings to edit

2 proof/results clips — clipped from the stream when viewers share wins live, or edited from dedicated results videos we provide

1 CTA clip — we provide the recording, you edit and polish it for maximum engagement

Occasional one-off video projects as needed (reaction clips, trending content, etc.)





2 long-form YouTube edits per week, 15-30 minutes each — we provide the full recordings, you edit them into polished final cuts — delivered no later than Wednesday and Friday

All finished files uploaded to Google Drive in ready-to-post format, clearly labeled by content type



Deadlines are non-negotiable. We publish content on a daily schedule and our audience expects consistency. Short-form clips must be delivered every single day without gaps. Long-form edits must land on time, every time. If you struggle with deadlines or time management, this is not the right fit. If you're someone who delivers reliably and communicates proactively when something comes up, we want to work with you for a long time.

Estimated hours: 12-18 hours per week depending on your efficiency.



Skills required:



Proficient in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Strong understanding of short-form content pacing — hooks that stop the scroll, fast cuts, energy, and retention

Ability to add captions, text overlays, and simple motion graphics

Good eye for selecting the best moments from longer raw footage

Reliable internet connection and consistent communication via WhatsApp or



Nice to have:



Experience editing trading, finance, or content creator videos

Familiarity with YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, descriptions)

Basic thumbnail design skills



Schedule: There are no fixed work hours. You manage your own time. All that matters is that the daily and weekly deliverables hit the Google Drive folder on schedule. Raw footage is provided daily — you decide when and how you work.



Pay: $1,000–$1,200 USD/month. This is a long-term position with room to grow as the brand scales. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us, not just edit for a few weeks and move on.

To apply: Start your application with the word PROPHUB so I know you read this. Send your portfolio or 2-3 examples of short-form and long-form videos you've edited. Tell me what editing software you use and your monthly salary expectation in USD.



Paid test project: Top candidates will receive 30 minutes of raw livestream footage and be asked to produce one 30-second Reel and one 15-minute YouTube edit. You'll be paid $25 USD for the test.

title: Project Coordinator Admin (Hybrid PM + HR Support)
description:
Role Summary

The Project Coordinator is responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing certification and

compliance audit projects (e.g., ISO 27001, ISO 42001, SOC 2). The PM ensures that clients, auditors, and

internal teams are aligned so that each audit is delivered on time, with accuracy, and according to

Certification Body standards.

This role is client-facing, deadline-driven, and highly detail-oriented, requiring excellent communication

and coordination skills.

Full-time remote position, Monday to Friday, aligned with US time zones.

In addition, this role includes HR and recruitment support responsibilities, functioning as a hybrid

position bridging operations and talent acquisition.



Key Responsibilities

- Coordinate audit schedules with clients and auditors

- Serve as the main point of contact for clients

- Communicate clearly and professionally via

- Lead meetings with clients, auditors, and internal teams

- Manage auditor availability and resource allocation

- Provide auditors with needed documents, access, and platform support

- Maintain audit trackers, timelines, and dashboards

- Identify and escalate risks (delays, missing documents, scope issues)

- Ensure adherence to internal SOPs and audit processes

- Support improvements in PM workflows and procedures

- Create presentations and simple Gantt charts

- Work in Monday.com, Google Workspace, and MS Office tools



Additional Responsibilities (HR + Operations Support)

- Assist the HR team in sourcing and screening candidates

- Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers



- Manage applicant tracking and recruitment pipelines

- Support onboarding processes (documentation, scheduling, system access)

- Maintain communication with candidates throughout the hiring process



Role Expectation Clarification

This is a dual-function role combining project coordination and HR support. The candidate must be

highly organized, adaptable, and capable of managing priorities across multiple functions.

As the company scales, these responsibilities may be split into separate roles.

title: Outbound Appointment Setter – High Volume Cold Calls
description:
Remote Cold Calling | Philippines | US Time Zone (EST)



Role Summary

We are hiring a sharp, reliable VA to make outbound cold calls using our proven script. Your ONLY job is to book 15-minute discovery calls with service business owners (power washing, window cleaning, HVAC, plumbing, electrical).



We are a US-based service helping local businesses recover missed calls and book more jobs automatically.

We provide the system that automatically captures, qualifies, and books their inbound leads so they stop losing money on missed calls. You simply fill the owner’s discovery calendar so we can close new clients.



What You’ll Do

50–100 dials per day using our exact script

Follow the script structure exactly (natural delivery is expected)

Strictly: Permission ? Problem acknowledgment ? Validation ? Calendar ask

Log everything in GoHighLevel

NO pricing talk, NO demos



Pay Structure 

(Hybrid – Performance + Stability)

$7.00 per hour base pay (paid weekly via Wise/PayPal)

Weeks 1–2 (ramp): $15 per booked discovery call

Week 3+: $25 per discovery call that books AND shows (verified within 48 hrs)

Top performers can earn $1,400+ USD per month (performance-based)

Performance Expectations (after training)

2–4 qualified bookings per 100 dials

0.5–1.5 showed calls per day (steady state)

Minimum 80 dials per day required to remain active



What We Provide

Pre-loaded clean lead lists

Full script + objection handlers

GoHighLevel dialer + recording system

Weekly training & call reviews

Fast weekly payouts

Important Note

This is high-volume cold calling. Expect rejection on most calls.

Requirements (must have)

Strong, clear, neutral English (record a 30-second voice sample reading the script opening — we’ll send it)

Prior sales or call-center experience preferred

Quiet workspace + stable internet

Available during US business hours (Iowa time zone)



Can start immediately



How to Apply (must do all 3)

Record yourself reading the first 30 seconds of our opening script (provided below).

Answer: “How many dials per day are you comfortable making?”

Attach your last 2 weeks of call metrics (or reply “none yet” if new).

Reply with “I’m ready” + your voice sample and we’ll send the full script and test call instructions within 24 hours.



Please see opening script below: 



“Hey, this is [Your Name]. I tried calling earlier but it went to voi
.



Quick question — when you miss calls during the day, do those customers usually end up going with someone else?



That’s exactly what we help fix by following up instantly and booking the job for you.”
salary: $7 per hour base + up to $25/Showed B...

title: Outreach Specialist — Cold Email & Instagram DM (Aesthetics Clinic Niche)
description:
Job Title:

Outreach Specialist — Cold
 & Instagram DM (Aesthetics Clinic Niche)

Job Type:

Full-Time (9 am -5 pmm, Monday to Friday — UK timezone)

Salary:

£150/month base + performance bonuses (£25-50 per booked call, £100-150 per signed client)

Top performers earn £450-700+/month.

Number of Positions:

2



Job Description:

We're hiring 2 Outreach Specialists for PureVision Enterprise, a UK-based agency that builds automated patient booking systems for aesthetics clinics (Botox, fillers, laser treatments, skin clinics, med spas).

Your job is simple: find aesthetics clinics, send them personalised cold
s and Instagram DMs, start conversations, and book calls with our founder.

You are NOT selling anything. You are NOT closing deals. You are starting conversations and booking calls. That's it.

We provide everything you need — scripts, templates, conversation flows, SOPs, lead sourcing methods, and daily structure. You follow the system and hit your targets.



What You'll Do Every Day:



Source 50 new aesthetics clinic leads using Google Maps, Instagram, and
 Ad Library

Send 25 personalised cold
s per day using our proven templates

Send 25 personalised Instagram DMs per day using our organic conversation framework

Follow up with leads who haven't responded (Day 3, Day 7, Day 14)

Handle initial replies and guide interested leads toward booking a call

Post a daily activity report in Slack before the end of the day

Check replies and flag interested leads to the founder immediately





Weekly Targets:



250 leads sourced

125 cold
s sent

125 Instagram DMs sent

10-20 replies received

3-5 calls booked





What We Provide:



Complete SOPs covering every part of your role (8 documents)

Cold
 templates and follow-up sequences

Instagram DM conversation framework with example flows

Lead sourcing methods and targeting criteria

Daily workflow with exact time blocks

Slack workspace for communication and reporting

Weekly Monday team call (6:30 am -7:00 amm UK time) for check-ins

Dashboard access to track your performance





Requirements:



Strong written English (you'll be writing
s and DMs on behalf of a UK business)

Experience with cold outreach, lead generation, or appointment setting (preferred but not required if you're a fast learner)

Comfortable using Instagram for business outreach

Reliable internet connection and computer

Available to wor9 amam5 pm5pm UK timezone, Monday to Friday

Self-motivated — you'll be working independently and reporting via Slack

Comfortable following scripts and SOPs exactly as written

Honest and reliable — if something isn't working, you tell us





Bonus (Nice to Have):



Experience with Google Maps scraping or lead sourcing tools

Experience working with agencies or marketing companies

Familiarity with the aesthetics/beauty industry

Experience with CRM systems





Pay Structure:

Base: £150/month — paid monthly regardless of performance

Call Booked Bonus: £25-50 per call — paid for every call that is attended (not just scheduled)

Client Signed Bonus: £100-150 per client — paid when a client signs and pays

Example month: 8 attended calls + 1 signed client = £150 base + £300 call bonuses + £150 signing bonus = £600 total

The better you perform, the more you earn. We track everything transparently.



How to Apply:

Send a short message answering these 3 questions:



Have you done cold outreach 
 or DM) before? If yes, briefly describe what you did and the results.

Write a short Instagram DM (under 40 words) to a fictional aesthetics clinic called "Glow Skin Clinic" that does Botox and fillers. Show us how you'd open a conversation.

What hours are you available to work in the UK timezone?



Do NOT send a generic "I am a hard worker" message. We want to see that you can write well and follow instructions.



About PureVision Enterprise:

We're a small, fast-growing agency based in London, UK. We help aesthetics clinics stop losing patients to slow follow-up by installing automated booking and conversion systems. We're looking for two reliable outreach specialists to join the team and help us grow.

This is a ground-floor opportunity. If you perform well, there's room to grow as the agency scales.

title: Financial Operation Manager- NIGHT SHIFT
description:
Our client is a mission-driven, high-growth brand dedicated to creating thoughtfully designed, sustainable products for parents and children. Founded on the belief that keeping little ones close fosters a deeper connection, they have built a global community around their ethically made baby carriers and textiles.  They have become a category leader that is still rapidly growing and they are committed to transparency, fair-trade manufacturing, and "diligence-ready" operational excellence.





About the Role

The Finance Operations Manager is the engine room of assisting senior management with monitoring and maximizing the company’s financial health. Reporting to the Director of Operations, you will bridge the gap between high-level cash planning and daily execution. This isn’t just a "numbers" role; it’s a "process" role. You will oversee accounts payable, coordinate with lending facilities, manage payroll, and ensure the company remains audit-ready as they continue to expand their product lines and global footprint.  You will also play a key role in building and refining processes and procedures that will ensure that the tasks within your scope are accomplished on an efficient and accurate basis.





Responsibilities





Cash Flow Oversight: Calculate weekly cash requirements (Opex, Payroll, Marketing, Inventory) and provide data-driven insights to support leadership in cash planning decisions.

Payables & Vendor Management: Review weekly A/P, determine payment timing based on urgency and cash availability, and manage the full payment lifecycle for both domestic and global suppliers.

Process Documentation: Develop, document, and maintain Finance SOPs (A/P workflows, payroll processes, tax calendars) to ensure the department is "audit-ready."

Payroll & Admin: Manage the payroll process via Gusto, including reimbursements, state-specific compliance, and benefit deductions.

Financial Reporting Support: Assist with lending facility reporting (borrowing base, inventory aging) and coordinate with external CPAs for tax filings and year-end close.

Competencies and Qualifications

Must-Have





A deep understanding of cash flow principles and forecasting for a physical-product/inventory brand.

Solid, hands-on experience with accounting platforms (e.g., QuickBooks or Xero).

At least 3–5 years of experience in finance or accounting operations (experience in E-commerce/DTC is a major plus).

Proven ability to build and document financial processes from scratch.

Ability to read and interpret financial statements and aging reports.



Nice-to-Have





Experience with lending facility reporting and multi-state sales tax monitoring.

Prior experience using Gusto for payroll administration.

Specific, advanced experience within the Xero ecosystem.

Extensive knowledge of Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets including building forecast models.



Key Qualities





The Process-Builder: You don't just follow a workflow; you improve it and document it.

Meticulously Detailed: You catch the missing W-9 or the duplicate software subscription that others miss.

Diligence-Ready: You operate with the mindset that an auditor or investor could walk in tomorrow and find everything perfectly organized

title: Supply Chain Assistant
description:
INTRODUCTION

Seed & Sprout is a fast-growing Australian direct-to-consumer eCommerce brand creating beautifully designed, planet-friendly products that make sustainable living simple and joyful.

With rapid growth across both DTC and wholesale channels, and increasing operational complexity, the business is investing in strengthening its supply chain foundations to support scale, speed, and accuracy.



ROLE PURPOSE

The Supply Chain Assistant plays a critical operational support role across the end-to-end supply chain.

This role is responsible for ensuring that orders, inventory data, supplier documentation, and logistics processes are accurate, up to date, and flowing smoothly from suppliers ? warehouse ? customers.

The position is highly detail-oriented and process-driven, acting as the backbone of day-to-day supply chain execution.

While the role is administrative in nature, it requires strong ownership, problem-solving, and the ability to work autonomously in a fast-paced environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Logistics & Supplier Coordination

Liaise with suppliers to confirm Cargo Ready Dates (CRDs)

Collect, confirm, and file packing lists and commercial invoices

Coordinate with freight forwarders on shipments and delivery timelines

Maintain accurate and up-to-date delivery information in internal systems (GTM, Cin7)

Update shipment timelines and key dates in Cin7 POS

Enter new SKUs into the master SKU sheet

Maintain accurate SKU data including dimensions and weights



FORECAST REPORTING & DATA MANAGEMENT

Update payment dates in line with shipping timelines

Send remittance advice to suppliers

Record and track freight costs and payments

Support broader data gathering for demand planning and reporting



WAREHOUSE COORDINATION

Support daily reporting updates (including demand planning inputs)

Update shipment information for internal stakeholders

Liaise with warehouse teams regarding inbound deliveries

Reconcile received stock against purchase orders in Cin7

Process purchase order receipts accurately in Cin7



CIN7 & SYSTEM MANAGEMENT

Enter and manage purchase orders in Cin7

Process PO receipts and freight-related expenses

Maintain accurate product data (style names, categories, attributes)

Ensure consistency between Cin7 and Shopify data structures

Maintain product dimensions and pallet configurations

Support data cleanliness for reporting and analysis



CURRENT ENVIRONMENT & EXPECTATIONS

Seed & Sprout operates in a high-growth, high-SKU-complexity environment with frequent new product launches and evolving operational processes.

This role requires:

High attention to detail across large volumes of data

Comfort with repetitive but critical tasks

The ability to work independently (approximately 90% autonomous)

Strong communication across suppliers, freight partners, and internal teams



SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

Strong organisational skills and deadline management

Excellent attention to detail and data accuracy

Proficiency in Excel or Google Sheets

Experience with Cin7 (or similar inventory management systems)

Understanding of Shopify and its impact on reporting and operations

Strong relationship management skills (suppliers, freight forwarders, warehouse teams)

Calm, solutions-focused approach under pressure

Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks



WORKING HOURS & STRUCTURE

Full-time, Monday to Friday (approx. 9am–5pm, with some flexibility)

Fully remote role based in the Philippines

Requires consistent availability aligned with Australian business hours



FIRST 90 DAYS - WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Develop strong understanding of systems (Cin7, SKU master, payment tracking)

Take ownership of core administrative workflows with minimal supervision

Ensure high accuracy across purchase orders, shipments, and inventory data

Build effective working relationships with suppliers, freight partners, and warehouse teams

Begin supporting automation and process improvement initiatives downstream



WHY JOIN SEED & SPROUT

You’ll be part of a growing, values-driven business with a collaborative remote team, where operational excellence is critical to scaling impact.

This role offers the opportunity to build deep expertise in supply chain operations while contributing to a brand committed to sustainability and thoughtful design.

title: Remote Sales Development Rep
description:
Full-Time Remote Sales Rep

Job Description:

Evolving Document of Agreed Upon Expectations



Full time outbound SDR who finds their own leads, does 100+ outbound touches / day, and closes first orders via our order form, escalating larger accounts to manager and after 90 days of ramp, consistently opens 8–12+ new accounts per month.

Requirements

C1+ English, comfortable on the phone with US business owners.

Stable high?speed internet, headset, quiet workspace.

Prior outbound calling / sales experience.

Comfortable working US CST hours

Expectations

Time Zone: USA CST

You’ll work 8–9 hours/day within the 8am–8pm CST window, 5–6 days/week (50 hrs total).



We measure based on inputs, results, and behaviors. Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) that you need to hit are outlined below. 



Ramp Up Period:

30 Day Expectations – 2-4 new accounts per month

60 Day – 4-6 new accounts per month

90 Days – you should be closing 8-12+ new accounts monthly consistently

Activity Metrics (Inputs)

Hours: Minimum 50 working hours per week.

Primary Actions: 100+ primary actions per day (calls, texts,
s to decision makers at smoke shops). 

Mix: At least 40% of actions = new outreach (not just follow?ups).

200 New Leads added to Pipeline Weekly. New leads = new smoke shops added to CRM with owner contact info. (If a shop has more than one location, it is counted as one account)

Logging in CRM: Every action is logged in the tracker (no log = didn’t happen), including time, type, and outcome. 

Primary actions = any meaningful outbound touch that can move a deal forward.

Consequences: This is the scorecard. If you hit these numbers and live these behaviors, we’re good. If not, we’ll have one correction conversation. If it still doesn’t change, I’ll let you go. That’s not personal; that’s the agreement.

Results Metrics (Outputs)

Weekly

Inputs: 600 Primary Actions

Pipeline:

80–100 smoke shops reached (who at least know your name/company name).

40–60 engaged shops (they replied, took a call, or requested info).

15–20 in “hot” status (clear intent to order / waiting on something small).

New Accounts:

1–2 new accounts closed

Clear path to 2-4+ new accounts in next 2-4 weeks from the existing pipeline.

Behavior Standards

Communicate

Reply to your manager within 20min on all work messages.

Be on time for all scheduled check?ins / roleplays.

If you’re going to miss a metric or a day, you tell me before, not after.

Be Accountable

Accurately log all leads and actions same day.

Own mistakes and bring problems with a proposed solution.

Falsifying activity or results is immediate termination.

Be Coachable

Attend weekly check-ins, roleplay, or training.

Implement feedback on scripts and process quickly.

Protect the Brand

Be respectful and professional with every shop.

Follow all compliance / legal guidelines for outreach.



Consequences: One major breach of trust (lying about activity, disrespecting customers, ghosting) is grounds for immediate termination.



Weekly Reports:

Link is on CRM - Filled out by 5 PM CST every Sunday. 



Note: These are the rules of the game. If you hit the actions and live the behaviors, I’ll back you and invest in you. If you don’t, we agreed up front that I’ll end the role quickly.





Compensation

Base salary: $400 USD per month.

Commission: 10% of the first sale of any New Account you close in a given month (excluding shipping and other pass-through operational costs).

Base salary is contingent on meeting activity requirements. If you consistently miss activity targets, we will end the role.

Commissions are paid on all qualifying New Accounts you close while employed.

New Account = a business that has never ordered from us before (new legal entity).



Next Steps – Application

Step 1 – Written Task (REQUIRED)



Please answer ALL of the questions below in writing and paste your answers into your application:



Confirm Requirements

Are you able to work US CST hours (night shift in your country)?

Do you have C1 or better English and prior outbound calling experience?

What city/country are you in and what is your internet speed (upload/download)?



Cold Outreach Sample (5–8 sentences)

Imagine you are calling a smoke shop owner for the first time. Write what you would say from “Hello” until you ask them to place a small first test order.

Include:

A quick intro (who you are, company name)

Why you’re calling

One clear benefit for ordering from us

A simple call?to?action (next step)



Past Volume & Results

Briefly describe your most recent outbound role:

What was your daily target for calls / messages?

What was your best month (results you achieved)?



Handling the Hard Days (3–5 sentences)

On days you don’t feel like making calls but still must hit 100+ actions, what do you do to push through and hit your numbers?



Step 2 – Voice Test (2–3 minutes total)



Please record a 2–3 minute audio or video (Loom, Vocaroo, unlisted YouTube, etc.) and send the link in your reply. One take is fine. Use English only.



Part 1 (about 60 seconds): Introduce Yourself



Your name, location, and past outbound sales experience.

The most dials / messages you’ve done in a single day.

Why you want a high?volume cold calling role working US CST hours.



Part 2 (about 60–90 seconds): Mock Call



Pretend you’re calling “Joe’s Smoke Shop” for the first time.

Do a real opening like it’s a live call (no reading monotone).

Goal: get Joe interested in placing a small test order or speaking to your manager.

Handle this objection once: “We already have a distributor.”

Record in a quiet place with a stable connection so I can clearly hear your voice, pace, and energy.

title: Remote Sales Development Representative (SDR) – Follow-Up Specialist, Path to Closer (Web Solutions Company)
description:
Company: A web solutions company

Location: 100% remote (Philippines-based)

Type: Full-time, long-term

Start date: We will contact applicants for interviews and onboarding in 2-4 weeks



About the role:



We are a web solutions company expanding our sales efforts, starting with the Estonian market and later moving into the US and other European countries.



You will primarily work with leads already provided to you. You will manually manage follow-ups using our client portal and your own
. You will also have the opportunity to generate additional leads on your own via LinkedIn outreach and phone calls, which can earn you extra performance pay. Strong performers will have the opportunity to transition into a full closing role a few months later on as we expand, particularly when targeting English-speaking markets.

This is a genuine growth opportunity with clear progression for those who deliver results.



Key responsibilities:



- Follow up on provided leads using our client portal and your own
.

- Nurture leads through consistent
 and phone communication to move them forward in the sales process.

- Generate additional leads via LinkedIn and phone calls to earn extra pay.

- Keep accurate records in our CRM.

- Learn our web solutions offerings thoroughly and represent the company professionally.

- Meet weekly targets for outreach volume, connections made, and leads progressed.



Requirements:



- Near-perfect English — both written and spoken (this is non-negotiable).

- Experience in sales, lead generation, cold calling, or customer service is a big plus.

- Self-motivated, persistent, organized, and comfortable working remotely.

- Reliable laptop, good headset, and stable high-speed internet.

- Willingness to adjust some hours for the Estonian market (some evening availability in Philippine time will be needed).

- Fast learner and coachable.



What we offer:



- Base salary of $600 USD per month for the entry-level position.

- Quick advancement opportunities within 2–3 months for top performers, with higher responsibility and increased earning potential.

- Performance-based pay and commissions on top of the base salary, including extra pay for additional self-generated leads (details will be discussed during the selection process).

- Opportunity to transition into a closing role later on as the company expands into US and EU markets.

- Paid training on our products, sales process, tools, and scripts.

- All necessary tools provided (CRM, client portal access, etc.).

- Long-term stable opportunity with a growing company.



How to apply:

Only serious applicants who follow instructions will be considered.



- Send your updated resume/CV.

- In the first line of your message, write exactly: “I have near-perfect English and am available for voice interviews.”

Record a short voice message (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself, explaining why you are interested in this sales role, and demonstrating your English speaking ability. Attach or link the voice file (WhatsApp voice note or simple audio file is fine).



We will review applications and reach out to selected candidates for voice interviews in the coming weeks. Thank you in advance to those that apply!

title: Junior Ecommerce Operations Specialist
description:
*About the Role*

We are looking for a Junior Ecommerce Operations Specialist to own the day-to-day execution that keeps our selling channels running smoothly. This means handling invoices, reconciliations, vouchers, bundles, pricing checks and basic reporting accurately and on time, across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop and our website.

This is a hands-on execution role suited for someone who is detail-oriented, dependable and takes pride in getting things done properly.



*Key Responsibilities:*

- Key in and reconcile invoices from Shopee, Lazada, TikTok, and our website

- Spot and dispute overcharged shipping fees using our checker tools

- Set up and check vouchers, bundles, and campaigns across platforms

- Ensure pricing is consistent across all channels and flag discrepancies

- Send daily and weekly updates to the manager



*What We Are Looking For:*

- Detail-oriented and dependable to follow through without being chased

- Comfortable with spreadsheets and backend platform dashboards

- Clear written communicator

- Experience with any ecommerce platform (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, or similar) is a plus



*Grow With Us*

We are building a team for the long term. There is a clear progression path here from Junior Specialist all the way to Manager level. This role is for people who show up consistently, take ownership and want to keep growing.



*About Us*

CAARTN is a Singapore-based food and gift packaging wholesaler serving home bakers, small F&B businesses, and personal shoppers across Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and our own website. We started in 2020 and have grown steadily by staying focused on quality, accessibility, and keeping our operations tight.

We are a small but structured team and we take operations seriously. Everything we do is built around clear SOPs, honest communication, and doing things right the first time.

title: Social Media Support Person
description:
We’re seeking a FULL TIME Social Media Support person to work remotely for our business.



We’re offering up to 35,000php per month for this role depending on the quality of candidate... we're looking for people with outstanding attention to detail & dedication and a solid understanding of social media, advertising metrics and scheduling systems.



We’re seeking someone who’s able to work from 9am – 5pm AEST (7am-3pm PH Time) Monday – Friday.



If this sounds like you, please read below and apply!

____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Social Status is a Social Media Agency that aims to become undeniably recognised as the best agency in Australia. We are Social People, and we want to spend our time with like-minded tea
mbers doing what we love & helping each other grow.



We’re expanding the team to increase our capacity for new clients and are looking for an experienced Social Media Support Person to take on some of our repeatable tasks and free up our internal resources.



As a Social Media Marketing Agency, we believe that Social Media is the best marketing channel on the planet & nobody knows it like we do. Social Status offers a fast-paced work environment where you can say goodbye to the mundane monotony encountered in so many other roles.



We work hard and value building meaningful relationships with our teammates & clients while maintaining an exciting, supportive workplace. Our team is consistently pushing to better themselves personally & professionally to increase their success and that of our clients and our business.



This is your opportunity to be a part of one of Australia’s premier agencies and join a team of young, fun individuals working on some of Australia's biggest brands.



About You:



As Social Media Support, you will be a highly organised person with great attention to detail. You'll have an understanding of Social Media Metrics and experience in Social Media Scheduling Platforms (Sked Social, Sprout Social, Agora Pulse, Later, Buffer etc.), you’ll have a excitement for data entry & be fluent in spoken & written English.



You’ll spend your time completing 5 core tasks:



From the 1st – 7th you’ll be exporting Social Media Reports and using AI to craft
s that speak to their results.

From the 13th – 17th you’ll be completing our clients’ Half-Month Check-ins

From the 21st – 30th you’ll be scheduling our content in Agora Pulse for the upcoming month.

All month you'll be monitoring our clients' accounts Community Management, responding to questions, comments, messages from our FAQs and flagging important queries / complaints with our internal team.

You'll also be assisting in Influencer / UGC reach-outs and management using tools like Gifted.



What will your day look like?



- Exporting Social Media Reports & filling in
 templates to forward to clients

- Completing Half-Month Check-ins for our clients & reporting back to Account Managers

- Scheduling content from Google Sheets into our Scheduling Tool (Sked Social)

- Monitoring and completing Community Management on our clients' social accounts.



What’s in it for you?



- A generous starting salary that is reviewed annually

- A comprehensive training & processes system

- Consistent, repeatable tasks & a supportive team



You'll benefit from:



- A comprehensive training & processes system.

- A collaborative workspace and nurturing environment.

- A great company culture.

- Working with a group of legends who make work fun rather than a chore.



We would love you to have:



- 3+ years Social Media Marketing experience.

- Perfect Written & Spoken English

- Impeccable attention to detail

- Strong Understanding of Social Media Metrics (reach, engagement, engagement rate, click-through rate, cost per click etc.)

- Solid Understanding of Western Culture & Language

- Exceptional Time Management

- Well Organised

- Proactive tea
mber who looks for opportunities for improvement.



Once you have applied for the role, we will review your resume and get back to you if we would like to discuss further.



We're looking for someone who can work 7am - 3pm Philippines time and has a track record of successful social media support & data entry.



Please let us know your past experience and why you're the right person for the role. Include any past examples of social media work you've completed.

___________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Why you will love us!



If this sounds like you, we can offer you a challenging and rewarding environment that supports your career goals and aspirations. You will also be getting involved with one of Australia’s premier digital marketing agencies.



Interested?



Go on then, we invite you to apply. We can’t wait to see your application pop up!



So…what happens next?



Once you have applied for the role, we will review your resume and get back to you if we would like to discuss further.

title: Bookkeepper for a busy roofing company
description:
BOOKKEEPER – ROOFING / CONSTRUCTION



Job Location: Remote

Office Location: Woodland Hills, CA 91364

Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time

 

Who We Are



With passion and precision, we craft top-quality roofs that enhance homes, build trust, and deliver lasting protection. Our vision is to protect 6,000 homes with quality roofing over the next 10 years.

We are a fast-growing roofing company building a strong internal team of professionals who want stability, growth, and long-term career development.



 

Position Overview



We are seeking an experienced and motivated Bookkeeper to manage financial operations for our growing roofing business. This role is essential to keeping projects profitable, operations smooth, and leadership informed through accurate financial reporting.

This position is ideal for someone who enjoys working in a high-volume, fast-paced environment, has strong accounting fundamentals, and is interested in growing into a senior financial leadership role (Financial Controller) over time.



 



Key Responsibilities

As our Bookkeeper, you will:

• Manage day-to-day bookkeeping and project-level financials.

• Prepare and maintain accurate invoices, bills, and financial records.

• Track job costs, materials, and subcontractor expenses.

• Produce regular profit & loss reports and financial summaries.

• Maintain clean records in QuickBooks Online, CRM, and internal systems.

• Support leadership with financial insights and reporting.

• Ensure deadlines are met and data is accurate across all platforms.



 



What We’re Looking For



-  2+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience with a USA BASED COMAPNY. - REQUIRED

- Strong knowledge of QuickBooks Online and Excel. - REQUIRED

- Experience in construction, roofing, or contractor-based businesses. – GREAT ADVANTAGE

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail. - REQUIRED

- Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously. - REQUIRED

- Professional communication skills and ability to collaborate with production and management teams.

- Self-motivated, disciplined, and accountable. - GREAT ADVANTAGE



 

Our Core Values



We are looking for someone who aligns with our culture:

• Integrity – Doing the right thing, always.

• Respectful – Treating everyone with professionalism and kindness.

• Disciplined – Following through with precision and consistency.

• Accountable – Taking ownership of work and results.

• Transparent – Communicating openly and honestly.

• Aligned – Working together toward shared goals.

• Results-Oriented – Delivering excellence in everything we do.

 

Why Join Us?



* Growing company with long-term stability.

* Clear path for career advancement into financial leadership.

* Work directly with ownership and decision-makers.

* Supportive, professional, and positive team culture.

* Opportunity to build systems, not just maintain them.

 

Ready to take the next step in your accounting career?

If you’re looking for more than just another bookkeeping role—and want to grow with a company that values both performance and people—we’d love to hear from you. Apply today and help us build something exceptional.
